constantinehurston.name: Constantine Hurston
constantinehurston.description: A proud member of the Hurston family, Constantine Hurston has pledged himself to helping his family's legacy continue to grow. However, rather than rely on his name alone, Constantine claims that he prefers to earn any promotions by his own merit. While currently only a Jr. Outsourcing Agent, he firmly believes that he will soon prove his worth and quickly rise through the ranks of Hurston Dynamics.

mileseckhart.name: Miles Eckhart
mileseckhart.description: After leaving the Army, Miles Eckhart missed the excitement of his former life and decided to try mercenary work. He took to it so well that before long he started his own company, Eckhart Security. Specializing in operations in unclaimed and hostile systems like Nyx, Miles remains fully independent and unaffiliated with the Mercenary Guild.

reccobattaglia.name: Recco Battaglia
reccobattaglia.description: Recco Battaglia, the latest in a long line of miners, had continued the family tradition until an accident at a dig sit left her unable to continue the work. Frustrated with her post-accident treatment under the bureaucracy of the UEE and United Resource Workers, Recco moved out to Nyx where she now coordinates logistics for the local branch of Miners Amalgamated, an alternate union that focuses on helping independent miners.

wallaceklim.name: Wallace Klim
wallaceklim.description: After being terminated from his position as a chemical engineering instructor at the University of Rhetor, Wallace Klim is now one of the top producers of high-end drugs in the Stanton System. The quality of his product is apparent by his own frequent personal use.

teciapacheco.name: Tecia Pacheco
teciapacheco.description: Tecia "Twitch" Pacheco came up as a soldier who transitioned into freelance security work after her service ended. Things were going well until she suffered nerve damage on a job for BlacJac and was fired. Left without employment but with a very specialized skillset, Twitch used her knowledge of the criminal underworld of ArcCorp to her advantage and began operating her own illegal enterprise.

cdf.name: Civilian Defense Force
cdf.description: Created as part of the Militia Mobilization Initiative, the Civilian Defense Force (CDF) is a volunteer militia that can be called upon by the UEE to provide support during times of crisis and large scale threats. The group is not intended to replace existing security forces, but rather temporarily bolster efforts during emergencies. CDF volunteers are called upon to fulfill a variety of roles from combat to support positions.

clovusdarneely.name: Clovus Darneely
clovusdarneely.description: Clovus Darneely is a clerk at Reclamation & Disposal, Lorville's main salvage yard. With a reputation for being highly educated and a bit of an erudite, it is unclear among his clients why he works in such a remedial position.

headhunters.name: Headhunters
headhunters.description: One of the oldest gangs in the Pyro System, the Headhunters have earned themselves a reputation for being ruthless and respected. Unlike many outlaws, when the Headhunters strike a deal they're known for keeping their word. Especially if they promise to kill someone. They are currently seeking to wrest control of Ruin Station away from XenoThreat.

ruto.name: Ruto
ruto.description: One of the best known info brokers in Stanton, the true identity of Ruto remains a complete mystery. Only appearing as a hologram of the former Imperator, Kelos Costigan, Ruto manages a vast network of criminal activity, connections, and knowledge for clients such as the Nine Tails.

xenothreat.name: XenoThreat
xenothreat.description: XenoThreat believes that the UEE's continued acceptance of aliens has set Humanity on a path towards destruction. Rather than protecting its citizens, the UEE has given in to greed and has shown a complete disregard for the values that made Humanity great in the first place. In response, XenoThreat is attempting to lead a revolution to take back the soul of the Empire.

contracts.title: CDF ALERT: [Location] Blockade Runners Needed
contracts.description:
*FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE*

A hostile fleet of ships equipped with quantum jammers have created a blockade around  [Location], disabled the station's defensive turrets, and stolen a large supply of Zeta-Prolanide. In response, the CDF has received authorization to activate its volunteer force. 

Though the overall situation is dire, the theft of the Zeta-Prolanide is our priority. Without direct action, the loss of the sector's Zeta-Prolanide stores could have a devastating effects to the wider economy of the whole system. 

While local security forces are investigating the incursion, they've tracked the stolen inventory to several locations. CDF volunteers are tasked with heading to these locations, recovering the stolen Zeta-Prolanide, and transferring it back to the station before the material completely degrades and is no longer viable. Just be careful, intel suggests that larger clusters of Zeta-Prolanide have a higher outlaw presence.

Since time is of the essence, having a tractor beam to assist in moving the cargo is highly advised.

As an added incentive, volunteers will receive regular bonus payments for their combined efforts.

contracts.title: Advanced Tracker License Certification
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TargetName] 
SYSTEM: [System] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [Location]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: With your proven track record, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn an Advanced Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Very High-Risk Targets (VHRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with heavy escorts. With multiple hostiles to deal with, encounters with these targets can often be lethal.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a VHRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TargetName]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[Location]</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.description: [Contractor]

     [Target2]
     [Target3]

It is currently believed that they are no longer traveling together in order to evade capture, and may soon flee the system.  You should strongly consider recruiting additional help in order to execute all the warrants in the limited time frame.

contracts.title: Vaughn
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Capture Arlington Gang Leader Maltrox Arlington
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = [Contractor]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Maltrox Arlington has been keeping a low profile recently, but we think he's come out of hiding. A patrol was refueling at a station when one of their ships was boosted. Maltrox is the most likely suspect. While the regtag was temporarily deactivated, we have been able to trace the ship’s quantum signature and have provided you those coordinates.

A third generation criminal, the Arlington gang has been under Maltrox’s leadership for the past six years. Be aware, this is a smart, aggressive, and very dangerous target. The more resources you can bring to bear, the more likely it is that we can bring Maltrox in one and for all. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: twice the headache
contracts.description:
Have another pair that needs simultaneous deathing. Seems to be getting more and more popular as a murder option. 

This time it's [TargetName] and [TargetName2]. Both are supposed to be pretty skilled operators and they won't be flying alone. 

I'd make sure whoever you get to help you on this one can handle a fight.

contracts.title: two for the price of two
contracts.description:
[TargetName] and [TargetName2]. I think they may be related? Or dating? Doesn't really matter, someone wants them killed. 

I've arranged it so that you can hit them when they're not flying together. Safer for you this way. They are both serious business and fly with equally serious backup.

Make sure you and your crew time your attacks. I don't want one of them left alive or it's going to be a real headache.

contracts.title: Tecia Pacheco
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Two In The Head
contracts.description:
Contract's for two targets that need to be taken out at the same time. 

Guess the client is worried that if they aren't eliminated together, one of them will go dark and try to get some revenge.

They go by [TargetName] and [TargetName2].

Find yourself a team, divide and conquer.

And make sure whoever it is has got skills, because these two have a reputation for holding their own in a fight and they for sure won't be alone. Be ready for them to give you some trouble.

contracts.title: Divide and Conquer
contracts.description:
Normally, the pair of [TargetName] and [TargetName2] would be too much to take on together. They both are about as good as it gets when it comes to dogfighting and the crew they fly with are almost as good.

But recently they split - not sure why - and are flying separate for the moment.  Someone thinks this may be the best chance to take them out. 

Gather some personnel you can trust and plan a simultaneous raid against both targets. It's too dangerous to risk one of them living after such a direct move against them.

contracts.title: Deadly Combination
contracts.description:
[TargetName] and [TargetName2].

Two serious operators who've recently decided to make a move against their boss. Each of the pair are traveling with a small, highly trained armada and cutting deep into territory that doesn't belong to them.

You, and whoever you recruit to help, are going to take them out and it has to be both at the same time so they can't regroup.

contracts.title: double trouble
contracts.description:
If you had asked me, I would've said [TargetName] and [TargetName2] would have wound up eventually killing each other. But instead you're going to get the honor of killing them both at the same time.

You're going to have to work for it, though.

Each one is trouble. Serious records, highly trained, and too smart to fly without backup.

Gather the best crew you can on this one. You'll need it. And don't be stingy. You can't spend credits if you're dead.

contracts.title: Bounty Assignment: Group Warrant (HRT)
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Group Warrant Issued
contracts.description:

contracts.title: Vaughn
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Double Elimination
contracts.description: Got a contract to take out two up and comers who've been stirring up trouble. It has to be clean, both done at the same time, or else they might cause even more trouble.  Long story short, you'll need some help on this one.\n\nBoth [TargetName] and [TargetName2] know how to handle themselves, and the people they fly with aren't no joke either. You can expect each of them to be guarded by a few ships.

contracts.title: Tecia Pacheco
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: friends to the end
contracts.description:
I really hope that you're not buddies with [TargetName] or [TargetName2] because I need you to ghost the pair of them... at the same time...

Of course they wouldn't make this easy on us and travel in the same ship or something obvious like that. No. You're going to have to put together a crew so that you can down both targets simultaneously. 

As soon as one of them is dead, be ready to drop the other one too. Can't risk either of them getting away.

And I figure I should mention that not only are both pretty good pilots, but that they'll be traveling with backup too. Nothing you can't handle I'm sure.

contracts.title: death do us part
contracts.description:
It's pretty touching when you run across a pair that's willing to die for one another. Stupid but touching.

[TargetName] and [TargetName2] chose to stand by each other and now its gone and got them dead.

Find a friend of your own and hunt each of these two down. Make sure you kill them at the same time. Call it poetic justice.

They should die pretty easy. Maybe they'll have a ship or two with them but I don't think it'll be anything to worry about.

contracts.title: Tecia Pacheco
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: simultaneous release
contracts.description:
Guess what [TargetName] and [TargetName2] have in common? 

You're gonna kill 'em both!

Difficult part is that I need you to kill them at the same time so that one doesn't have a chance to escape, or worse, kill the person trying to kill them. 

So put together a team to track one target while you handle the other. Divide and conquer!

And despite the fact they made a mess big enough to get themselves killed, my understanding is that they are relative lightweights. Don't expect you to meet too much resistance.

contracts.title: together forever
contracts.description:
Here's the deal. [TargetName] and [TargetName2] need to die at the same time. Unfortunately, they aren't gonna be in the same place.

A double hit can sound complicated, but if you hire some additional guns it shouldn't be all that hard to do two hits simultaneously.

Make sure you find folks who have skills as I have it on good authority that each'll be flying with some escorts for "protection."

contracts.title: One-Two Combo
contracts.description:
Have another pair that need to be eliminated:
[TargetName] and [TargetName2]

They've been in the wind for a few days now, but just popped up. If we don't get them now, I'm not sure we will get another chance.  You need to enlist a partner to make sure both targets are hit at the same time.

As far as them putting up resistance, [TargetName] is known to bring along a friend to watch their back, and I suspect [TargetName2] will do likewise.

contracts.title: Double Tap
contracts.description:
A price has been set on the heads of [TargetName] and [TargetName2]. 

While having to hit two targets isn't that weird, the client wants to send a very specific message, so they need to targets hit at the exact same moment. The extra credits should make up for the hassle.

And unfortunately since the pair aren't traveling together, it goes without saying that to pull it off you're gonna need some help. Make sure you bring people you trust can handle more than one ships since the targets are known to travel with backup.

contracts.title: Coordinated Takedown
contracts.description:
Interesting assignment came my way. I need two separate targets taken out: [TargetName] and [TargetName2] 

Problem is, either one gets word about the other being hit, they’ll go to ground. Can’t risk losing either of them. 

It’ll take considerable coordination, but I want you to hit them both at the same exact time.  

And since you can’t be in two places at once, you’ll need to find someone you can trust to help on this.

Thankfully, my intel says that both the targets should be traveling alone. That should help make things a bit easier on you.

contracts.title: Pro Tem Escapee Bounty Contract (Reevaluation)
contracts.description:
Hey,

I know it's been a little while, but if you are still interested in doing contract work for Northrock, I convinced the management to give you a reevaluation. If you can successfully complete a bounty for us, we can see about getting your employment status reinstated.

This pro tem contract is to track down escaped criminal [TargetName]. Try your best to get to them before they can wipe their record at database access point or the job's going to be significantly more difficult.

Hoping we can trust you on this.
 
Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Pro Tem Escapee Bounty Contract
contracts.description:
Hey There,

My name is Braden Corchado and I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system. I may have reached out already, but we try to make it a point of approaching anyone who meets our high standards and encouraging them to complete a pro tem contract. 

You can't do much better than become a Northrock contractor. We have a solid reputation for offering challenging and interesting work at a higher rate of pay then many of our competitors in system. 

Now, to get approved, you will need to apprehend one [TargetName]. They have recently escaped from the detention center and your job will be to track them down before they can disappear completely off the grid. 

A little hint is that it's safe to assume that the target is going to go try to clear their record. I recommend triangulating your search between the detention center they escaped from and locations where they can hack into the record system.

Get this done and we'll see about getting you more work.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Escapee Bounty Assignment: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Convicted criminal [TargetName] has escaped from a local rehab facility and Northrock's been contracted to return the inmate to custody. In my experience, escaped prisoners tend not to give up peacefully, so use any method you can to find and subdue the escapee. 

Might be worth staking out spots where they could attempt to hack their record clean. Wouldn't be the first time a prisoner has tried to wipe their sentence after escaping.

Good hunting,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Vaughn
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Crusader Security
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Hurston Security
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Bounty Assignment: Group Warrant (MRT)
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Pro Tem Group Warrant Contract
contracts.description:
Hey,

Hope everything is going all right. I may have reached out already, but I wanted to be sure and introduce myself. I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system today, providing a variety of services to all major governmental bodies as well as various private concerns. The reason I am contacting you is because we believe someone with your skills could be a boon to our clients. 

Not only that, but I think we'd be good fit for you. Our contractors traditionally get a higher rate of pay than a lot of our competitors in system, and a lot of them tell me how they really enjoy being tasked with the challenging and interesting work we offer. 

Now, Northrock holds itself to such high-standards so before we can make anything official, you'll need to achieve approved contractor status by completing a pro tem contract. 

I was hoping you could capture several wanted members of an outlaw gang: [Target1], [Target2], and [Target3].

Get that done and we'll see about getting you more work.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Pro Tem Group Warrant (Reevaluation)
contracts.description:
Hey,

I've been thinking over everything that went down and decided to speak to management. They've agreed to give you another chance but only if you successfully complete a contract for us.

We can look at reinstating your employment status if you can bring in this criminal trio:
[Target1]
[Target2]
[Target3]

They evaded the last Associate who went after them, so you bringing them all in would definitely earn you some points.

Hopefully you've gotten your act together since your last job.

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Active Bounty: [TargetName] (ERT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend the extreme-risk target [TargetName] from [Location]. 

An extreme-risk target typically pilots a sub-capital class vessel, has several heavily-armed allies, and is expected to be very difficult to apprehend. It may be useful to bring along support staff to assist with engaging this target.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Bounty Hunters Guild membership and appropriate certification.
• Access to vehicle suitably outfitted for combat.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Pro Tem Suspect Apprehension
contracts.description:
Hi,

Hope you don't mind, but I was made aware of your Bounty Hunters Guild status and wanted to reach out and see if you'd be interested in contracting with Northrock Service Group, one of the top rated private security firms in the system.

If you are, the first step would be to complete a pro tem suspect apprehension. It's less of an evaluation and more of a chance to make sure that we can have a good working relationship. 

The suspect you would be after is known as <EM4>[TargetName]</EM4>. They are known to be particularly elusive so you may have your work cut out for you.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Pro Tem Suspect Apprehension (Reevaluation)
contracts.description:
Hey again,

It's been a little while, hope everything's okay. I know things didn't end on the best terms, but after discussing it with management, I would like to offer you an opportunity to redeem yourself. You had potential and I hate to think that you didn't have a proper chance to show what you're capable of.

Apprehend <EM4>[TargetName]</EM4> and we can see about getting your employment status reinstated.

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Apprehend Suspect: [TargetName]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Wanted: [TargetName] (ERT)
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: [TargetName] (ERT)
contracts.description:
ATTN: Bounty Hunters

You might have heard of [TargetName] before. They’re an extreme-risk target and they’ve been making headlines recently. The hope is you’ll be able to put together a response team and help BlacJac shut them down for good. Our most recent intel has their sub-capital ship and heavily armed escorts flying over at [Location].
 
I’d recommend making sure you’ve got an up-to-date imprint before heading out. Just in case. 

Good luck,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Extreme-Risk Targets (ERT). These are criminals who travel in sub-capital ships with heavy escorts. This class of bounty only gets assigned to the most experienced of trackers.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend an ERT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TargetName]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[Location]</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: [Contractor]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Oust Claimjumpers
contracts.description:
POSTING: Security / Mercenary 
LOCATION: [LagrangeLocation]
WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus)
TERMS*: 
A local Stanton independent mining team was working [Location] as Shubin Interstellar contractors when a hostile force attacked and took over the site. We believe that the perpetrators are still at the claim using the equipment left behind to harvest the valuable ore there for themselves.

Among the equipment lost were a handful of orbital sentries that had unfortunately not yet been fully deployed at the time of the attack. Long range scans of the claim have led us to conclude that the outlaws have activated the orbital sentries and are using them to protect their illegal operations.

To reclaim the site, we are seeking contractors to go to [Location], destroy the orbital sentries, and clear the site of hostile miners. Efficiency is strongly recommended as there is a high risk they will call for reinforcements once they discover they’re being evicted. 




*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Trigger A Trap
contracts.description:
Some asshole going by the name [TargetName] has been running a scheme where their cargo ship requests refueling services only to ambush our ships when they get there. Even loaded the damn thing up with real cargo to make sure it passes scans. We’ve spread the word so nobody in Rough & Ready will fall for the trap again, but I want this skag punished. 

I think [TargetName] knows a lot of our people on sight, so I’m guessing it’ll be better to pay you to take care of it. Heard that they were spotted around [Location]. Head there now and take care of that cargo ship and anyone protecting it once and for all. 

- Smokey

contracts.title: Exterminate Eavesdroppers
contracts.description:
Some idiots think they can blatantly spy on the Headhunters and get away with it. They’ve set up several orbital sentries at [location] and have a few ships patrolling the area. We don’t know who’s behind it but we honestly don’t care. We just need it gone. 

Let us know if you feel like putting some real brash bastards in their place. We’ll pay you well and deliver the creds the second the job is done. 

Keep in mind that it’s really only the sentries we care about. The ships they got patrolling are only a concern if they get in your way or if they try to call in some friends to stop you. 
 
Stows out.

contracts.title: Annihilate Sentries
contracts.description:
Recent scans discovered several orbital sentries and ships at [location]. We believe they’re part of an espionage campaign targeting XenoThreat, in response to our recent actions in the Stanton system. Seems XenoThreat must be doing something right, if they’re out here spying like this.

We’re looking for an experienced and highly-skilled merc willing to eliminate this operation. If you don’t want Pyro to become a surveillance system, then this is your chance to stop it. The sentries probably won’t be too big of an issue, but pay mind to the patrol ships. If they manage to break away, you’ll have a whole lot more trouble breathing down your neck. 

You’ll have our gratitude and a sizable payment once the job is done. 

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Stomp Spying Op
contracts.description:
The Rough & Ready crew is looking for an independent merc interested in something heavy. We’ve been keeping an eye on a developing situation at [location] where ships are guarding several orbital sentries spying on our operations.      

Now, I might’ve been born at night, but it wasn’t last night. Considering the blatant way they’re set up, whoever’s responsible had to know we’d eventually discover it. Almost feels like they’re baiting R&R into attacking it, and I don’t want us falling for it. 

Instead, you’re gonna do it for us and get paid a damn good amount of creds for your effort. The ships stationed there will be less suspicious of an unaffiliated ship approaching and make it harder to pin the attack on us. 

Just be sure to plan accordingly before heading in. Maybe bring your own reinforcements in case any of their ships escape and call in some of their own.     

- Smokey

contracts.title: Overdrive Initiative: PRIORITY TARGETS
contracts.description:
Our analysts have examined the intel seized from those XenoThreat recon teams but the data appears to be locked behind a sophisticated encryption system and requires a custom cryptokey to access.

We've managed to locate several XenoThreat lieutenants operating in the system, you are to find and engage the suspects and see if they are in possession of a cryptokey that will allows us to access the intel.

As a reminder, the military has generously donated some old F7A Hornets for CDF members who see this initiative through to the end.

contracts.title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Kass Dent
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = [Contractor]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Two bank guards were reported missing last week. A few hours ago, their bodies turned up in a trash heap in Magnus with their biometrics stolen. Thankfully, a nearby dumpling cart had a security camera that captured the corpses being dropped. Facial recognition was able to ID one Kass Dent, romantic partner to Maltrox Arlington and parent of Les Arlington. Using the vid to construct a timeline, we have provided the coordinates of where Kass is currently believed to be hiding. 

Kass is suspected of a long list of murders, with these two only being the most recent. We recommend only bringing highly skilled wingman to try and keep the casualty count at a minimum.  

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.description:

BlacJac just got word that a very high-risk target, [TargetName], was spotted moving through the flight lanes over at [Location] piloting a formidable ship with a heavy escort.  

We want this bounty closed out before they commit any more crimes. Gather whatever resources or support you need, and head out as soon as you can.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Active Bounty: [TargetName] (HRT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend the high-risk target [TargetName] from [Location]. 

A high-risk target typically pilots a large multicrew vessel, has several known allies, and is expected to be difficult to apprehend. It may be useful to bring along support staff to assist with engaging this target.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Bounty Hunters Guild membership and appropriate certification.
• Access to vehicle suitably outfitted for combat.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Vaughn
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Group Warrant Issued
contracts.description:
CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = [Contractor]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

In relation to a jointly committed crime, a group warrant has been issued for:
     [Target1]
     [Target2]
     [Target3]

It is currently believed that they are no longer traveling together in order to evade capture, and may soon flee the system.  You should strongly consider recruiting additional help in order to execute all the warrants in the limited time frame. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the targets. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract when all targets have been dealt with in the allotted time.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Track Down Spy
contracts.description:
XenoThreat has placed a kill order on the head of [TargetName]. As a member of the Headhunters gang, [TargetName] hacked into XenoThreat systems to steal information on our operations and personnel. The harm done can only be rectified by ensuring [TargetName] can never do something like this again. That’s why XenoThreat will pay anyone who can track down and assassinate [TargetName].     

LOCATION UPDATE: Recent scans identified [TargetName] traveling with other ships near [Location]. 

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Squash Spying Op
contracts.description:
Recently made an interesting discovery that someone set up a handful of orbital sentries at [location]. Guess they’re trying to grab some info about our operations there. They even have a few ships guarding to make sure nothing happens to them. 

Of course, we want these bastards gone, but I’m worried that getting rid of it ourselves would be bad for business. That’s why we’re looking for a little ‘plausible deniability’. Someone from outside of R&R to eliminate the problem, so whoever is behind it can’t directly tie the attack back to us. I know this won’t be a walk in the park, especially with those guards lurking. Who knows how many reinforcements they have at the ready? But if you manage to get it done, we’re prepared to see you paid right. 

Think you’ve got the skills to pull this off? 

- Smokey

contracts.title: Exact Justice
contracts.description:
[TargetName] was recently revealed to be a mole for XenoThreat. It all makes sense now because the skav was a major asshole. Unfortunately, they split before we could handle it ourselves. 

Based on all they learned about our ops, we need ‘em taken out pronto. They see one of us coming and they’ll just run again, but I figured someone like you has a better chance of getting close enough for a killshot. 

We just got word [TargetName] was hanging around [Location]. Looks like there’s other ships around protecting ‘em too. Think you got the skill to rid the ‘verse of a traitorous bastard and their bastard friends?  

Stows out.

contracts.title: Eradicate Sentries
contracts.description:
Do you value Humanity’s freedom? If so, I’m offering you a chance to prove it. Recent scans discovered orbital sentries and patrolling ships at [location]. We believe they’re part of a UEE espionage campaign targeting XenoThreat. It’s important that we stop their intelligence gathering before we launch our next mission.

We’re looking for an experienced merc willing to eliminate these forces immediately. The sentries are the priority, but the ships might prove a bigger issue if they’re allowed to escape. You’ll have to evaluate the situation more closely once you’re on site. 

We could take care of it ourselves, but want to send in a contractor so the scum behind it don’t know who hit them. Payment will be sent promptly upon completion. Plus, the satisfaction of knowing you’re helping a good cause.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Failed Delivery
contracts.description:
My associates and I brokered a deal with a hauler named [TargetName] to deliver supplies to us. Funny thing is the shipment never showed up. They claimed pirates raided their ship and took our supplies, but it turns out that story’s 100% ranta dung.

Lying to back out of our deal can’t go unanswered and you’re going to make that message abundantly clear. [TargetName] was recently seen with an escort at [Location]. As long as you kill [TargetName], we don’t care what happens to the cargo they’re hauling. 

- Smokey

contracts.title: Expel Claimjumpers
contracts.description:
POSTING: Security / Mercenary 
LOCATION: [LagrangeLocation]
WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus)
TERMS*: 
A recently acquired Shubin Interstellar mining claim awaiting processing was discovered to have been jumped by a rogue mining outfit who are actively stealing ore from the site.  While local authorities have been notified, there is concern that valuable assets may be harvested before an official investigation can be launched.

Therefore, as is our right as claim holders, we wish to secure a mercenary force to go to [Location] and destroy the several orbital sentries that are protecting this illegal operation. Caution is advised as there may still be a few illegal miners at the location along with any reinforcements they muster. 




*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Eradicate Eavesdroppers
contracts.description:
Headhunters are looking for a merc to do a little clean up for us. Found out that someone’s trying to spy on us over at [location]. Can’t let that stand. We need a skilled operator to take care of the orbital sentries they dropped there, and if needed, deal with any of their ships that get in your way. Seems like a decently run op, so hitting it might not be easy but it sure should be fun. 

Let us know if you’re the right one for the gig. Creds will be transferred once our scans show it’s gone. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Oslo Arlington
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.

While we we’re unable to positively confirm if the terminal was hacked by Oslo or not, we feel it is worth investigating.

Extremely intelligent, tech savvy and a renowned strategist, Oslo has proven difficult to capture in the past. If this lead does result in finding Oslo, a well coordinated tactical strike team would be advantageous to a successful engagement. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

contracts.title: Track Down Traitor
contracts.description:
XenoThreat has placed a kill order on [TargetName]. A known member of the Headhunters gang, [TargetName] has betrayed Humankind by being a known alien ally who associates with them in both a personal and business capacity. XenoThreat wants these traitorous associations stopped immediately before they bring more alien influence to Pyro. We’ll pay anyone who successfully tracks down and assassinates [TargetName] for these crimes against Humanity.  

LOCATION UPDATE: [TargetName] was recently spotted with an escort at [Location]. 

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Payback
contracts.description:
XenoThreat recently hit a Headhunters' stronghold. I’ll spare you the details, but they did some truly heinous shit to our crew. We’ve identified the leader of the op as [TargetName] and are looking for a little payback. We don’t care what you do to get the job done. Only that [TargetName] is dead. 

A source just told us that you can track down this XenoThreat scum over at [Location]. This sicko’s a pro and never travels alone, so don’t expect taking them out to be a walk in the park.  

Stows out.

contracts.title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington was flagged by automated security systems at an R&R after being involved in a drunken brawl. Weepy was able to clear the station before response teams arrived, but we have been able to track him down to where we currently think he’s holed up.

Weepy is gang leader Maltrox Arlington’s uncle and main enforcer. His anger issues combined with a long history of substance abuse make him a true wildcard. Expect him to put up significant resistance when cornered by you and your mustered forces.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

We have received word that Nicks Cantwell, long-time acquaintance and confident of Maltrox Arlington, was spotted trying to purchase a high-density mining laser, the kind frequently used in past ship-jacking attempts to strategically breach hulls. We have provided coordinates for Nicks’ last known location.  

Nicks is a highly regarded munitions expert among criminal circles and often leaves a path of destruction in his wake. It is advised to bring an increased level of firepower to this encounter.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Bounty Issued: [TargetName]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Silence Spying Op
contracts.description:
The Rough & Ready crew is looking for someone to handle a delicate situation. We’ve discovered a ship and orbital sentries at [location] spyin’ on us. We’re in a bit of a bind because we don’t want to start a larger fight with whoever’s behind this. That’s why we’re looking for some hired help who can quickly and discreetly take care of it for us. Interested?

Last thing, once you’re out there, make sure to keep an eye on that ship. Bet as soon as you start blowin’ up their sentries they’re gonna try to bring in some help to stop you.
 
- Smokey

contracts.title: Remove Claimjumpers
contracts.description:
POSTING: Security / Mercenary 
LOCATION: [LagrangeLocation]
WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus)
TERMS*: 
We just received word that a Shubin contractor was chased off one of our claims by outlaws who are operating there illegally. Further complicating matters, they have set up a few orbital sentries to protect themselves while they mine. 

Our hope is to contract with a mercenary who can search for and destroy the sentries at [location]. If you do encounter an illegal miner at the site, be mindful that it is common practice for these types to contact reinforcements for assistance. It might be better to neutralize them as quickly as possible before they can do so. 




*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Silence Sentries
contracts.description:
Our resistance movement is growing by the day, but that comes with some unwanted attention.  Recent scans discovered orbital sentries at [location] and a ship running a patrol pattern. We believe this is part of an espionage campaign targeting XenoThreat, most likely funded by the UEE. 

We’re looking for an experienced merc willing to destroy the sentries ASAP.  Since they already have eyes and ears on us, sending in someone from outside the org would draw less attention. If you take the gig, you’ll be paid promptly once the sentries are destroyed.
 
Now, while the patrol ship isn’t the main target, we suspect that if it escapes it might have reinforcements in reserve. Might be smart to deal with it promptly. 

If you decide to help us, XenoThreat will remember you’re someone willing to fight for what’s right.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Double Dealing
contracts.description:
Rough & Ready recently provided fueling services for a hauler named [TargetName], who agreed to deliver their next load of supplies to us as compensation. Well, we just found out that the lying skag sold their latest shipment to a rival gang instead. 

We’re looking for someone to track down and eliminate [TargetName] for the double cross. 

An old friend of mine just spotted the skag at [Location]. Looks like they're loaded with more cargo that’s not coming our way, and traveling with an escort. We’re only paying you to take out the ship, so anything you find aboard is yours to keep.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Eliminate Eavesdroppers
contracts.description:
Some numbskull is trying to dig up dirt on the Headhunters. Some orbital sentries were dropped at [location] to spy on us. We’ve also spotted a ship checking on them. Simple proposition for you. Go wipe out the sentries there and we’ll pay you for it. That sound like something you’d be into?

As for the ship, you can do whatever you want with it, but if it spots you, don’t be surprised if it tries to go get some back up. That’s just how these things go.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Parting Gift
contracts.description:
I have a delicate situation that needs handling. After years of being a loyal member of Rough & Ready, [TargetName] defected from the gang and is out there shopping secrets to our rivals. We need [TargetName] ghosted immediately. 

With stuff like this, I’ve found it’s always better to pay someone unassociated with us to do the deed. Scans picked up [TargetName] near [Location] not too long ago. We’ll pay you well to head there now and take care ‘em for us. 

[TargetName] isn’t an idiot and knows we’ll be coming after ‘em. Be prepared for a helluva fight and don’t expect ‘em to be alone.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Collection Notice
contracts.description:
[TargetName] borrowed a bunch of creds from the Headhunters and thought the smart move was to try and hide instead of paying us back, so I need someone to make an example of [TargetName].

They were just spotted at [Location], so I’d recommend heading there now before the trail goes cold. [TargetName] is a paranoid sort, so don’t be surprised if they’re not alone. Handle it however you want as long as [TargetName] is dust when you’re done.   

Stows out.

contracts.title: Track Down Gang Member
contracts.description:
XenoThreat has placed a kill order on [TargetName]. As a Clips level member of the Headhunters gang, [TargetName] has led operations that have targeted XenoThreat operatives, missions, and infrastructure. For these transgressions, XenoThreat will pay anyone who successfully tracks down and assassinates [TargetName].  

LOCATION UPDATE: [TargetName] was seen near [Location] not too long ago.  If you decide to accept this contract, you should head to the coordinates immediately. [TargetName] knows we’re looking for ‘em and has been traveling with an escort recently. Don’t be surprised if they’re not alone.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Preemptive Strike
contracts.description:
Headhunters got word there’s a XenoThreat op in the works that's targeting one of our crews. We don’t have precise details about the plan but we know that [TargetName] is organizing it. Instead of sitting back and waiting for something to happen, we’ve decided to be proactive. 

[TargetName] was just spotted with others around [Location]. We can’t mobilize anyone fast enough to get there. I want you to rush there and deliver a preemptive strike.   

Stows out.

Les is an experienced pilot who has been flying for almost as long as they’ve been walking and usually serves as the gang’s get-away pilot. It may be worthwhile to bring extra support ships in order to cut off any attempts at escape.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target.

contracts.title: Past Due
contracts.description:
Time is up for [TargetName]. The skav is way past due on paying back the Headhunters, so I need you to punch them out. 

Kill ‘em, not hit ‘em, just in case that’s unclear. 

Someone recently spotted [TargetName] around [Location], so head there and take ‘em out.  

Full disclosure, we’ve gotten reports they used some of our creds to hire extra protection. Prepare accordingly. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Long Overdue
contracts.description:
Rough & Ready have been in business with [TargetName] for years but that relationship has taken a turn for the worse. For a while, we were supplying them with fuel on credit but when it came time to collect the coward went into hiding. If [TargetName] can’t pay with creds, guess they’re gonna pay with their life.

An associate just clocked [TargetName] at [Location]. I’d love for you to head there now to make the stingy bastard pay.

By the way, it looks like [TargetName] isn’t traveling alone, so I’d make sure you’re fully stocked before going after ‘em. 

- Smokey

contracts.title: Revenge 01 (WIP)
contracts.description: Mission description (WIP)

contracts.title: Tracker License Certification
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TargetName] 
SYSTEM: [System]
RISK ASSESSMENT: Moderate
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [Location]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: With the progress you have made in developing your skills, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn your full Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Moderate-Risk Targets (MRT). These criminals traditionally fly medium-sized ships with several escorts. This class of outlaws make up a bulk of the contracts that typical bounty hunters will encounter.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a MRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TargetName]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[Location]</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Another Chance to Impress
contracts.description:
It is not often in life that we get another chance to make a first impression, but I am going to provide to you with just that.

To say I was disappointed in how things last transpired on your last assassination attempt would be a severe understatement. However, here is your chance to prove yourself capable of more. 

Kill [TargetName] over at [Location] and I will consider the slate wiped clean. 

Sincerely,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Deadbeat
contracts.description:
The Headhunters recently loaned credits to [TargetName] under some clear conditions. Specifically, pay us back or we’ll kill you. Wild to think that wasn’t enough of an incentive, but here we are past the payment deadline. Now as much as we like [TargetName], I need you to make good on our promise.

[TargetName] was last seen at [Location]. Track ‘em down, ghost ‘em, and get paid. It’s as simple as that. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Strike Saboteur
contracts.description:
Interested in doing a little hunting? 

[TargetName] sabotaged one of our fuel shipments and cost us a ton of creds, so I’m looking for someone to make ‘em pay for what they did. Just got word [TargetName] was spotted at [Location]. If you head there now, there’s a good chance you can pick up their trail and take ‘em out for good. 

[TargetName] didn’t work alone, so don’t be surprised if they’re traveling with extra protection.

- Smokey

contracts.description: [Contractor]

ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend the low-risk target [TargetName] from [Location]. 

A low-risk target typically pilots a single seater craft, has several known allies, and should be straightforward to apprehend.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Bounty Hunters Guild membership and appropriate certification.
• Access to vehicle suitably outfitted for combat.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: [TargetName] (LRT)
contracts.description:
ATTN: Bounty Hunters

Bounty came in for a low-risk target by the name of [TargetName]. The target themselves isn’t all that much to worry about, but it seems that they typically fly in a pack, so there’s a high chance they’ll have a few friends along when you track them down.

Speaking of, I’d start the hunt over at [Location] since we have reports of them being spotted in the area.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Clear Claimjumpers
contracts.description:
POSTING: Security / Mercenary 
LOCATION: [LagrangeLocation]
WORK EXPERIENCE: Combat Pilot (Military Experience a Plus)
TERMS*: 
It was recently discovered that a Shubin mining claim has been illegally poached by a rogue miner. While the miner themselves seems to no longer be stealing ore from the site, they did leave behind an orbital sentry which is preventing us from reclaiming it thanks to its offensive capabilities.

We are looking for a mercenary willing to travel to [location] hunt down the sentry and destroy it in preparation for Shubin repossession of the site.




*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.description: XTvsHH_bounty_Pyro1_desc

contracts.title: XenoThreat
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Vaughn
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Group Warrant Issued
contracts.description:
CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = [Contractor]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

In relation to a jointly committed crime, a group warrant has been issued for:
     [Target1]
     [Target2]
     [Target3]

It is currently believed that they are no longer traveling together in order to evade capture, and may soon flee the system.  You should strongly consider recruiting additional help in order to execute all the warrants in the limited time frame. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the targets. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract when all targets have been dealt with in the allotted time.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Surveillance Termination
contracts.description:
It seems our struggle to free Humanity has got the government lapdogs back on Earth feeling nervous. Recent scans discovered an orbital sentry at [location] that we believe is part of an UEE espionage campaign. Good credits says they’re handing the data direct to the slinks themselves. 

Only one sentry has been detected so far, but who knows how big the operation will grow if it’s not taken off-line. Shouldn’t be too much trouble for a skilled merc. If that sounds like you, payment will be sent promptly once the sentry is destroyed. Plus, XenoThreat will remember that you’re someone willing to fight for what’s right.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Northrock Service Group
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Stop Spying Op
contracts.description:
My associates and I have found ourselves in a little predicament and could use some help. There’s an orbital sentry at [location] that’s spying on us. We don’t know who put it there, but it sure as hell can’t stay. 

Thing is we’re business minded folks first and foremost and worry that if we blow it up ourselves it’ll start shit. That’s why it’s better if someone like you does it. Should be a quick and easy gig for someone interested in earning some creds.   

- Smokey

contracts.title: Verified Freelancer Bounty Assessment
contracts.description:
In an effort to increase the safety of Crusader and its environs, Crusader Security is seeking qualified individuals to assist with the collection of bounties in the area. 

We have evaluated that you possess the skill set needed and as such, we would like to offer you an initial trial bounty contract for [TargetName] last seen at [Location]. 

Upon the successful completion of this contract, you will be placed on Crusader's Verified Freelancer list and be eligible for any future bounty collection work as it becomes available.


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT

CONTRACT: Bounty Collection
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: [Contractor]
RISK ASSESSMENT: [Danger]
RUSH CONTRACT: [Contractor]

After repeated and continual misdemeanor offenses, a bounty has been issued for the following individual - [TargetName].
 
To evaluate your potential in assisting in the capture of more elusive criminals, Hurston Dynamics will be evaluating your ability to locate and apprehend [TargetName] by any means at your disposal. The latest intel on [TargetName]'s current whereabouts has them last seen at [Location].

Payment will be released only after the bounty is dealt with. 
 

** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: BlacJac Bounty Trial Contract
contracts.description:
ATTN: Former BlacJac Bounty Hunter

I know your last sting bounty hunting for BlacJac didn’t go well, but a soaring caseload means that you are lucky enough to get another chance.

If you're able to complete the bounty on [TargetName] over at [Location] then we can see about getting you reinstated.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Bounty Apprehension Reevaluation
contracts.description:

While your past performance has not been to our standards, microTech Protection Services has decided to offer you a chance to redeem yourself. 

To reevaluate your skills, we would like you to apprehend [TargetName] from [Location].

• Access to vehicle suitably outfitted for combat.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: [TargetName] (VLRT)
contracts.description:
ATTN: Bounty Hunters

Got a very low-risk target I need you to take care of: [TargetName].

Their last known location was [Location].

This is a low threat bounty, so I expect you to be able to clear it pretty fast. They typically fly a small ship and don’t have very many known acquaintances. It doesn't get much more straightforward than that.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.description:

First though, we are required to reevaluate you, and as such, would like you to complete this bounty contract for [TargetName].

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a VLRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TargetName]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[Location]</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: A Chance to Impress
contracts.description:
Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. 

People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go.

I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. 
 
If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. 

Seek out and discreetly kill [TargetName] over at [Location].

Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
Hey,

The refinery at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> has been busy. They’ve processed a mix of refined ores and are looking to get the containers (<EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize]</EM4> or smaller) shipped out from a freight elevator. I just checked with the LEOs to see where this stuff is needed and was able to put together this run.  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SingleToMultiToken]

Should be an easy run for you, if you’re free. 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[Contractor]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:

The folks at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> have what I like to call a “pilot’s special” waiting to be distributed - a haul of quantum fuel, hydrogen fuel, and ship ammo. Load it up from a freight elevator and deliver it to the following spots in whatever order works best for you. Expect the containers to all be <EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize]</EM4> or smaller.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
Hi there,

There’s a few sites on ArcCorp that need their waste and scrap collected (all boxes <EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize]</EM4> or smaller) and taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. Doesn’t matter what order you do the run, as long as you grab it all.    

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[MultiToSingleToken]

You know, my mom was a hauler who specialized in runs like this. It might not be the most glamorous stuff, but she claimed these runs had the best pay-to-risk ratio. Pirates never gave her any trouble when they found out what was on board.  

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[Contractor]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Once collected, everything needs to get to a freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. They've said that all the containers will be at most <EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize]</EM4> in size. Sound like something you could handle? 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[Contractor]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Covalex Cargo Hauling Re-evaluation
contracts.description:
Hey,

Have a bit of good news for you. Covalex recently finished an evaluation of our contractor pool, and decided to reconsider your status as a cargo hauler. To requalify, all you need is to successfully complete the following delivery.

Pick up <EM4>[Item]</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> and deliver it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. In order to complete this haul in a fast and efficient manner, you'll need a ship that can haul <EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize] cargo containers</EM4>.

Hopefully everything goes smoothly so we can welcome you back to the team.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Rank - Direct [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Opportunity for Independent Cargo Hauler
contracts.description:
Earning such accolades as 'Imperial Finances' Top 10 Shipping Companies' and 'Delivery Digest's 2945's Most Trusted Transport,' Covalex is busier than ever. And that means more cargo going to more places. That's where you come in.  

Covalex is looking for dependable and industrious pilots to join our expanding family. Do you have access to a ship that can hold <EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize] cargo containers</EM4>? Can you pass an Advocacy background check if required? Then a universe of opportunity is waiting for you. 

Simply complete an 'Evaluation Trial’ by picking up a shipment of <EM4>[Item]</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> and successfully delivering it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>.

Upon satisfactory completion, you'll be eligible to become part of Covalex Shipping's vast network of independent transport specialists*.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   


Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







*Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>[MissionMaxSCUSize]</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[MultiToSingleToken]

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. One of their workers told me that the company did a cost-benefit analysis on it decades ago that determined it wasn’t worth putting a planet-wide system in place to facilitate it. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?   

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[Contractor]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such.
