contracts.title: inventory clear out
contracts.description:
A client of mine‘s trying to negotiate a deal, but isn’t having much luck. The other party feels like they got all the leverage because they’re sitting comfortably on a pile of inventory. To help move the negotiations along, I’m gonna need you to head down to [Location] and destroy all the drugs on site. 

Now, I should probably tell you that the site’s being protected by some very serious people, so getting to the stash is going to be a bit tricky, but I trust you’ll find a way.

contracts.title: Destroy Deadly Contraband
contracts.description:
A fledgling syndicate have set up shop over at [Location] and have been trying their hand at cracking into the drug market. Unfortunately, their product has been linked to several deaths in and around Crusader. With how potent this stuff is, it’s posing a serious threat to the public. 

Crusader is working to take down the whole operation, but as long as their product is circulating, the bodies are starting to pile up. 

We want you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there before they get a chance to sell it. However, you should expect their stash to be extremely well guarded.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Destroy Dangerous Drugs
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

Some enterprising chemists have cooked up a new product that is twice as potent and twice as deadly as the normal stuff. We were able to trace some samples back to the source over at [Location]. 

BlacJac wants you to head down ASAP to destroy the entire batch before it can hurt any more of the population. We can worry about making arrests later.

From everything we know about this crew, you should expect to meet heavy resistance while attempting to clear out the stash.


Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Clear Site of Narcotics
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary or security professional to report to [Location] and destroy the narcotics being stored there. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Clear the site of narcotics; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• No ongoing addiction issues.

contracts.title: out of stock
contracts.description:
One of my clients has been unhappy to learn that someone's been muscling in on their territory. Now rather than going down the more traditional route of killing some people and starting a whole thing, they’ve opted to send a different kind of message instead.

You’re gonna go down to [Location] and destroy all the drugs on site. 

Of course, if someone does wanna pick a fight with you, feel free to defend yourself, but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

contracts.title: Clear Site of Drugs
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary or security professional to report to [Location] and destroy the drugs being stored there. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Clear the site of drugs; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• No ongoing addiction issues.

contracts.title: Clear Out Drugs
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

We got word that a syndicate spiked a rival’s drug package and its causing chaos on the streets. Forensics have identified the source, a production facility over at [Location]. Word is the drug manufacturers don’t even know they have a poisoned crop on their hands.

We’re sorting through how to handle the arrests, but the important thing is to get this crap off the streets now. I need you to get down there and destroy the drugs they’re storing on site.

They won’t be happy about it, so you’ll probably have a fight on your hands, but the important thing is clearing out the product.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Destroy Toxic Narcotics
contracts.description:
We’ve been investigating a recent bout of OD’s and they all seem to have originated with a bad batch of drugs made over at [Location]. 

I’m working with other contractors to ferret out those responsible, but people are dying as long is the product is still out there. 

I want you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there. Should buy us some time before we shut them down for good.

They will have guards protecting their supply, so be prepared to engage with hostiles.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: limited supply
contracts.description:
Seems there’s a new upstart in the sector who hasn’t been paying the right dues to the right people. To teach them a little lesson, my client wants you to go down to [Location] and destroy all the drugs on site.

The low-level lugs they got on site will probably make a stink about it and try to stop you. Handle them however you want but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

contracts.title: Destroy Illegal Drugs
contracts.description:
We’ve discovered that a group is trying to start up their own drug business over at [Location]. While they seem to be your average low-level thugs, the product they’re producing is toxic and responsible for the deaths of multiple civilians, so we can’t afford to allow any more to be sold.

We’re are working on a larger operation that will shut them down for good, but in the meanwhile we need to stop the flow of their drugs. That’s why Crusader wants you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there.

They will undoubtedly have guards protecting the stash, but I don’t expect them to be too much of a threat.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Clear Site of Contraband
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary or security professional to report to [Location] and destroy the contraband being stored there. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Clear the site of contraband; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• No ongoing addiction issues.

contracts.title: Wipe Out Drug Stash
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

It seems there’s a new operator trying their hand at manufacturing drugs over at [Location], but the product they’re putting out is extremely toxic. 

We’re sorting through how to handle the arrests, but the important thing is to prevent any more of their supply getting distributed. I need you to get down there and destroy the drugs they’re storing on site.

There's a good chance the facility isn't abandoned, so you might run into these thugs when you head down there, so be ready for a fight. But if their gun skills are anything like their chemistry, it probably won’t be much of one. 

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Permanently Delete
contracts.description:
The slimy little cretins over at [Location] have been selling us trash data all while trying to double deal. Can’t let it stand.

We want you to go teach them one final lesson and wipe out all the cowards you can find. Last I heard is they were holed up over near the [Location]. 

Spill their blood, and we’ll fill your wallet. 

-Bit Zeros

contracts.title: They Will Be Missed
contracts.description:
A senior security official by the name of [TargetName] has been marked for termination. While they can be found at [Location], they will not be easy to get to. I fear that a bit of work will be required to draw them out.  

Normally, I would recommend killing enough of their underlings that they will be forced to face you personally. However, in this instance a more delicate touch is required. While you should feel free to eliminate any and all of the security forces on site, you must ensure the safety of all the civilian workers there.

Tiresome for sure, but a requirement none the less. 

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: They Will Be Missed
contracts.description:
A senior security official by the name of [TargetName] is about to have their long career come to a very violent and sudden end. While they are currently at [Location], they will not be easy to get to. I fear that a bit of work will be required to draw them out.  

I recommend killing enough of their underlings that they will be forced to face you personally. Of course, once they do decide to finally show their face, it should be a rather straightforward matter. 

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Scrap [TargetName]
contracts.description: I ain’t got time to waste so I’ll get straight to the point - [TargetName] needs to be dead and I want you to do it. You can find them over near the [Location] at [Location]. They won’t be alone, but don’t get distracted by those other useless piles. You only get paid for taking out [TargetName].

contracts.title: [TargetName]’s Time Has Come
contracts.description:
We’ve had our sights set on taking out [TargetName] for a while now, but we’ve never been able to find the right moment. Enough waiting. You’re going to create the right moment for us.

Head to [Location] and take out a bunch of lowlifes running around the [Location]. Kill enough of those losers, and [TargetName] will have no choice but to come face you themselves. That’s when you take ‘em out and earn yourself a nice fat payday.

contracts.title: Server Not Found
contracts.description:
Hey,

Got a problem we could use your help on. One of our former new-recruits did a complete crap job on a hack and wound up leaving a digital footprint so messy that it might as well be a full confession. 

A remote deletion’s not going to be good enough so I want you to go to [Location] and make sure their data servers are wiped from existence.

As if this wasn’t a big enough of a mess already, the access codes to the locked server room door are only stored physically on site. That means you’re going to have to liberate a datapad with the code on it first before you can even get close to them.

Don’t worry though. I’ll make sure the creds are worth all the hassle.  

- Bit Zeros

contracts.title: Unwanted Guests
contracts.description:
We got some outlaws overstaying their welcome on one of our stations. They tried to pull a fast one on us but now they’re trapped in [location]. We need you to clear ‘em out. 

Rough & Ready doesn’t want a single one of them left alive when you’re through. Don’t care how messy it gets as long as it gets done, got it?

- Smokey

contracts.title: Bounty Assignment: [TargetName] (HRT)
contracts.description:
Hey, 

Got a contract for you that requires a bit more tactics than usual. A high-level criminal by the name [TargetName] is hiding with a large contingent of outlaws at [Location]. 

Our intel suggests that [TargetName]’s forces most likely will act as defensive line in order to protect their boss. My best guess is that you will have to deal with them before you gain access to [TargetName].

That said, I don’t want you shooting indiscriminately. Sometimes these outlaws keep civilians around and they should be treated like non-combatants.

Best of luck,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: All Things Come To An End
contracts.description:
I am not sure if you’re acquainted with [Location], but [TargetName] is the one who calls the shots there. I need them eliminated.

That is easier said then done, I'm afraid. They are notoriously reluctant to see to matters personally, preferring their underlings to handle the dirty work. That said, eliminate enough of the underlings and they will have no choice but to deal with you themselves.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Bounty Assignment: [TargetName] (HRT)
contracts.description:
Hey, 

Have an interesting bounty for you. A high level criminal by the name [TargetName] has been located at [Location]. 

Based on our intel, its highly unlikely that the target’s going to be sitting and waiting out in the open. You most likely will have to infiltrate the facility and draw them out. 

Something like a large firefight should be enough to do the trick. 

Best of luck,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Demolition Mission
contracts.description:
I’m looking to send a strong message to the crew over at [Location] and know the perfect way to do it - property damage.

All you need to do is head on over, destroy a few things here and there, and really drive home an important lesson about respecting your betters. 

Do that for me and I’ll be feeling very happy. And generous.

Interested?

contracts.title: Apprehend Bounty: [TargetName] (HRT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend [TargetName] who has so far been able to evade capture. They are coordinating an active raid at [Location], and we believe that they may finally be lured out of hiding if their forces there attacking the [Location] are faced with strong enough resistance. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]’s criminal associates near the [Location] to draw the target into the open.
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force if necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Bounty Located: [TargetName] (MRT)
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Bounty Collection
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Davik
RISK ASSESSMENT: Moderate Risk Target

Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for [TargetName]. Intel reports have tracked the target to [Location] where they were last seen near the [Location]. 

Be prepared for them to resist apprehension and for the use of lethal force if required.

Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete.
 



** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Hit 'Em Where it Hurts
contracts.description:
The muckers over at [Location] decided that it would be a good idea to interfere with our business, and now we need to let them know unequivocally that they were mistaken. 

A little bit of sniffin’ through their data and we were able to sus out where the idiots keep their stash. Now all we need you to do is head over there and destroy every last bit of it. 

Figure that should drive the point home.

- Bit Zeros

contracts.title: live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge
contracts.description: Everybody holds grudges, right? I mean, when you get popped pulling a crime, I get that you’re a little sour, but that’s pretty much the game, right?

contracts.title: Guard Site Against Dangerous Hostiles
contracts.description:
Crusader Security has learned that [Location] is currently being threatened by a well-known gang operating in the area and we’re looking to hire an experienced security team to deal with any attacks. 

Try to make sure that whoever you bring along is properly qualified. You’re going to need all the help you can get to deal with this group.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: makin’ a mess
contracts.description:
This is a bit aggressive for my taste, but credits are credits, right?

Got a client who's looking for a highly motivated individual to head over to [Location] and kill everyone who’s there. 

Basically, start shooting and don’t stop. You'll get paid once the site's clear.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS

CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: R. Russel
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High

A small syndicate have been using [Location] to manufacture large quantities of highly dangerous narcotics. Hurston Security is seeking a contractor to go to the facility and eliminate all the contraband being stored there.

Payment will be sent once all the contraband is eliminated.

It is strongly recommended that you do not attempt to do this contract solo. Hiring a team of skilled mercenaries to provide support would be the smartest route.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.description:
Crusader Security has learned that [Location] is currently being threatened by a group of criminals and we’re looking to hire a contractor to put together a security team to repel any attacks. 

I know you may be tempted to try to handle this on your own, but you need to put a team together for this. Trust me, the credits aren’t worth it to try it solo.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Unwanted Guests
contracts.description:
We got some outlaws overstaying their welcome on one of our stations. They tried to pull a fast one on us but now they’re trapped in [location]. We need you to clear ‘em out. 

Rough & Ready doesn’t want a single one of them left alive when you’re through. Don’t care how messy it gets as long as it gets done, got it?

- Smokey

contracts.title: good help’s hard to find
contracts.description:
I know someone who’s looking to start up a new business, but they’re having a hard time hiring the skilled workers they need.

Now the thing is, they found the perfect crew over at [Location], but the people they work for won’t let them go. Even hired extra armed guards to make sure of it.

What I want you to do, is go there and kill all the guards while making sure all the workers remain unharmed.

contracts.title: Eliminate Drug Stash
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS
OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT

CONTRACT: Contraband Elimination

contracts.description:

We’ve gotten word that some local muscle have been making threats against [Location]. BlacJac is looking to have you put a team together and protect the site from these hostile threats.

And as much as we all love credits, I don’t recommend trying to do this one solo. Hiring a team to come along would be beneficial to your livelihood.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: too many cooks
contracts.description:
A client is getting out produced by a new competitor and is looking to throw a wrench into the works.

You’re going to head to [Location] and kill all the civies who work there. 

Do what you want with the gun-toting goons guarding the workers, but remember that they aren’t the priority.

contracts.title: Scrap [TargetName]
contracts.description: I ain’t got time to waste so I’ll get straight to the point - [TargetName] needs to be dead and I want you to do it. You can find them over near the [Location] at [Location]. They won’t be alone, but don’t get distracted by those other useless piles. You only get paid for taking out [TargetName].

contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Neutralize Hostile Force
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Dalik
RISK ASSESSMENT: High

Our security forces have been notified of an ongoing outlaw incursion at [Location], and we are in need of an independent operator capable of clearing out the hostile actors. 

According to onsite personnel, the outlaws are currently holed up near the [Location]. Approach with caution and be prepared to use lethal force if the outlaws resist being removed.

Payment will only be authorized once the location has been effectively cleared.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Remove Hostile Force
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of the outlaw group who have temporarily gained control of the [Location] at [Location].

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Remove all members of the hostile outlaw force; using force as necessary. 

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

contracts.title: Up in Smoke
contracts.description:
We’ve been trying to access some sensitive data over at [Location] but there seems to only be one backdoor we can use. The issue is we need someone onsite to trigger it. And I really do mean trigger it.

If you can head over there and destroy part of their infrastructure, the emergency back up systems will kick online and we should be able to access everything we want. 

Wish I could see the surprise look on the faces of the lowlifes running the place when it happens.

-Bit Zeros

contracts.title: Active Bounty: [TargetName] (MRT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend [TargetName] from [Location]. They were recently spotted near the [Location] and are believed to still be in that area.

While there may be other criminals active at the site, your main focus should be on completing the bounty.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS

• Available for immediate deployment.

• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

One of the sites under BlacJac’s purview has been clashing with a few local outlaws. We would like you to head down to [Location] and secure the site from these hostile threats.

From the early reports, I expect this will be a fairly straightforward matter, but if it makes you feel better, feel free to recruit a team to provide you with extra support.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Defend Location Against Minor Threats
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can assemble a security team in order to protect [Location] against any minor threats.

This gang has a bit of a record, but they’re still pretty green overall. I expect it will be relatively straightforward for you and your team to handle.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Remove Illegal Occupants

microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented security professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of illegal occupants who have temporarily gained control of [Location].

In order to put a stop to this "nest of criminals," we are seeking a contractor to go to the site and clear all the occupants. By force if necessary.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Remove Hostile Force
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of the outlaw group who have temporarily gained control of the [Location] at [Location].

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Remove all members of the hostile outlaw force; using force as necessary. 

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

contracts.title: Apprehend Bounty: [TargetName] (HRT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend [TargetName] who has so far been able to evade capture. They are coordinating an active raid at [Location], and we believe that they may finally be lured out of hiding if their forces there attacking the [Location] are faced with strong enough resistance. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]’s criminal associates near the [Location] to draw the target into the open.
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force if necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Elusive Bounty: [TargetName] (HRT)
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Bounty Collection
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao
RISK ASSESSMENT: High Risk Target (Armed Support)

Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for [TargetName]. This bounty has proven extremely elusive so far, but intel reports have tracked the target and a cohort of their known associates to [Location]. 

However, there is a strong chance that [TargetName] will not risk a confrontation unless absolutely forced to. It is our recommendation that you neutralize a significant portion of the criminal’s allies first in order to draw them out. The report indicates that a large party of these hostiles are currently near the [Location].

Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Major Malfunction
contracts.description:
I won’t go into the whole long boring story of why, but there are a few bits of [Location] that we need destroyed. The important part is that I want to pay you a hefty chunk of credits to do it. I almost feel like you should be paying us for this because of how fun it’s going to be.

Don’t even care how you get it done. Grenades, rocket launcher, day old Torpedo Burrito, it’s all the same to us.

-Bit Zeros

contracts.title: Neutralize Outlaw Incursion
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Neutralize Hostile Force
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Dalik
RISK ASSESSMENT: High

Our security forces have been notified of an ongoing outlaw incursion at [Location], and we are in need of an independent operator capable of clearing out the hostile actors. 

According to onsite personnel, the outlaws are currently holed up near the [Location]. Approach with caution and be prepared to use lethal force if the outlaws resist being removed.

Payment will only be authorized once the location has been effectively cleared.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: They Will Be Missed
contracts.description:
A security officer by the name of [TargetName] is in desperate need of an early retirement. They are currently stationed at [Location] along with a host of other eager types in uniforms. 

Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of [TargetName] which will earn you my credit and thanks.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Clear Out Site
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

We’ve gotten word that [Location] is being used by some local criminals as base of operations. BlacJac is looking to have you sweep the site and clear out any hostiles. 

Our early reports show that there’s a good chance that the gang will have some civilians working for them on-site. We're not looking to be making headlines here, so try to remember that you are only cleared to engage with confirmed hostiles. 

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Evict Illegal Occupants
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS
OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT

CONTRACT: Facility Sweep
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: K. Restle
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
RUSH CONTRACT: No

Hurston is seeking a contractor willing to clear out criminal occupants from [Location].

The site has been used to host numerous illegal activities, so it is imperative that it is secured. 

Note that you are only cleared to engage with confirmed hostiles. Assaulting any civilians at the site will be considered a violation of your contract. 

Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be clear. 



** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Remove Illegal Occupants
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of illegal occupants who have temporarily gained control of [Location].

Be aware that our intel shows there are civilian workers onsite. Since their connection with the gang is unclear, they should be considered non-combatants. Any hostile action towards them will not be tolerated. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Remove all hostile occupants found within the site; using force if necessary.
• Ensure the safety of any civilians who may be onsite. 

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

contracts.title: Clear Criminal Nest
contracts.description:
Crusader Security has learned that [Location] is currently being used as a base of operations for numerous illegal activities.

In order to put a stop to this "nest of criminals," we are seeking a contractor to go to the site and clear all the hostile elements. By force if necessary.

And just so you know, sometimes gangs like this will bring in civilians to do work for them, often through coercion. This should go without saying, but if you see any civilians they are to be protected. Crusader Security cannot have one of their contractors going around indiscriminately shooting people.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: [Contractor]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Eliminate_All_Pyro_Station_Title
contracts.description: Eliminate_All_Pyro_Station_Desc

contracts.title: Bounty Extraction: [TargetName] (MRT)
contracts.description:
We got lucky and some recent scans of [Location] have shown that an open bounty by the name of [TargetName] is hiding out there. You have been authorized to enter the site, find them, and resolve the bounty.

However, in addition to the bounty and their criminal accomplices, the site is likely to have civilians present as well. While we're eager to see [TargetName] dealt with, we can't have any civilian casualties. Use care when engaging with the hostiles. 

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Gibbs
ID# 91G66BW0

contracts.title: Wanted by ArcCorp: [TargetName] (?RT)
contracts.description:
ATTN: Bounty Hunters

Need you to grab a bounty by the name of [TargetName] at [Location]. While there may be other criminal accomplices at the scene, I want you to be mindful of any civilians or workers who might be there.

I got enough to deal with, so I don’t need to be explaining why a contractor shot a bunch of civilians.


Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Unwanted Guests
contracts.description:
We got some outlaws overstaying their welcome on one of our stations. They tried to pull a fast one on us but now they’re trapped in [location]. We need you to clear ‘em out. 

Rough & Ready doesn’t want a single one of them left alive when you’re through. Don’t care how messy it gets as long as it gets done, got it?

- Smokey

contracts.title: Active Bounty: [TargetName] (MRT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to assist in the apprehension of [TargetName] from [Location]. We are aware that there may be civilians on site, so please be mindful of possible crossfire.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force as necessary.
• Ensure no civilian casualties.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Bounty Hunters Guild membership and appropriate certification.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Entrenched Bounty: [TargetName] (MRT)
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS
OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT

CONTRACT: Bounty Collection
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: L. Paleski
RISK ASSESSMENT: Moderate Risk Target (Likely Armed Support)
RUSH CONTRACT: No

Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for [TargetName]. 

Intel reports have located the current whereabouts of the target to [Location].  While you are clear to engage with any criminals at the site as you see fit, any civilians at the location are to be protected.

Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete.
 

** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Extermination Job
contracts.description:
Rough & Ready has a rat problem. One of our crews tried to pull a little mutiny and now they’ve taken over [location].

Since I can’t be 100% sure they don’t have sympathizers onboard the station, I want you to handle putting down these traitors for me.

If you can clear out our little pest issue you’ll be paid handsomely. Just don’t leave a single one of them alive. Don’t want anyone else getting funny ideas.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Extermination Job
contracts.description:
Rough & Ready has a rat problem. One of our crews tried to pull a little mutiny and now they’ve taken over [location].

Since I can’t be 100% sure they don’t have sympathizers onboard the station, I want you to handle putting down these traitors for me.

If you can clear out our little pest issue you’ll be paid handsomely. Just don’t leave a single one of them alive. Don’t want anyone else getting funny ideas.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Unwanted Guests
contracts.description:
We got some outlaws overstaying their welcome on one of our stations. They tried to pull a fast one on us but now they’re trapped in [location]. We need you to clear ‘em out. 

Rough & Ready doesn’t want a single one of them left alive when you’re through. Don’t care how messy it gets as long as it gets done, got it?

- Smokey

contracts.title: Ripe for Retribution
contracts.description:
Some interesting information just fell into my lap. Guess the notorious XenoThreat leader [TargetName] is holed up at [location] working on some big op for them. Perfect opportunity to kill the piece of shit once and for all.

Thing is, the Xenos have their eyes all over Headhunter operations at the moment. There’s no way we can mobilize and deploy a crew without [TargetName] getting tipped off. So I’m offering you the chance to make Pyro a better place and earn some creds at the same time.

If interested, I suggest gearing up and finding some backup before heading out. You'll only get paid if you take out [TargetName], but don’t hesitate to kill any other little XenoThugs that might be hiding there with ‘em.  

Stows out.

contracts.title: Fight for a Free Pyro
contracts.description:
XenoThreat’s efforts to keep outside influences from infecting this system is being tested by a group that dares to call itself Citizens for Prosperity. A prominent group member, [TargetName], has established operations at [Location] and is already hard at work spreading their lies and propaganda to anyone that will listen. If we want Pyro to remain independent of UEE and alien influence, then something must be done about this now.  

That’s why XenoThreat is issuing a kill order for [TargetName]. And knowing how important they are to Citizens for Prosperity’s operations, I wouldn’t be surprised if you had to fight your way through a bunch of their most fanatical followers first before you even get a shot at them. But remember [TargetName] is your target, and payment hinges solely on you making sure they’re eliminated. 

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: [Contractor]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Head Hunting
contracts.description:
The Headhunters have assembled a special strike team whose sole purpose is to attack, disrupt, and undermine our operations. As much as I’m loath to admit it, they’ve had a few small successes and are quickly becoming a concern. 

XenoThreat knows the best way to kill a snake is by cutting off its head, so we’re issuing a kill order for the strike team’s commander [TargetName], who according to our intelligence sources, has been hiding at [Location] for a few days now. 

I’d expect strong resistance from the Headhunter forces there. From what we’ve heard, [TargetName] got this command partially because of the fierce loyalty they inspire in others. Putting your own crew together to tackle this would be a solid operational strategy. 

Happy Head Hunting,

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Kill Order: "Citizens" at [location]
contracts.description:
The group of instigators that calls itself “Citizens for Prosperity” can no longer be allowed to continue spreading their lies and propaganda without repercussion.

As a sharp reminder of who really controls Pyro we have issued a kill order to eradicate all “Citizen” presence at [location]. Resistance is likely, but we expect you to handle it with little difficulty. Do as directed and you’ll be paid well for your work.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: A Swift Reprisal
contracts.description:
Hey,

Some two-bit thugs are holed up in [Location]. Wouldn’t pay them any mind, except the arrogant skags tried to hit an outpost under our protection.

We chased 'em off with little trouble, but we can't let that kind of disrespect go unpunished. Our Clips are busy with some bigger fish, so we'd like you to take care of this for us. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Reputation Management
contracts.description:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from [Location]. We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: All Things Come To An End
contracts.description:
They say there is no honor among thieves. Today, it seems, you're targeting one of your own. 

Please head to [Location] and kill [TargetName]. What you do with the others there is entirely up to you.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Protect Site Trial Contract
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

BlacJac is seeking to expand our roster of security professionals. To evaluate if you’re a good match, we would like you to provide support at [Location] as they've been having issues with some hostiles in the area.

If you are able to assist in protecting the site and eliminating the threat, we will be able to offer you more security work.

Note that Friendly fire incidents will not be tolerated.

Good luck,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Security Work Reassessment
contracts.description:
Congrats! Crusader Security has decided to offer you another chance at being a security contractor. With a little bit of hard work and effort, the hope is that you can rise above any previous performance issues. 

First though, to reassess your viability, we would like you to assist Crusader Security in dealing with an outlaw group that have been making threats against [Location].

Now, since you’ve had performance issues in the past, I’m going to remind you that friendly fire will not be tolerated.

Upon the successful completion of this trial, you're eligibility will be restored and you'll once again be able to apply for security work with Crusader.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Security Work Assessment
contracts.description:
In an effort to increase the safety of Crusader and its environs, Crusader Security is seeking qualified individuals to assist with security work in the sector. 

We have determined that you possess the skill set needed to offer you an initial trial contract. You will be assisting Crusader Security in dealing with a small hostile group that has been making threats against [Location]. 

Please note that we already have security personnel on site, so you will have to be careful with regards to friendly fire.

Upon the successful completion of this contract, you'll become eligible to apply for any future security work as it becomes available.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Security Contractor Reevaluation
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS
OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT

CONTRACT: Facility Protection
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Spooner
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
RUSH CONTRACT: No

Our department performs periodic reevaluations of past security contractors and have determined that you may be a suitable candidate for possible reinstatement.

To reclaim your status, Hurston Security is seeking contractors to assist with eliminating a local criminal element threatening [Location].

Note that you are only cleared to engage with confirmed hostiles. Assaulting any security personnel at the site will result in a breach of contract.

Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be safe. Successful completion of this reevaluation will allow you to be considered for future work as a security contractor.



** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Protect Site
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

We’ve gotten word from the security team at [Location] that some of the local scum have been launching attacks. BlacJac is looking to have you go to the site and assist in protecting it from hostile threats.

Make sure you check your fire down there. I don't want to hear about any blue-on-blue incidents.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Security Contractor Evaluation
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is in need of new,  qualified, and detail-oriented security professionals to expand our existing roster. To evaluate your skills, we would like you to assist in protecting [Location] against hostile threats. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Help protect the site; using force as necessary.
• Avoid any friendly fire incidents.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

contracts.description:

CONTRACT: Facility Protection
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: T. Spooner
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
RUSH CONTRACT: No

The security personnel at [Location] is being threatened by a local criminal element and Hurston Security is seeking contractors to bolster their defenses and eliminate any hostiles who attempt to breach the site.

Note that you are only cleared to engage with confirmed hostiles. Assaulting any security personnel at the site will result in a breach of contract.

Payment will be sent once the facility is confirmed to be safe. 



** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Provide Backup
contracts.description:
Crusader Security has learned that [Location] is currently being threatened by a group of criminals.

While we have security personnel on site, we are looking to hire additional contractors to help them repel any attacks. 

Now, as a contractor, I’m not sure how used to working with a team you are, but I don’t want to hear anything about "friendly fire" or there’s going to be problems.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.description:

microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can quickly and safely assist the security team stationed at [Location] in protecting the site against hostile threats. 

Be aware that any friendly fire, accidental or otherwise, will not be tolerated. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Help the local security team protect the site; using force as necessary.
• Avoid any friendly fire incidents.

If you do a good job on this first one, there'll be more contracts to follow. 

Let's see how you do trying to deal with the bounty on [TargetName]. They're believed to be hiding over at [Location]. 

Thanks,

contracts.title: Extermination Job
contracts.description:
Rough & Ready has a rat problem. One of our crews tried to pull a little mutiny and now they’ve taken over [location].

Since I can’t be 100% sure they don’t have sympathizers onboard the station, I want you to handle putting down these traitors for me.

If you can clear out our little pest issue you’ll be paid handsomely. Just don’t leave a single one of them alive. Don’t want anyone else getting funny ideas.

- Smokey

contracts.title: out of stock
contracts.description:
One of my clients has been unhappy to learn that someone's been muscling in on their territory. Now rather than going down the more traditional route of killing some people and starting a whole thing, they’ve opted to send a different kind of message instead.

You’re gonna go down to [Location] and destroy all the drugs on site. 

Of course, if someone does wanna pick a fight with you, feel free to defend yourself, but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

contracts.title: Fuel to the Fire
contracts.description:
If you’re in the market for some easy credits, I’ve got an offer for you.

See, word on the vine is that [location] is operating as a fuel depot. They must not have gotten the memo that the fuel trade in Pyro belongs to Rough & Ready.

That’s why you’re going to make your way there and destroy their fuel reserves. They should be easy for you to spot. They’re the large yellow storage tanks dotted around the outpost. Watch out though, there are turret emplacements defending the area, so make sure you’re ready to dodge their shots or blow the guns sky high. 

I’ll leave it up to you how you handle the demo. Bombs would be my first choice, but I don’t care much as long as the gig gets done.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Destroy Toxic Narcotics
contracts.description:
We’ve been investigating a recent bout of OD’s and they all seem to have originated with a bad batch of drugs made over at [Location]. 

I’m working with other contractors to ferret out those responsible, but people are dying as long is the product is still out there. 

I want you to go the site and destroy the stash they have there. Should buy us some time before we shut them down for good.

They will have guards protecting their supply, so be prepared to engage with hostiles.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: [Contractor]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Total Server Wipe
contracts.description:
One of our datarunners went MIA while transporting vital operational information. A few hours ago, we determined that they were hit by a Headhunter raiding party and the contents of the ship’s datastores were transferred to their servers at [location]. 

While we have every reason to believe that our encryption will hold, we cannot take the risk that the contents of those files will be exposed. You are being ordered to head there and ensure our data remains private by destroying the Headhunter servers.

I strongly encourage thoroughness. Raze everything and everyone you can to the ground.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Clear Site of Drugs
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary or security professional to report to [Location] and destroy the drugs being stored there. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Clear the site of drugs; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• No ongoing addiction issues.

contracts.title: Clear Out Drugs
contracts.description:
ATTN: Verified Mercenary Operators

We got word that a syndicate spiked a rival’s drug package and its causing chaos on the streets. Forensics have identified the source, a production facility over at [Location]. Word is the drug manufacturers don’t even know they have a poisoned crop on their hands.

We’re sorting through how to handle the arrests, but the important thing is to get this crap off the streets now. I need you to get down there and destroy the drugs they’re storing on site.

They won’t be happy about it, so you’ll probably have a fight on your hands, but the important thing is clearing out the product.

Thanks,
Gloria Mesa

Private Contract Supervisor
BlacJac Security, "Protection Provided"

contracts.title: Eliminate Drug Stash
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS
OUTSOURCING DEPARTMENT

CONTRACT: Contraband Elimination
CONTRACTOR AFFILIATION: Independent
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: R. Russel
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
RUSH CONTRACT: No

Local criminals have been identified using [Location] to manufacture large quantities of illegal. Hurston Security requires a contractor to go to the facility and eliminate all contraband being stored there.

Payment will be sent once all the contraband is eliminated. 



** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination, or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Supply Line Sabotage
contracts.description:
The armchair “activists” of Citizens for Prosperity continue to try to spread their influence throughout the system. With your assistance, there is an opportunity to sever their operations at the roots.

The group is using [location] to distribute supplies to independents scattered around the planet. If we destroy the [ship] located there, their network will fall.

Bombardment would send a clear message, but I’ll leave it to you to decide the means of destruction.

Comm. Spec. Engler

contracts.title: Extermination Job
contracts.description:
Rough & Ready has a rat problem. One of our crews tried to pull a little mutiny and now they’ve taken over [location].

Since I can’t be 100% sure they don’t have sympathizers onboard the station, I want you to handle putting down these traitors for me.

If you can clear out our little pest issue you’ll be paid handsomely. Just don’t leave a single one of them alive. Don’t want anyone else getting funny ideas.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Evasive Bounty: [TargetName] (VHRT)
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Bounty Collection
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High Risk Target (Armed Support)

Hurston Dynamics is seeking a contractor to complete a bounty for [TargetName]. This target and the large hostile force they are traveling with have just been reported raiding [Location]. 

However, if their MO holds true, [TargetName] has typically remained hidden during attacks, preferring to direct their forces from afar. It is our recommendation that you focus on thinning out their allies first, and once their numbers have been significantly weakened, [TargetName] will have no choice but to confront you directly. 

Payment will be released only after the bounty has been deemed complete.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Secure Bounty: [TargetName] (VHRT)
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a qualified bounty hunter to apprehend [TargetName] who has so far been able to evade capture. They are coordinating an active raid that has spread throughout [Location].  

Our hope is that you may be able to finally draw them out of hiding if you confront their forces at several different attack points. With their numbers sufficiently weakened, [TargetName] will most likely risk exposure and you will be able to confront them directly.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
•Confront [TargetName]’s criminal associates to draw the target into the open.
• Neutralize [TargetName]; using force if necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Dangerous Take
contracts.description:
I was hopin’ you’d be interested in pulling a little job for us. Got some goods over at [Location] that are just right for the taking. Only problem is – and it’s a big one – the bastards running the place have the whole area rigged with proximity mines. 

You’ll need to find someway through, or if you can’t be bothered, someway to trigger the lot. Either way, just try not to blow yourself up. Then you just need to grab the stuff and take it over to [Destination].

It won’t be easy to pull off, but if you do, I promise I’ll make it worth your while.

contracts.title: Delicate Dealings
contracts.description:
I’m really hoping you’re going to agree to do this since there doesn’t seem to be too many folks eager to take on a whole bunch of proximity mines. See, there’s a score that we’ve sourced at [Location] but the physical security is proving more difficult than expected. 

If you can find a way to navigate through the mines or possibly a way to trigger them remotely, it should be relatively easy to grab the goods and make your way out of there. Drop them off at [Destination] and you’ll get more than your fair cut of the credits for taking on the risk.

-Bit Zeros

contracts.title: Vanduul-Tech Smugglers
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Unknown
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec has been enlisted by the UEE to gather intel on a group of <EM4>black marketeers dealing in Vanduul parts</EM4>, that have been linked to the illegal Vanduul experiments happening at ASD’s Onyx Facility. The UEE is eager to understand and put an end to their operations.

Based on evidence extracted from the ASD facilities, we’ve potentially managed to track down the location of one of their storage sites.

Once accepted, head over to the old <EM4>QV Planet Services Logistics station</EM4> and we’ll be in touch.


Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Retrieve Additional Smuggler Intel
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec needs your services once again.

The intel you previously gathered has been invaluable in identifying several prominent buyers of the illegally-obtained Vanduul parts. However, since then the Shattered Blade have continued their operations and the UEE is requesting that we <EM4>update our intel.</EM4>

We believe more information can be retrieved from the storage facilities located at the old <EM4>QV Logistics station.</EM4>

The operation parameters haven’t changed since your last mission: find the <EM4>encrypted data</EM4> and use the <EM4>decryption key</EM4> to decipher and upload the list to us. The Shattered Blade will have reinforced the area since the last time, so expect resistance.

Good luck. We’ll be in touch.


Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Lab Sample
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
In going through the files, I’ve seen a couple of allusions to a specific lab sample that would potentially be useful to have our people analyze. Not sure where it is exactly, but if you hunt around Onyx Facility you should be able to find the sample and bring it to me.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Onyx Facility Research Wing</EM4> and <EM4>track down the Lab Sample</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Just got off a comm with a client. They got cargo (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)  

I'd recommend taking a few minutes to plan your route before taking off. Might save you a bit of fuel. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Recover Vanduul Tech
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: 
To prevent the Shattered Blade from flooding the black market with xeno-contraband, the UEE has charged InterSec with <EM4>recovering a stash of Vanduul Plating and Metal.</EM4> from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4> the gang has been occupying. Once you have the materials in your posession, deliver them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Following from your previous experience, it would not be surprising if the Shattered Blade offer resistance, but ensure that your focus is on recovering the materials.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Special Purchase Order: Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Supply of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Top Tier Operator Needed
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

This contract should only be considered by the most capable of pilots. A highly valued client is currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and requires immediate extraction. They’re sitting in the hangar ready to leave, but are unable to move until the hostile ships in the area have been neutralized. 

I don’t see the outlaws stopping any time soon and our client’s reporting they’re packing high-grade weaponry on their ships. This will be a test of your skill as much as your endurance. Assemble whoever you need and head there immediately to assist them.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Restore Order at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Our crew at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we can’t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, you’re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and I’ll send you specifics on where you’re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Support VIP Clients
contracts.description:
Looking for a consummate professional to handle a high-stakes job. We’ve got VIP clients at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> who are facing extremely aggressive and motivated outlaws targeting ships around their location. Exact details on the attack are still rolling in, but it appears to be a wide ranging, multi-pronged operation. 

If you’re available, I highly recommend that you bring additional combat support ships, plenty of supplies, and your A-game. Get this right, and we’ll reward the main contractor with a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

- Stow

contracts.title: Obtain Irradiated Valakkar Pearls
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are stopping at nothing to halt the ongoing regeneration crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need a rare resource that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar pearls</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have found a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is prepared to generously compensate anyone who can assist with gathering the pearls. 

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Just got off a comm with a client. They got cargo (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)  

I'd recommend taking a few minutes to plan your route before taking off. Might save you a bit of fuel. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Eradicate UEE Threat: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: ~mission(Location|Address)
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Capital Ship
Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a potentially devastating strike against sensitive UEE targets. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

After putting together a fighting force of your own, head to the site and engage with the hostiles there. Their leader will not risk entering into the fray themselve unless they feel their operation is suitably at risk. Stay at the site and take out hostile targets, until you can engage with the groups leader directly and put a stop to this heinous attack once and for all.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Reclusive Bounty: [TargetName] | Extreme Risk
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
-------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Extreme
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Unknown
NOTES: This particular target has proven very difficult to capture. They tend to remain hidden unless there is a big enough threat to demand their attention. That's why you and your most trusted support fleet will need to take out enough of their underlings to force them to confront you. Just stay put, take out any hostiles that show up, and the target will eventually arrive in their capital ship.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Additional Resources For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Patrol Vanduul Hunting Ground
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: There's a growing concern that Vanduul hunting parties are pushing further into Nyx. The first line of defense against this encroachment is increased patrols. InterSec has identified a sector that has seen an uptick in Vanduul activity and are looking for someone to patrol the region and provide an update on it.

You'll begin your patrol at a <EM4>location marker</EM4> sent to your HUD and then scan a series of waypoints along a designated route. The Vanduul ships in this sector are highly skilled and aggressive, so InterSec highly recommends that you <EM4>bring several combat-ready ships along as backup</EM4>.

InterSec understands the immense danger you'll be under on this patrol, so we'll send a special bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor once the sector is clear.      

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Patrol Extremely Dangerous Sector
contracts.description:
After weeks of seeing crime rates increase, we’ve been able to identify a sector that we believe to be the source of the outlaw activity that has been leeching into the surrounding areas. While it would be too much to expect to eradicate all threats, we believe that by sending combat patrols into the area we might be able to start reversing this worrisome trend. Our in-house combat analysts recommend bringing around <EM4>three wingmen</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Hunt Some Heads
contracts.description:
Got some asshole’s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really don’t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where we’re building up our presence. Time for us to show that we’re here to stay.  

I’ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where we’re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Secure Threatened Space
contracts.description:
Need a battle-hardened pilot for an important patrol. A prominent client is fed up with outlaws targeting their ships and satellites. We’ve been hired to scan the areas in question and deal with any hostile forces. The patrol begins at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD before moving to a number of other locations we’ll expect you to clear.

Not sure what you’ll run into out there, but based on intel shared by the client, they’re frequently seeing fighter groups of five to seven ships roaming the region. Some even have larger ships leading the charge. That means you better be ready for a serious fight. If you can, try to recruit at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> to the cause. Even a seasoned pilot will need all the help they can get against this crew.   

Since this is going to be a tough one, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> at the end of the patrol.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Red Level Contract: High-Risk Security Patrol
