contracts.title: Protection Detail Needed. High Risk.
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

I’m in need of a highly competent pilot who can gather a crew of equally capable pilots for an escort mission. The mining base at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is currently under attack from a group of outlaws and the crew there is unable to leave without assistance. Our scouts have reported that the attackers are armed with exceptional weaponry and ships.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Stop Attack at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Looking for someone who can not only dogfight but recruit others to the Headhunters cause. Our operations center at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>, along with any ships going to and from it, are being targeted by hostile forces. We need support there pronto. 

Not gonna lie, but there’s lots of heat around there. That’s why you’ll need to be fully supplied and find some trustworthy friends to fly at your wing. When you get your crew together, head out there and I’ll update you if there’s any flare ups in the area that need your attention.

This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for a job well done. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, even with the amount of ships buzzing through a system as populated as Stanton, so don't be surprised if you have to put a bit more effort into hunting down what's needed.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Save Ships at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Ship support is needed at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> immediately. Our client’s interests in the area are under fierce attack by outlaw forces. Looking for someone who can grab their gear, a few support ships they can trust, and deploy before it’s too late. Once you arrive, I’ll send any sitrep updates your way.  

Don’t mess this up. These clients are paying for and expecting top tier protection. If anything goes wrong, we could lose this contract. That’s why we’ll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> if all goes down without a hitch.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement
unlocks: Red Level Contract: Support VIP Clients

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #8
contracts.description:
Welcome to the final scenario of the Combat Gauntlet.

Throughout this course, you’ve gotten to experience the advanced combat and defensive tactics needed to survive a variety of encounters. Time to take all those new skills and knowledge and see how they hold up against a large capital vessel and some escort ships.

You know the drill by now. Once you and all your allies are set, find your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to see how you do when truly pushed to the limits.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Patience is a Virtue – If you’ve balanced your squadron properly, you should be able to come out on top, just don’t expect it to be a quick fight. Ships this big don’t go down quickly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Just got off a comm with a client. They got cargo (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)  

I'd recommend taking a few minutes to plan your route before taking off. Might save you a bit of fuel. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Terminate UEE Threat: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: ~mission(Location|Address)
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Heavy Gun-Ship
Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a major strike against vital UEE infrastructure. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

Gather a suitable amount of support craft and head to the engagement site. There you will have to engage with various squadrons before their leader will deem the situation dire enough to directly lead their forces. It is critical that they be neutralized in order to ensure the attack is stopped.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Reclusive Bounty: [TargetName] | Very-High Risk
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
-------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Unknown
NOTES: This particular target has proven very difficult to capture. They are seldom seen unless they are required to deal with a large enough threat personally. That's why you and your support crew will need to take out enough of their underlings to ensure they come to engage you. Just stay put, take out any hostiles that show up, and the target should eventually show themselves.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
unlocks: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at QV Breaker Station

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, partly in thanks to how many outlaws are flying around in Pyro and partly because this request isn't for your average everyday component. But lucky for you, the extra effort will be rewarded.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

CFP has an urgent request for a pilot with combat experience. A few of their settlements are under immediate threat and may soon be under attack, so they need supplies ASAP. 

If you're confident that you can navigate a potential combat zone, please head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, grab the cargo, and bring it to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

You'll need enough room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded.

Keep in mind that it's always best to run if someone tries to ambush you. But if you get cornered, don't hesitate to defend yourself.

contracts.title: Two Birds, One Stone
contracts.description:
An informant passed along some interesting news. XenoThreat are about to do a massive ammo resupply run for their forces, and in preparation, they’ve brought all that cargo to ~mission(Location|Address). Seems like a prime time to strike. You interested in killing a bunch of Xenos and then stealing their ammo for us?    

If so, get your shit in order and then clear that base. Once done, grab all the ammo and bring it to ~mission(Destination|Address). You’ll get paid well, and I’m sure we’ll find something fun to do with all that ammo. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Stop Attack at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Looking for someone who can not only dogfight but recruit others to the Headhunters cause. Our operations center at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>, along with any ships going to and from it, are being targeted by hostile forces. We need support there pronto. 

Not gonna lie, but there’s lots of heat around there. That’s why you’ll need to be fully supplied and find some trustworthy friends to fly at your wing. When you get your crew together, head out there and I’ll update you if there’s any flare ups in the area that need your attention.

This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for a job well done. 

Stows out.
unlocks: Red Level Contract: Support VIP Clients

contracts.title: Lrg. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS - [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
We've got a shipment of contraband that needs to be hauled to a couple of different places. If you like creds, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, load everything up, and bring it to these drop points:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

You're gonna need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move the boxes and enough room in your cargo hold for size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers. 

Avoid other ships if you can. Security will bust you if they figure out what you're hauling, and raiders will just take it for themselves. 

-Twitch

contracts.title: Block XenoThreat Expansion
contracts.description:
XenoThreat are on the warpath right now. They’ve launched simultaneous attacks on several Headhunters sites and stretched our fighters thin. Got word they’re planning to storm ~mission(Location|Address) next, and we can’t get anyone there to defend it. 

I’m looking to pay someone to pull together a crew, gather supplies, and mount a strong defense for us. Gonna be honest with you, this is shaping up to be a hell of a fight. Xenos are sending some of their most experienced forces there. Not much else I can say except that they’ll probably stagger the arrival of their forces, wipe them all out and you’ll be paid handsomely. 

Think you can rise to the occasion?  

-Stows

contracts.title: Extremely Dangerous Defense
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We have a client currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We have a long history with this client and know that they’re a skilled dogfighter. If they’re struggling to survive, then this situation must be dire.
 
We’re looking for a top-tier dogfighter to head out there and provide support. If you’re available, then this client could really use your help. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Handle Vanduul Attack on Ship
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: An operator working with InterSec is currently being attacked by Vanduul ships at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The likelihood of them surviving on their own is low, so we’re looking for a contractor willing to provide combat support.  

Contractors accepting this mission should be well supplied and ready to face the Vanduul threat head-on. 

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Come to Aid of Convoy
contracts.description:
I’m getting reports that a Citizens for Prosperity convoy carrying vital supplies is currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. It’d be a big blow to our operations if we lost that cargo. 

If you’ve got the combat skills to go up against highly aggressive hostiles, we’re more than willing to pay for your help. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Looking for a Damn Hero
contracts.description:
Got ourselves in a real mess here. A Headhunters ship on an important mission got attacked near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Can’t get too into the specifics but it’s absolutely vital that they survive. The People’s Alliance know this too because they’re throwing everything they can at ‘em.

Not gonna pull any punches. This is a serious-ass situation that many wouldn’t survive. If you do, I’ll sing your praises and make sure you’re paid well.   

-Stows

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Stop Rivals from Launching Heist
contracts.description:
When will people learn that they can't just do whatever they feel like on Headhunter turf? These idiots are planning a big job and thought that I'd just let them get away with it? No way in hell.

I want you to fly to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy their fuel tanks and data servers. Show them what the Headhunters really think of them.

Let's see them try to pull off anything after that.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Purge XenoThreat Servers
contracts.description:
I'm so mad right now I can barely see straight. A Headhunter who I thought I could trust just went over to the XenoThreat. Yeah, aliens killed your family. Shit sucks, but you don't turn your back on your people. 

To add insult to injury, the bastard gave XenoThreat a bunch of our intel. I have some other folks tracking the traitor down, but I need you to take care of wiping out the stolen data for me. It's being kept on servers at ~mission(Location|Address).

-Stows out

contracts.title: Destroy XenoThreat Fuel Reserves
contracts.description:
I won't get into the long and complicated politics of why I'm asking you to do this, but it's enough for you to know that I want it done. 

Go to ~mission(Location|Address) and blow up the XenoThreat fuel reserves there. It'll really be helping me out of a tight spot.

-Stows

contracts.title: Gather Irradiated Valakkar Fangs
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but to continue their efforts our scientists need materials that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar fangs</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have uncovered the existence of a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. 

Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is offering premium pay to anyone who can assist with collecting the fangs.  

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Lrg. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Taking down a XenoThreat Hideout
contracts.description:
Got a juicy assignment for any big-time enforcers who want to clear a big payday. Over at ~mission(Location|Address) we got some XenoThreat turf run by a real bastard named ~mission(TargetName). Now if you've been in the system long enough, you've probably either heard of ~mission(TargetName|Last) or at least seen their work. Skag has a tendency to leaves bodies wherever they go.

Anyway, Judge wants this area swept clean, that means you gotta hit all three clusters and kill every XenoThreat dirt you find. Kill enough and ~mission(TargetName|Last) won't be able to hide.

Take them all out and have one on us.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Hit on XenoThreat command
contracts.description:
These XenoThreat assholes are like aloprats. Every time you thing you wipe them out, they just pop back up again. They seem to be back to their usual shit and trying to put together something big. No idea what, but we've been cleared to stop it before it starts.

A group of XenoThreat biggies are supposedly meeting at ~mission(Location|Address) to plan or just rage or whatever it is they do, but we're gonna bust it up. Or you are.

Head over there and wipe out everyone you find. Sure enough I'm sure the biggies will jump into the fight. That's what they always do.

This'll be a tough one. As much as I hate XenoThreat, they're damn good in a fight, so watch yourself and bring help if you can.

Stows out.

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS - [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
One of our best distributors got busted in Stanton so we need a replacement. The guy was an incredible salesman, but a shit smuggler. We need someone who won't run face-first into a security patrol or a pack of pirates to pick up some merchandise at these locations:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

And bring it all to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> before security catches on to what's happening. You'll need enough space on your ship for size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> should make loading and unloading nice and easy. 

-Twitch

contracts.description:

LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

contracts.title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
contracts.description:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and I’m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step – cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and that’s great news for both of us.   
 
If you’ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and I’ve got a haul of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but here’s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a ‘trusted contractor’ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

contracts.title: Ling Family [ReputationRank] Cargo Haul - [CargoGradeToken] Scale
contracts.description:
Hey, 
 
Any chance you’d be willing to do a haul into Pyro? I know it can get dangerous there but this is for a good cause. A group of new CFP members have moved to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and had a tough time adjusting to life in the system. They all left stuff behind in Stanton, because their transporter didn’t have room, so we’ve been hired to pick it all up and bring it to them.      

Here are the pick ups:   

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)   

~mission(MultiToSingleToken) 

CFP leaders hope that bringing them this stuff will make the system feel more like home. Let’s make sure this one goes down smoothly. Remember to equip your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and a ship that can fit <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS - [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
We're looking for someone discreet to move a new batch of altruciatoxin to a number of buyers . Yeah, it's illegal, but only if you get caught. 

The shipment is at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. You'll need to take it to these drop points:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

Be sure your ship can carry size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers, and don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. Not sure how you're planning on moving the boxes, otherwise.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: VIP Client Needs Protection
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

In need of a contractor who can report in now. A client has found themselves in hot water over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and a protection detail to get away from an asteroid base. They’ve reported multiple, well-armed hostile ships meaning you’ll need a crew of your own to deal with them. Based on the client’s account, these attackers seem highly motivated so they will likely not back down easily.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Help Headhunters at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops. 

There’s enough of them that it’s gonna take more than one person to clear away all that trash. If you can grab your gear and a few friends, I could really use you out there.  

The specific attack areas and targets are evolving. Don’t worry about the details now. Just get there and I’ll let you know where you’re needed.  

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows

contracts.title: Vital Resources Needed For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of three resources essential for their experiments: <EM4>saldynium, jaclium, and carinite</EM4>.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

Though we haven’t been able to do thorough scans, there’s a strong belief among our teams that Hathor’s defunct Orbital Laser Platforms were built above areas with a high concentration of these resources. Reactivating these OLP could be your best hope of acquiring what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Eliminate Vanduul Ship
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: InterSec requires the services of a skilled pilot who’s prepared to assist in taking down a dangerous Vanduul target that has been involved in numerous attacks.

Vanduul incursions have been on the rise recently, posing not only a threat to the system of Nyx, but the UEE as a whole. It is imperative that these sightings are responded to in a swift and efficient manner. 

We require you to fly to the last known sighting of the Vanduul ship at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and eliminate them immediately.  

Vanduul pilots are highly skilled and extremely dangerous. Engage the enemy immediately and do not hesitate – they will not show the same mercy.

Compensation proportionate to the risk of the contract will be awarded.


Respectfully,
Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Protect Our Client’s Interests
contracts.description:
The folks at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are under attack and need our support. Their ships in the wider area are being targeted and there’s a growing concern that this is only a precursor to something bigger.  

The situation is evolving, but I’m being fed constant updates on what’s going on and will keep you informed as the contract progresses. 

Are you available to come to their aid? Would be smart to recruit some friends to help. These are important clients and we can’t afford to fail them. The main contractor will earn a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> if you get the job done.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement
unlocks: Red Level Contract: Save Ships at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]

contracts.title: Highly Dangerous Ambush
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we sent a contractor after a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, who was leading a crew targeting the operations of an extremely important client. Unfortunately, it was a trap and we lost some good people. We can’t let the target get away again, so we’ve decided the best course of action is to give them a dose of their own medicine.  

Ambushing this target seems like the safest course of action, and we’ve identified a good spot for such an attack. There’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that the target and their crew frequently fly by. You can power down your ship and hide there until you’re ready to strike. This crew is ruthless and extremely skilled. Don’t make the same mistake as the previous contractor and go this alone. It would be best for you to bring a few trusted friends to help handle this crew.    

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. Plus, we’ll throw in a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor for taking care of this.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Elite Op
contracts.description:
Headhunters are looking for someone with the skills and crew to execute an elite op. A military frigate and escort ships are stalking one of our Clips around the system. Don’t know their intentions but it can’t be good. Figure while they’ve got their eyes focused on their prize, we get someone to gather a crew to hit ‘em.  

Already got a spot picked out. If you get to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> there’s an emission cloud that’s exactly what we need. Head there with friends, power down your ships, and wait for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escorts to pass by. 

With a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor, payment alone should make this worth your while, but you can also keep anything you scrounge from the wreckage.

- Stows

contracts.title: Patrol to Prevent Possible Attack
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been tracking increased outlaw activity in certain sectors of the system. This activity in conjunction with other intelligence leads us to believe that outlaws are planning an attack on elements traveling from the UEE. We're aiming to patrol these sectors and disrupt any plans before they can be put into action.

Currently, we need someone who can help patrol a highly dangerous sector. Once you've accepted the mission, you can proceed to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there, we'll send you along a specific route with additional waypoints to scan. Complete the patrol and we'll send the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Due to the high probability of attack and general threat level of local outlaws, we recommend <EM4>recruiting trusted wingmen</EM4> to provide combat support.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Patrol Dangerous Outlaw Sector
contracts.description:
We’ve identified a sector that’s been increasingly riddled with outlaw attacks and we think that if we begin to actively patrol the area we can turn things around. We’d recommend gathering at least <EM4>two wingmen</EM4> to head out there in combat-ready ships and confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Stand Our Ground
contracts.description:
We’re getting pushback from folks who don’t seem happy that we’re here. Folks have gotten keen to our haunts and started sending out squads to hit our ships. You down to visit a few of those spots to show that we won’t be scared off? 

If so, start by seeing what’s around the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there I’ll guide you to a few other hotspots that we need checked. Better get your shit in order before heading out. I'd recommend loading up on ammo and convincing <EM4>two friends</EM4> to join the patrol.

You do this for the Headhunters and I'll see to it that the main contractor gets a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Hit on XenoThreat command
contracts.description:
These XenoThreat assholes are like aloprats. Every time you thing you wipe them out, they just pop back up again. They seem to be back to their usual shit and trying to put together something big. No idea what, but we've been cleared to stop it before it starts.

A group of XenoThreat biggies are supposedly meeting at ~mission(Location|Address) to plan or just rage or whatever it is they do, but we're gonna bust it up. Or you are.

Head over there and wipe out everyone you find. Sure enough I'm sure the biggies will jump into the fight. That's what they always do.

This'll be a tough one. As much as I hate XenoThreat, they're damn good in a fight, so watch yourself and bring help if you can.

Stows out.

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS - [ReputationRank] Rank - [CargoGradeToken] Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
If you've got a fast ship, can discreetly carry size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers, and love getting a huge payout, we need you to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> immediately and take what you find there to these drop points:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

The buyers are paying a premium to get their hands on fresh stormwal meat. Stay sharp. If security catches you with this, it's your ass on the line. If you're smart, you'll use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded up quick. 

-Twitch

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Surprise Attack
contracts.description:
We’ve received a handful of comms about recent attacks undertaken by an <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escort ships. After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We want to use that to our advantage to launch a surprise attack. 

Once on site, you should hide in the emission cloud to cloak your signature enough to allow you to make the first strike. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the ~mission(AmbushTarget) is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad

contracts.title: Elite Op
contracts.description:
Headhunters are looking for someone with the skills and crew to execute an elite op. A military frigate and escort ships are stalking one of our Clips around the system. Don’t know their intentions but it can’t be good. Figure while they’ve got their eyes focused on their prize, we get someone to gather a crew to hit ‘em.  

Already got a spot picked out. If you get to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> there’s an emission cloud that’s exactly what we need. Head there with friends, power down your ships, and wait for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escorts to pass by. 

With a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor, payment alone should make this worth your while, but you can also keep anything you scrounge from the wreckage.

- Stows

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: High-Risk Security Patrol
contracts.description:
A client needs our help. Outlaws are roaming certain sectors where they do business and attacking anyone they come across. Our client has already lost several ships and can’t afford to lose anymore. 

We need someone to patrol those areas and draw out any hostile forces. The job begins with you heading to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scanning. Then we’ll share a handful of other patrol points for you to scan. 

From the sound of it, these packs of ships feature skilled and aggressive pilots. Best be ready to rumble if you run into any of them. Would be good to have at least <EM4>two trusted pilots</EM4> by your side for this one.

At the end of a successful patrol, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Stay chilly,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Orange Level Contract: Potential Security Threat
unlocks: Red Level Contract: Secure Threatened Space

contracts.title: Extreme Risk Cargo Retrieval
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Putting out an immediate call for a highly skilled contractor to reclaim a client's cargo located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Client hired an expert hauler to transport something discreetly, but it seems some information regarding the shipment was either hacked or leaked. The pilot was attacked and now the shipment is stranded. We need you and any support ships you bring to make it to the site before the cargo is lost for good. 

You will need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship capable of storing <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

After assessing the situation and the importance the client has placed on the recovery of the cargo, we have decided to reward a high payout for the successful delivery of the shipment to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Special Recovery Operation
contracts.description:
I wouldn't normally ask someone to do something so risky, but these are exceptional circumstances.

Our pilot was transporting some vital cargo when they were targeted by a group of outlaws. Under no circumstances can we allow them to get their hands on the cargo.

With the size of the hostile force who attacked, you won't be able to do this on your own, you'll need to bring a skilled crew with you to  <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> in order to  take out these outlaws and get the cargo back. Make sure at least one of you has a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

If by some miracle you can get that cargo back, take it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

It's a lot to ask, but if you can pull this off you'll have my and the whole organizations appreciation.

Best of luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Regain Supplies from XenoThreat
contracts.description:
Hey,

One of our supply ships fell prey to a XenoThreat ambush. I’ll spare you the grisly details, but all that really remains is the cargo our people were carrying to ~mission(Destination|Address). Trackers hidden within the cargo shows that XenoThreat collected the goods and then took them to a few locations spread out across ~mission(Location|Address).
 
We can’t let the XenoThreat get away with what they did to our crew and keep all those goods too. That’s why we want to strike back on both fronts. We need someone who can raid that location, retrieve the stolen cargo, and teach the Xenos that there will be consequences for their horrendous actions. Can you help us fight back?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Locate Missing Crew
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP65648
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A whole crew has gone missing while undertaking a contract in ~mission(System) for a client that I'm unfortunately not allowed to disclose the full details of to you. Lets just say that it wasn't the safest job and the fact the crew is not responding comms is not surprising but it is concerning. It's vital that we ascertain what happened to them. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
This investigation has high potential for there to be aggressive and dangerous hostiles on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bringing other skilled associates with you.

contracts.title: Lost But Not Gone
contracts.description:
A rival crew was able to get their hands on our delivery routes and now they have one of my cargo ships pinned down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Now the ship’s sitting there being guarded by a full crew of these assholes. They must be waiting for someone to show up with a transport ship, but you’re going to get there first.

Head there with a crew of your own and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to take the goods away. Make sure they’re the best people you got. It’d be a mistake to underestimate these bastards.

Ghost them and bring my cargo back to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll make sure you’re seriously comp’d for this.

-Twitch

-Twitch

contracts.title: Worth the trouble
contracts.description:
This’ll be a fun one for you. We just got word that a transport ship has broken down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Only problem is, every skag and their mother seems to know about it. Place is crawling with all kinds of outlaws trying to get their hands on the cargo onboard. That’s where you come in.

If you can get your best pilots together and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> you can take out the competition and snag the cargo. It ain’t gonna be easy though. One of my scouts said the assholes guarding this ship have got some serious tech on them.  

I’ve already got a buyer waiting, you just need to take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll send you the creds.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Mjr. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #7
contracts.description:
Congrats on completing part six of this eight-part course.

You’ve gained a lot of experience across the past six scenarios, and now it’s time to put it all to practice. Scenario seven puts you up against a corvette-class ship and its escorts. This extended encounter will push you to the limit and test everything you got.   

The only thing left is to understand the limit of your skillset. To put it simply, you can’t do everything yourself. Developing and maintaining relationships with fellow pilots that you can call upon for support is really the last piece of the puzzle. Not saying you can't overcome encounters like this by yourself, but even the Navy doesn’t send their ace pilots on a patrol alone.    

Once you decided whether to do this alone or call in some support, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to kick off the encounter.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Strength in Diversity – Think about the roles your allies will be filling and choose who to bring carefully to help balance strengths and weaknesses. You’ll want ships capable of taking on the Corvette while others deal with the escort.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind needs an experienced pilot to transport a large shipment of raw revenant tree pollen from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

This might seems self-evident, but the rep from CFP asked us to assure you that it's okay under UEE law to transport revenant tree pollen as long as it hasn't been processed. 

Be sure that your ship can carry up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> before you accept the contract. And buy a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> if you don't have one already to make loading and unloading as painless as possible.

contracts.title: Reclusive Bounty: [TargetName] | High Risk
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
-------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Unknown
NOTES: This particular target has proven very difficult to capture. They tend to remain hidden unless there is a big enough threat to demand their attention. That's why you and your support crew will need to take out enough of their underlings to catch their ire. Just stay put, take out any hostiles that show up, and the target should eventually show themselves.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
unlocks: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at QV Breaker Station

contracts.title: Investigate Missing Pilot and Cargo
contracts.description:
A local courier who has been working for Citizen for Prosperity, ~mission(TargetName), was reported missing earlier this week. We believe that they may have been captured by members of XenoThreat who were after the encrypted data-drives and important cargo they were transporting for us.  

We would like you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) to ascertain what has happened to ~mission(TargetName|First), destroy any servers which may be housing the stolen data,  and deliver the recovered cargo to ~mission(Destination|Address).

It's a lot to ask, but I believe you're up to the challenge.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Unfinished Contract
contracts.description:
Here's the deal, one of our usual heavy hitters, a cat named ~mission(TargetName), was sent to ~mission(Location|Address) to knock out some XenoThreat who'd been hiding there. We knew it was going to be a tall order, but that's why we called in ~mission(TargetName|Last). Problem is, we ain't heard from them.

As far as we know XenoThreat are still operating out of that outpost so we gotta assume that ~mission(TargetName|Last) got popped. We need you to go in and finish what they started. Once that's done, if you can find out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|Last), that would be a bonus.

Stows out.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Guess some companies see danger when offered a run in Pyro. We see profits. Got one here that starts in the system at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and then goes to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

The client warned us that outlaws in Pyro regularly target this run, which has scared other hauling concerns. Be sure your ship is all geared up and can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. And don't forget to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

contracts.title: Wanted: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Here's the deal, we just got word that a XenoThreat power player named ~mission(TargetName) just came out of hiding and was spotted at ~mission(Location|Address). 

Headhunters have been hungry to put this asshole in the ground for months, so we launched an assault against the outpost, but the Judge wants to make sure ~mission(TargetName|Last) doesn't slip away, so they want to use you as insurance.

This'll be a tough kill in the middle of a warzone, but we'll pay out if you pull it off.

Stows out.

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Neutralize Dangerous Criminal Fleet
contracts.description:
A criminal fleet has taken up root in a sector that Citizens For Prosperity is trying to develop and all forward progress has stopped thanks to their violent actions. It is imperative to a long term goals that we find a way to neutralize this fleet before that cause any further damage.

You and your most trusted support ships will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Take Out Criminal Fleet
contracts.description:
It seems that a couple of different small-time gangs have decided to pool their resources and start doing coordinated attacks. Alone, they weren't much, but all together they're proving to be a serious threat that has to be dealt with.

Recruit some backup you can rely on and the fly over to ~mission(Location|Address). Once you attack the initial gang members you find there, the other groups will arrive to support them. Make sure you wait around to take out all of them.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Neutralize Dangerous Criminal Fleet
contracts.description:
A criminal fleet has taken up root in a sector that Citizens For Prosperity is trying to develop and all forward progress has stopped thanks to their violent actions. It is imperative to a long term goals that we find a way to neutralize this fleet before that cause any further damage.

You and your most trusted support ships will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Pilot Under Fire From Vanduul
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Vanduul 
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships 
Briefing: We've just lost contact with a pilot who engaged with Vanduul forces at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Travel to their last known location and if they're still alive, defend them long enough to ensure they can escape. Ensuring the safety of the operative is crucial, as is eliminating any Vanduul threats to the UEE.

You'll most likely need a <EM4>strong group of ships</EM4> to successfully neutralize these Vanduul.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Neutralize Vanduul Target
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec is in need of a highly skilled combat pilot who can locate and neutralize a dangerous Vanduul target.

An operator of ours has identified a Vanduul ship flying within the vicinity of <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We've been given strict instructions to eliminate any Vanduul spotted on the fringes of UEE space, for fear of encroachment into the Empire's territory.

Bring a <EM4>small fleet of competent pilots</EM4> with you to engage and neutralize the target.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Green light on [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Word's come down through my bosses that we're settling old debts. I've got an open line on this old-time hitter named ~mission(TargetName) who's racked up a hefty kill list. We caught wind that they were hiding out with some people over at ~mission(Location|Address) who aren't the biggest fans of us, so they probably won't take kindly to you. ~mission(TargetName|Last) is the target here, but you might have to mix it up with them.

Again, whenever we've tried to take out ~mission(TargetName|Last), they've killed their killer. I feel like you'll fare better, but I'd bring backup if you got it.

Good luck.

-Stows

contracts.title: Help Headhunters at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops. 

There’s enough of them that it’s gonna take more than one person to clear away all that trash. If you can grab your gear and a few friends, I could really use you out there.  

The specific attack areas and targets are evolving. Don’t worry about the details now. Just get there and I’ll let you know where you’re needed.  

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows
unlocks: Red Level Contract: Save Ships at [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Protect [Location] from XenoThreat Incursion
contracts.description:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is mobilizing for a massive incursion to wipe ~mission(Location|Address) off the map. You’re their only hope of enduring this assault and protecting them from XenoThreat’s cruelty.

I know I’m asking you to put yourself in the line of fire, but this system won’t change unless people like you are brave enough to take on these dangers. No amount of credits could measure up to how much good you’d be doing by stepping in.

If you’re willing and able to take on this mission, make sure to take some allies with you. XenoThreat will certainly send in stronger reinforcements once they realize they’re taking losses.

We believe in you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Collect Irradiated Valakkar Eggs
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are working day and night to solve the current regen crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need rare resources that the company's suppliers cannot deliver. 

We are therefore seeking a contractor to secure an <EM4>irradiated valakkar egg</EM4>. Our scans have confirmed several radioactive storms with known a valakkar presence on Pyro I, you can find a shuttle near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> that will take you inside the storm. One more thing, analysis indicates that these eggs will decay over time, the state of the egg shouldn't affect our research but sooner would be better.

Due to the health risks associated with radiation exposure that will be needed to deliver a viable sample, Rayari is ready to pay well for anyone who can safely secure and deliver this item.

Once attained, please take this valuable resource to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Critical Cargo Extraction
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Calling for a skilled contractor to recover a displaced shipment located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Client's hauler was transporting some high value cargo when they decided to respond to a distress beacon and got ambushed by a group of outlaws. The client believes their pilot is gone but their cargo could still be recovered.

The information we have so far is that you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for shifting the goods, as well as your support ships to help deal with the outlaws at the location. 

Client will be expecting the completed delivery to be made to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Cargo Shipment Must Be Completed
contracts.description:
More and more CFP ships are being targeted lately, and despite our best efforts to keep our trading routes quiet, we're still losing haulers to outlaw attacks.

Our pilot over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the latest casualty. It pains me to think about how much we've lost, but as long as there are people who need our help, we have to keep on fighting.

If you have a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, we need you to head to the above location and recover that cargo.

This won't be easy, the pilot was one of our best and wouldn't go down without a fight. Let's not underestimate these outlaws, bring a trustworthy crew and watch each other's backs.

Once you've got the cargo, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll get it processed.

Good luck and take care,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Locate Missing Contractors
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP12854
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary:
We have been asked to track down two contractors who work for a client of ours after they lost contact with them. They were last known to be traveling together in ~mission(System). Until their exact situation can be assessed, our client is stuck in a waiting pattern. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
You'll be heading into what is regarded as a particularly dangerous spot. Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.

contracts.title: Finishing The Job
contracts.description:
We got a situation. Some gang that no one’s heard of are trying to make a name for themselves by targeting our transport ships. They think they can make a big show of how tough they are raiding our haulers and acting like they’re big shots. Amateurs.

Problem is, they got lucky during their last attack. Our pilot barely made it out alive, but their ship is still sitting full of supplies over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Grab a crew you can trust and your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and get your ass over there.

After, drop the gear off at the freight elevator in <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. You do this for me and I’ll give you a good cut of the sale.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Finishing The Job
contracts.description:
We got a situation. Some gang that no one’s heard of are trying to make a name for themselves by targeting our transport ships. They think they can make a big show of how tough they are raiding our haulers and acting like they’re big shots. Amateurs.

After, drop the gear off at the freight elevator in <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. You do this for me and I’ll give you a good cut of the sale.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Getting what we deserve
contracts.description:
Here’s the thing, I got a situation over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and need someone with a brain between their ears to sort it out for me. Former pilot of mine thought he could cut a deal with another gang and unsurprisingly it didn’t work out for him. Now my cargo is sitting idle and being guarded by a whole bunch of nullbrains waiting for their hauler to come pick it up.

Need you to head there with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a strong crew to get my shit back before its gone for good.

Take it all to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll give you a generous cut of the takings.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Getting what we deserve
contracts.description:
