contracts.title: Need multiple CFP outposts retaken
contracts.description:
The outlaw presence here has become much bolder of late and a lot of people are getting hurt. We've recently lost several clusters around ~mission(Location|Address). While we don't like to have to resort to violence, the board has acknowledged that these locations are crucial to establishing stability in the system and authorized the use of a security detail to retake them.

We're also aware that the embedded hostiles are being led by ~mission(TargetName) who's had a history of attacking CFP interests. The board would like ~mission(TargetName|Last) dealt with to prevent future attacks.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #6
contracts.description:
Congrats on completing part five of this eight-part course.

I’m bringing out the big guns for scenario six. Time for you to go up against larger, multi-crewed ships, which provide a few new challenges. Not only will you have to contend with their enhanced firepower but their multifaceted shields means you’ll have to target one shield face continually to do real damage. Easier said than done when both of y’all are moving at such fast speeds.      

Find your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> whenever you're ready.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>. 

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Size Advantage – When going up against a larger ship, try to stay away from their front as typically this is where the majority of their offensive fire is located. 

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Just got off a comm with a client. They got cargo (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)  

I'd recommend taking a few minutes to plan your route before taking off. Might save you a bit of fuel. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Paid Target in CFP
contracts.description:
Headhunters are launching an attack near ~mission(Location|Address). This ex-Marine asshole named ~mission(TargetName) has been sending their mercs to clear out nearby encampments if they don't surrender their weapons.

While all the security have been greenlit, ~mission(TargetName|Last) has been singled out. In their last raid, they beat a squatter to death for talking back. Turns out that squatter was the cousin of one of our Clips, so they're paying extra to make sure justice is done.

Watch yourself though, ~mission(TargetName|Last) may be a scumbag who has this coming, they're still ex-military so they won't be easy to take down.

-Stows

contracts.title: Should'a left it to a professional
contracts.description:
We had this kid named ~mission(TargetName) volunteer to go take out some XenoThreat near ~mission(Location|Address). Everything we knew about the place said it was gonna be too much for ~mission(TargetName|Last) to handle, but they were real keen on boosting their standing with the Headhunters and thought this would do it, so they went alone.

Haven't heard anything but XenoThreat comms coming out of that place since. If you want to go and knock it over, we'll pay you instead. If you can find out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|Last) that would be a bonus.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Should'a left it to a professional
contracts.description:
We had this kid named ~mission(TargetName) volunteer to go take out some XenoThreat near ~mission(Location|Address). Everything we knew about the place said it was gonna be too much for ~mission(TargetName|Last) to handle, but they were real keen on boosting their standing with the Headhunters and thought this would do it, so they went alone.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, even with the amount of ships buzzing through a system as populated as Stanton, so don't be surprised if you have to put a bit more effort into hunting down what's needed.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, partly in thanks to how many outlaws are flying around in Pyro and partly because this request isn't for your average everyday component. But lucky for you, the extra effort will be rewarded.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <

     - A handheld tractor beam

contracts.title: Personnel and Data Captured by XenoThreat
contracts.description:
One of our most trusted datarunners, ~mission(TargetName), has found themselves the victim of a XenoThreat assault. Now both they and the data they were ferrying have been captured and taken to ~mission(Location|Address). 

I am charging you with heading there to ascertain what happened to ~mission(TargetName|First) and to destroy data servers which may be housing the stolen information.

Even if the worst has happened, I think they would want us to make sure they data they were charged with protecting isn't used for nefarious gains.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  This’ll take you into Pyro, so you’ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

You’ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a request from a farmer in Pyro for specialized agricultural supplies - namely, ranta dung. Apparently, normal fertilizers aren't cutting it. They've put in orders from multiple distributors and need someone to bring everything back to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Here are all the places you can collect the dung:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

 ~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

The client says your ship needs to be able to carry at least <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. Don't forget to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading.

contracts.title: Go on the warpath
contracts.description:
Looking for some hitters to go drop some violence on some local dipshits who've been pulling jobs in the system against Headhunters. We tried reaching out to explain the error of their ways, but they shot our messenger, so now we go with option B.

You'll find them holed up near ~mission(Location|Address). Go there and repaint the walls with their blood.

Have fun.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Suspect Apprehension Certification
contracts.description:
Hi,

Hope you don't mind, but I was made aware of your Bounty Hunters Guild status and wanted to reach out and see if you'd be interested in contracting with Northrock Service Group, one of the top rated private security firms in the system.

If you are, the first step would be to complete a pro tem suspect apprehension. It's less of an evaluation and more of a chance to make sure that we can have a good working relationship. 

The suspect you would be after is known as <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>. They are known to be particularly elusive so you may have your work cut out for you.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

contracts.title: Stop Deadly Ship Attack
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Despite our warnings, a client decided to fly to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Unsurprisingly, they just dropped a rescue beacon in the area, so we’re looking for a contractor to get on site, assess the situation, and hopefully rescue the client.

We warned them that extremely dangerous and well-equipped outlaws often strike ships there. That’s exactly what I assume happened here, so make sure you plan accordingly.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Respond to Distress Beacon
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity convoy on a resupply run dropped a distress beacon near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They’re not answering any comms, so I assume the situation is serious. That convoy has some skilled pilots, so if they’re not responding then they definitely need the help.

We’ll compensate you to support that convoy.  

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Rally to Help Clips Convoy
contracts.description:
One of our Clips is in a tight spot. Just got a comm from ‘em saying their convoy is being swarmed by the People’s Alliance and they need help on the double. Well, they said it in a more colorful way than that. All I’ll say is that I don’t want to hear what they’ll say to me if they don’t survive and are forced to regen. 

Situation must be serious if this Clip is freaking out. Really need you to get to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> immediately, and ensure that they make it out alive.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Clear PAFs, Recover Cargo, and Deliver to OLP
contracts.description:
Something weird is going on at the old Hathor mining facilities. Both the platform alignment facilities and orbital laser platforms have been abandoned and gathering dust for decades, but outlaws have started using them as a base of operations.

We’ve been hired by a concerned party who’s recently lost a lot of important cargo to one such gang. Currently, their stuff is stashed at <EM4>~mission(Location1|Address)</EM4> and <EM4>~mission(Location2|Address)</EM4>, but there’s a growing fear that the gang may be offloading their goods soon. That’s why we’ve been hired to hit both of those Hathor facilities, retrieve the cargo from the freight elevators, and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Here’s the specifics on what to grab from each location. Doesn’t matter in what order you do this, as long as it all gets collected and delivered. Just be sure to bring a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.  It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

Foxwell hasn’t been able to scout these locations, but if I were you, I’d expect to face some serious armed resistance. Best bring a bunch of gear and some friends.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Sweep and clear some CFP haunts
contracts.description:
Got word from my Judge that we're to take back some of the outposts that CFP have taken over. They're a little pissed that CFP's getting as much of a foothold in the system as they are and think it's making the Headhunters look weak.

Found a couple candidates near ~mission(Location|Address) that could use a sweep. Icing on the cake is that the head of security there is ~mission(TargetName). Not sure if you've heard of 'em, but they shot up a handful of Clips last month, so it's a win-win. Get some territory back and punch out someone who could really stand to get got.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Taking XenoThreat Turf
contracts.description:
Need some good soldiers with a taste for violence to hit some XenoThreat hideouts located around ~mission(Location|Address). I'll get you the specifics if you're down, but you'll have to wipe out two separate clusters of hideouts. 

We've also gotten word that ~mission(TargetName) is lurking around down there. If you take out enough XenoThreat dirtbags, they'll pop they're head up. 

When they do, put a round in it.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Getting Our Goods Back
contracts.description:
We’ve been using the old Hathor <EM4>~mission(Location1|Address)</EM4> and <EM4>~mission(Location2|Address)</EM4> as stashes, but it turns out some over-eager nullbrains sniffed them out and are trying to boost our shit for their own.

Luckily, the goods are still there - for now. We need someone to visit that PAF and OLP, grab our stuff from the freight elevators, and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> where we should be able to keep it on ice. 

Here’s the list of what to grab. Don’t care what order you do ‘em in. Be sure to bring a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> at the very least. 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

Make sure you’re ready to deal with whatever assholes you run across. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Campaign to reclaim XenoThreat outposts
contracts.description:
Although Citizens for Prosperity is committed to change through non-violent means, it's become apparent that exceptions might have to be made. CFP safe zones near ~mission(Location|Address) were recently and violently taken by XenoThreat forces under the command of ~mission(TargetName).

We're looking for any available combat operatives to help take these outposts back. This will undoubtedly be a difficult endeavor as XenoThreat are highly trained and eager to fight, so you should prepare accordingly.

Aside from clearing each cluster of XenoThreat forces, you will need to take out ~mission(TargetName|Last), who's loss will certainly make the system safer.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Destroy Headhunter Stolen Data
contracts.description:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Need a CFP taken down
contracts.description:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at ~mission(Location|Address). Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS -- [ReputationRank] Rank, [CargoGradeToken] Scale Cargo Run
contracts.description:
Got an interesting one. Some folks who were suckered into life/labor contracts with Hurston Dynamics want to get as far from Lorville as they possibly can. They struck a deal with a people mover and got themselves put on ice. Now they just need someone to pick them up and give them a ride. 

If you're up for some popsicle smuggling, you'll find ~mission(total) cryopods at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that need to go to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Make sure you have space in your cargo hold for size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers. If you use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, you should be able to get everyone loaded up before Hurston security catches on. 

HD isn't too keen on anyone slipping out of their contracts, so watch your back. They shoot to kill. 

If you can pull this off, there's a nice paycheck in it for you.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Protect Vital Asset
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: One of our pilots is under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and is in need of assistance.

This operative is carrying key information regarding a coordinated attack on key UEE infrastructure and it is vital that they are able to deliver it to us. You and any <EM4>dependable pilots you can recruit</EM4> are charged with protecting them from the outlaws in pursuit long enough for them to QT away.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Preemptive Strike On [TargetName]
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec requires a skilled contractor to eliminate a highly dangerous group of criminals based in Nyx who are planning a coordinated strike on a prominent member of the UEE Navy.

We have intercepted a crucial piece of intelligence suggesting a known terrorist by the name of <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> intends to carry out this assassination along with the help of local criminal elements.

They are currently located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, making this an ideal time for us to strike. Be warned, these outlaws are experienced killers - bringing a <EM4>group of trustworthy allies</EM4> is advised.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Find [TargetName] and Missing Supplies
contracts.description:
Hey,

Wondering if you can help me. I’ve lost touch with a dedicated CFP volunteer named ~mission(TargetName) who was tracking down supplies taken by XenoThreat. Their last comm said they believed our stuff was being held at ~mission(Location|Address). I told them to be careful, but haven’t heard anything since.

Any chance you can head out and try to locate ~mission(TargetName|First)? While there, if you spot the supplies, please bring them to ~mission(Destination|Address). I’ll give you the same warning I gave ~mission(TargetName|First), that spot is a known Xeno stronghold. Better be prepared. Would hate for you to disappear too after visiting that spot. 

Be Safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Investigate Missing Pilot and Cargo
contracts.description:
A local courier who has been working for Citizen for Prosperity, ~mission(TargetName), was reported missing earlier this week. We believe that they may have been captured by members of XenoThreat who were after the encrypted data-drives and important cargo they were transporting for us.  

We would like you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) to ascertain what has happened to ~mission(TargetName|First), destroy any servers which may be housing the stolen data,  and deliver the recovered cargo to ~mission(Destination|Address).

It's a lot to ask, but I believe you're up to the challenge.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Investigate Missing Pilot and Cargo
contracts.description:
A local courier who has been working for Citizen for Prosperity, ~mission(TargetName), was reported missing earlier this week. We believe that they may have been captured by members of XenoThreat who were after the encrypted data-drives and important cargo they were transporting for us.

Lima Endicott

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Find Headhunter Crewmember and Help Finish the Job
contracts.description:
You ever get a bad feeling that you just can't shake? I had sent ~mission(TargetName) to take out the some XenoThreat servers at ~mission(Location|Address) and I'm starting think they ran into some serious trouble.

Do me a favor, huh? Go on over and see if you can figure out what happened to them and make sure that those servers are destroyed for good.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Find Headhunter Crewmember and Help Finish the Job
contracts.description:
You ever get a bad feeling that you just can't shake? I had sent ~mission(TargetName) to take out the some XenoThreat servers at ~mission(Location|Address) and I'm starting think they ran into some serious trouble.

Do me a favor, huh? Go on over and see if you can figure out what happened to them and make sure that those servers are destroyed for good.

-Stows out

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  This’ll take you into Pyro, so you’ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

You’ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.

contracts.title: Destroy Outlaw Data Servers
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity have been monitoring a very dangerous outlaw group at ~mission(Location|Address) and we believe that they are in midst of planning a major attack which could throw the whole system into upheaval.

In order to protect all the progress we've made here, we would like you to raid their compound and destroy all the servers housing their plans. 

This should at least provide us with enough of a reprieve for them to reconsider their offensive.

Thank you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Destroy XenoThreat Data Servers
contracts.description:
One of the Citizens for Prosperity members who have been serving as a XenoThreat informer has let us know that the data servers located at ~mission(Location|Address) our housing a trove of information vital to the gang's operation. 

If you were able to destroy these servers on our behalf it would be a huge win for the security of the entire system.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Find XenoThreat Captives and Stolen Data
contracts.description:
A small group of Citizens for Prosperity members were supposed to be delivering sensitive data back to our headquarters in Stanton, but they never arrived. 

We now believe that they were captured by XenoThreat before they could leave the system. I'd like you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to the missing crew and then destroy any servers they could be using to store the stolen data.

Your help is very appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Find XenoThreat Captives and Stolen Data
contracts.description:
A small group of Citizens for Prosperity members were supposed to be delivering sensitive data back to our headquarters in Stanton, but they never arrived. 

We now believe that they were captured by XenoThreat before they could leave the system. I'd like you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to the missing crew and then destroy any servers they could be using to store the stolen data.

Your help is very appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

We now believe that they were captured by XenoThreat before they could leave the system. I'd like you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to the missing crew and then destroy any servers they could be using to store the stolen data.

Your help is very appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS - Trial Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
Call me Twitch. I run the Dead Saints. 

I doubt this is the first time you've heard of us, but in case you haven't, we do a lot of things, but one of them is transporting goods that need discreet handling. 

I got your info from one of my contacts. They say you've got the stuff we like in a hauler, which works for me, because we're looking for one. 

Here's my proposal – we're offering creds to the pilot that can transport some special cargo for us. Your ship’s hold will need room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and you'll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading. All you have to do is get everything from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> without getting security involved. 
 
If you can pull the job off, the Saints will have more contracts for you down the line. 

-Twitch
unlocks: DEAD SAINTS -- [ReputationRank] Rank, [CargoGradeToken] Scale Cargo Run

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS -- [ReputationRank] Rank, [CargoGradeToken] Scale Cargo Run
contracts.description:
If you're looking for creds, the Saints need someone with hauling experience to do a supply run from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

You're gonna need a ship that can hold size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move the boxes around. 

Don't open the crates but just so you know, most of this stuff is legal but not all of it. Try not to cross paths with anyone who might make that a problem for you. Get me?

-Twitch

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Patrol Dangerous Sector
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has received intelligence that outlaws are planning to launch an attack on a target within the UEE. In an effort to prevent this from happening, we need a contractor to patrol a sector we believe these outlaws are using to prepare for their attack.

Outlaw activity in this sector is higher than normal, so InterSec recommends that you <EM4>bring backup</EM4>. When ready, dispatch to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. Once you've confirmed that the entire sector is clear, the main contractor will receive a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4> 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Patrol Outlaw Hunting Grounds
contracts.description:
We’ve identified a sector that’s been plagued by outlaw attacks recently and hopefully, with your help, we can change that. We’d suggest <EM4>bringing some backup</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Patrol Outlaw Hunting Grounds
contracts.description:
We’ve identified a sector that’s been plagued by outlaw attacks recently and hopefully, with your help, we can change that. We’d suggest <EM4>bringing some backup</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Looking For Trouble
contracts.description:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

You make it to the end and I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Looking For Trouble
contracts.description:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

- Stows

contracts.title: Search a XenoThreat Remote Outpost
contracts.description:
Hi,

Got a tough assignment here. There’s a small, satellite outpost near ~mission(Location|Address) that needs to be investigated. I received intel that it’s housing some of our stolen supplies and sent ~mission(TargetName) to retrieve them. Haven’t heard anything from them in a while and am worried they ran into trouble.

XenoThreat controls that location, but I hoped ~mission(TargetName|First) could slip in and out without getting noticed. Seems like that spot might be more heavily guarded than expected. Looking for someone to take a look and see what happened to ~mission(TargetName|First). Also, if any of our supplies are found there, I need them taken to ~mission(Destination|Address). 

Do you think you can give it a shot? I’m guessing that the Xenos are entrenched there. Prepare accordingly and don’t expect them to make this easy on you.  

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Investigate Headhunters Outpost
contracts.description:
Hey,

I’ve been tracking Headhunters activity at ~mission(Location|Address). Recently, they stocked it with supplies we believe were stolen from one of our cargo convoys. ~mission(TargetName) offered to go get our goods back but hasn’t checked in since. Really need to know what happened to them and if our supplies are there.

Think this is something you could handle? You’ll probably have to deal with Headhunters forces to get to the bottom of this. Also, any goods you grab should go to ~mission(Destination|Address) once you’re out of there.

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Red Wind Seeking New Haulers
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a contract from a major client who needs a skilled pilot to move a large load of luxury items from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

You'll need room for at least <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> in your hold. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded. 

And as a fair warning, the things you'll be carrying are pricey enough that you might attract some unwanted attention. <EM4>Be ready to defend yourself</EM4> if you can't evade.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a waste material transfer going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. Wouldn't bring your cleanest ship either.

On the bright side though, most likely outlaws will leave you alone when they see what you're carrying. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Potential Security Threat
contracts.description:
Several unknown ships have been spotted in areas frequented by haulers delivering goods for our client. They’re worried these ships are monitoring their haulers in preparation for an ambush, so they’ve hired us to patrol the area. 

Start by going to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan it to ensure it’s clear. After that, we’ll send you to some other areas to scan for potential threats. We recommend that you bring a <EM4>wingman</EM4> and plenty of supplies to be ready to handle whatever might come your way.     

Also know that successfully completing this contract will earn the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
unlocks: Red Level Contract: High-Risk Security Patrol

contracts.title: Looking For Trouble
contracts.description:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

You make it to the end and I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Ship Under Attack
contracts.description:
An emergency contract just came in about a fight near ~mission(Location|Address). Apparently a group of ships were ambushed by outlaws led by ~mission(TargetName), who's been wanted on multiple planets for murder and ship theft. Foxwell's looking for top tier combat pilots to go and protect the clients against them.

This one's been flagged as a red level contract so it's really dangerous. If you have people you could bring, you probably should. If you do, you should also let them know about Foxwell's hiring policies. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Primo Target
contracts.description:
Got a platinum target that needs to get taken down. ~mission(TargetName) is a heavy hitter who's one of the people running security for Citizens for Prosperity. Although ~mission(TargetName|Last) might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. We want blood for blood.

They've been spotted poking around ~mission(Location|Address), so you should still be able to find them there.

They're a mean bastard, so bring some friends but make sure they end up dead.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Wipe Out XenoThreat Servers
contracts.description:
Something just fell into my lap that is way too good to pass up. XenoThreat's intelligence gathering is a bit of legend in the circles I run in and it turns out that they're storing a whole heap of their best intel at ~mission(Location|Address).

Would be a shame if someone, say like you, were to go there and blow it all up, huh? 

-Stows out

contracts.title: Hit a CFP Complex
contracts.description:
Got a big one here. We need a team to head out to ~mission(Location|Address). Word is CFP are dug in at three different clusters in the area. Our judge wants them all cleared out. Seems one of their mercs, a real mean skag named ~mission(TargetName), is holed up at one of them. We want you to go there, clear them all out and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Get yourself a nice little payday in the process.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Drop a XenoThreat
contracts.description:
Got a line on a XenoThreat that's been a pain in the ass. Not sure if you've heard the name, but ~mission(TargetName) is a scumbag even by XenoThreat standards. Vicious, sadistic, and a prick to boot. We want someone to punch their number. You up for it?

Last word was that they were somewhere around ~mission(Location|Address). Head there and take 'em out. Pretty simple.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Dangerous Ambush
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high profile client recently lost an important shipment when a pilot double-crossed them and ran off with their product. After weeks of hunting we’ve discovered that they were connected with an outlaw pack, so the client is looking to us to deter similar future issues from arising. The ultimate target is the pilot of a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, who leads the crew responsible. This won’t be easy. They don’t go anywhere without escort fighters and sub-capital ships. That’s why we highly recommend that you find a trusted friend or two who can handle this with you.  
  
Intel gathered by our analysts indicates that they frequently fly by an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> which would provide an excellent area to stage a surprise strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. We’re also adding a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> that’ll go to the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Tactical Strike
contracts.description:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Reclaiming Outposts from XenoThreat
contracts.description:
Looking for any available security personnel to reclaim several clusters previously lost to XenoThreat aggressors. Located near ~mission(Location|Address), they had been seized in brutal attacks led by ~mission(TargetName), a notorious XenoThreat lieutenant.

We're looking to take these clusters back so we can reestablish operations and continue our good work. You'll need to clear all the hostiles still on-site as well as ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Just a reminder, that XenoThreat are highly trained and quick to fight, so prepare accordingly.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
contracts.description:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

contracts.title: Time to roll on CFP
contracts.description:
Looking for anyone with an itchy trigger finger. We're looking to move against some CFP at  ~mission(Location|Address) and take it for ourselves. You gotta play this smart though. There are a bunch of satellite outposts around the main one and all of 'em got security, so you should take out each of these before you take the main base.

But hey, if you wanna jump right in the deep end and fight off all the reinforcements, that's on you. As long as you get it done.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Recover Vanduul Corpses
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: <EM4>Cargo Capable Ship</EM4>, Personal Arms, <EM4>Heavy-Duty Tractor Beam</EM4>
Briefing: 
Our latest intel shows that the Shattered Blade have replenished their stock of Vanduul corpses and will shortly be transferring them from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4>they're operating from to an interested buyer. The UEE can't have another incident like what happened with ASD so they're eager for us to <EM4>recover the cryopods</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

While the Shattered Blade members present at the site might offer resistance, they are not the focus of you mission. Deal with them as needed and get the cryopods. 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Find XenoThreat Captives and Stolen Data
contracts.description:
A small group of Citizens for Prosperity members were supposed to be delivering sensitive data back to our headquarters in Stanton, but they never arrived. 

We now believe that they were captured by XenoThreat before they could leave the system. I'd like you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to the missing crew and then destroy any servers they could be using to store the stolen data.

Your help is very appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Get the Good Stuff
contracts.description:
Need someone to raid a base at ~mission(Location|Address) for us. Not sure exactly who’s dug in there, but they attacked one of our ships and took the drugs they were hauling. Really need that shit back. That batch is full of high potency stuff that’s worth a premium. 

Doubt they’ll want to give it back to you, so plan to take it by force. Then bring the goods to ~mission(Destination|Address). And don’t act like an idiot and get any ideas of what you could do with that stuff. Trust me, you don’t wanna get on my bad side. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Ling Family [ReputationRank] Cargo Haul - [CargoGradeToken] Scale
contracts.description:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad
contracts.description:
Foxwell got word from an important client that outlaws have put together a squad that’s been stalking the system with sub-capital ships and escort fighters. Our client is concerned that if left unchecked, outlaws will create more of these attack squads and destabilize system security. We’ve been hired to wipe out this group before that happens. 

We need a confident and skilled contractor for this task. Good news is that we have a plan in place. One of the ships used by this squad, a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, was stolen from our client, who’s still able to track its movements. They’ve shared the location data with us and we’ve discovered that this squad often goes by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We’ve scouted the location and discovered a large emission cloud makes an ideal spot for an ambush.  

Not going to lie, this isn’t going to be easy. We don’t have any additional forces available to deploy, so it would be good to bring your own support. 

You manage to pull this off, I've arranged for a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor

contracts.title: Tactical Strike
contracts.description:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Stuck Ling Shipment Pending Delivery
contracts.description:
Hey,

Just our luck that we land one of the biggest contracts of our life and our hauler's engines seize up. They've tried their best to fix it but seems like it's just not happening.

Can you fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and grab the cargo for us? It's really important that we show our client that we're just as reliable as the other big players out there.

Just so you know this is a large shipment. You'll need a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Once you've transferred it to your ship, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll send confirmation to the client.

Considering the circumstances, we're paying above market rates to whoever can complete this.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Turf War
contracts.description:
One of our Judges caught wind of XenoThreat trying to move in on our territory. Seems like they’re trying to take over ~mission(Location|Address). We don’t want to let those psychos get any more of a foothold in system than they already have, so we’re putting some creds on the line to get ‘em to back off.

We want you to come down on them hard. Don’t let up till the whole place is a graveyard. We’ll send your payment once the bodies are ready to bury.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: Collect Irradiated Kopion Horns
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but for our scientists to continue their efforts they need resources that the company's suppliers have been unable to deliver. 

There is a sizeable population of kopions that have been exposed to radiation near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Rayari is seeking an contractor to collect <EM4>irradiated kopion horns</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Due to the scarcity of this resource, we are prepared to pay a high service fee. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Repel Raiders
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

There’s a serious problem brewing for one of our clients at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They’ve been warned that a highly skilled outlaw crew has their sights set on overrunning and occupying that location. We’ve been hired to make sure that doesn’t happen. 

Need a contractor to deploy to the location immediately. Based on the intel provided by the client, this won’t be a walk in the park. We strongly advise you to bring allies and plenty of supplies to help ward of the impending attack.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Protecting outpost from XenoThreat
contracts.description:
XenoThreat forces launched an unprovoked attack near ~mission(Location|Address). We're looking for any available combat operators to go and provide support. 

If you haven't dealt with them before, it's important to know that XenoThreat are trained fighters so this will not be an easy fight, but it's a necessary one.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Reclaiming Clusters from Headhunters
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity's board just authorized funds to hire security personnel to retake several clusters near ~mission(Location|Address) that have since fallen into the hands of the Headhunters. While we tried to just accept the loss, it's become apparent that they are crucial to our ongoing operations in the system.

You'll need to clear out each of the locations that will be provided but more importantly, you'll also need to take out ~mission(TargetName), who's in charge of the hostiles on site.

These Headhunters are heavily embedded and have a history of violence, so you should prepare accordingly. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Delivery of Abandoned Ling Cargo
contracts.description:
Hey,

Need a reliable contractor to help us out with a bit of a situation.

Our of our haulers has dropped out mid-contract and now our client's cargo is stuck in transit. Think they were trying to negotiate a better rate with us, but that's not how Ling does business. Anyway, they're done and we desperately need the shipment finished.

Petra and I have been working with this client for years now and have built up a good rapport. Be a shame to throw that all a way because of an unreliable hauler. Can you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and collect the shipment? You'll need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Take the shipment to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll get you paid as soon as. We'd really appreciate your help with this and I'm sure our client would too.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: A little retaliation
contracts.description:
Been getting word that CFP security have been getting a little more aggressive and started pushing people out of the homes they've built out of the scrap in the system and they want payback, so they came to us.

Head out to ~mission(Location|Address) and clear out the CFP there. Should be pretty cut and dry with a nice payday.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Retrieve Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
Looking for a contractor with the right skills and ship for an important mission. Outlaws ambushed a Hull C carrying a <EM4>~mission(CargoGradeToken)</EM4> load of cargo and took it to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We’ve been hired to get it all back.  

The cargo is being stored somewhere at a defunct Hathor facility. The place is big and crawling with outlaws. Need someone to retrieve the goods from the freight elevator there and deliver it all back to the <EM4>freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Don’t think this will be a walk in the park. Bring lots of ammo and a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. 

It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Find Missing Cargo Hauler
contracts.description:
Hey, 

One of our veteran haulers got sick and backed out of a run that we desperately needed. ~mission(TargetName) stepped up and offered to do it. I was hesitant to give it to ‘em because it’s riskier than the routes they normally do. Seems like my concern was warranted. Last update we got from ‘em was near ~mission(Location|Address), which is XenoThreat territory.

Can’t have this hanging over my head much longer. Any chance you’d be willing to head to their last known location and see if you can find out what happened? It’d mean a lot to me and others. Not only to know the status of ~mission(TargetName) but also the cargo, which is really needed at ~mission(Destination|Address). If you find it and complete the delivery, it would be a huge help to the CFP members there.   

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Cargo Retrieval
contracts.description:
Need someone to snag some cargo for us. We were using an old Hathor PAF for dead drops, but a local gang has dug in and we can’t get our shit.

If you feel like kicking some ass, grab the cargo from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

From what I’ve heard this place is full of all sorts. Won’t be easy getting out stuff back, but that’s what we’re paying you for.

Just make sure you got a ship that can handle a <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> load, and try not to get shot in the process. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a bunch of comms this morning. Seems one of the local trash collectors' ship is busted and we're gonna be picking up the slack.

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Experienced Protection Detail Needed
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of my clients needs an immediate escort through dangerous space. Rendezvous at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and they’ll meet you after they launch. Reports indicate increased outlaw activity in the area, so don’t let your guard down.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

contracts.title: Secure Our Airspace
contracts.description:
Our airspace around <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> has been compromised. Enemy ships are threatening the base and any of our ships in the area. Gotta put a stop to this immediately, so get your shit in order and get over there. Just get going and I’ll update you with any relevant info on where you’re needed. 
 
If you need any extra motivation, I’m adding a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows

contracts.title: Retaking Outposts from Headhunters
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near ~mission(Location|Address) from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by ~mission(TargetName) and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that ~mission(TargetName|Last) tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Operative Extraction
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: An undercover agent of ours was compromised and is now being pursued by the outlaw pack they had infiltrated. As such, they are in need of immediate extraction at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Once on site, engage with all hostiles in order to provide cover so our operative can QT away.

<EM4>Bring additional backup</EM4> and don't underestimate these outlaws. They are violent and motivated so they are unlikely to give up anytime soon.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Neutralize UEE Threat: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: Seemingly unsatisfied with their takings in Nyx, an outlaw group lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a major strike against the UEE. This cannot be allowed to come to pass.

Thanks to the work of our Intelligence team, we've been able to track them down to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Head there as soon as you can and engage before they have a chance to leave the system. Based on our strategic analysis, we recommend a <EM4>well-armed and skilled fleet</EM4> will be necessary for the successful completion of this mission.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Ship Protection Needed
contracts.description:
We’ve got clients reporting outlaw attacks on ships around <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>. They got locked down tight and anybody heading in or out is a target. Any attempts to solve the issue have just been met with more outlaw reinforcements appearing. 

The client is desperate for a solution, so we’re hiring a contractor to go and restore peace in the area. If any other issues flare up once you're there, I’ll comm you directions on how to help.  

Really need someone on this fast. So to sweeten the pot, the main contractor will also get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Protect Our Client’s Interests

contracts.title: Find Headhunter Crewmember and Help Finish the Job
contracts.description:
I'm a bit at the end of my rope. I had sent ~mission(TargetName), a pretty dependable Headhunter, out to destroy the XenoThreat data servers at ~mission(Location|Address).

That was a while ago and I still haven't heard from them and the servers are still sitting there intact. 

Do me a favor, huh? Go on over and see if you can figure out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|NickOrFirst) and help finish destroying the servers.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Crash some ships
contracts.description:
A lotta wannabe gangs have stepped to the Headhunters over the years thinking that they could force their way into the system. We're still here. They aren't. But it seems the survivors of these groups have decided to band together and try again. Guess some people never learn.

Latest group hit a couple of our convoys while on supply runs. Shouldn't be a surprise that the Judge wants to stomp them out quick. We've learned they're out near ~mission(Location|Address) and likely rearming for another attack. 

We want you to go there and make them wish they died with their old gang.

Stows out

contracts.title: Wanted: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
We got a greenlight to finally take out ~mission(TargetName). They've been a pain in our ass ever since they came to the system a few years ago and it's finally time to take them out once and for all. 

We've gotten word that ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying near ~mission(Location|Address) and the Judge wants this handled now.

Take 'em out.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: Kill Order
contracts.description:
Need another CFP ship taken out. It belongs to ~mission(TargetName), who's been  driving locals out of their homes if they don't accept Citizens for Prosperity help. They're a real piece of work and we've been given the go-ahead to take them down.

Their ship was spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so head out there and do the deed.

Stows out.
