contracts.title: Additional Resources For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: need an out?
contracts.description:
Hi there. We haven’t had a chance to work together yet but I’m in a bit of a bind here and I could use another body. Not for nothing, of course. I’m all for a good quid pro quo.

One of my associates who was serving some time in Klescher was supposed to bring me a datachip, but then they went quiet. Now I’m assuming they’re dead, but here’s the deal: if you finish his job, I wipe your crimestat. Not bad, right?

Your predecessor was apparently planning on using some old tunnels to make his escape. He made it sound like they weren't exactly the easiest thing to access, but I trust you can figure it out. I'm guessing you'll find his body somewhere in there and if we’re lucky, he'll still have the chip on him.

Once you get it, finish getting out however you can. Then get the data to me. There’s a spot nearby you can upload the chip’s contents. You might want to watch out for Hurston Security, though. They've been a hassle lately, so I wouldn't be surprised if you ran into them. After I get the data and validate it, I’ll wipe your crimestat. 

Then you can go and enjoy your newfound freedom. If you do this right, maybe I’ll have more lucrative work for you down the line.

contracts.title: let's help each other
contracts.description:
Hey there. I heard you ended up in Klescher which is a real drag. But it might actually be a lucky day for both of us.

Long story short, I had somebody sneaking a datachip out of the prison, but they never got back to me. I know for a fact they haven’t left the facility, so I think something might have happened to them. While tragic, business must carry on. If you can get the chip and finish the job, I can clear your crimestat for you. What do you say?

Of course, I don't know exactly how far they got, but I can tell you that the prison's got a whole network of hidden tunnels my guy was planning on using to make his escape. My guess is his corpse is rotting away somewhere there.

Once you find the body, I’m hoping the chip will still be on him. When you’ve got it, finish escaping and get the data to me. There’s a spot nearby you can upload the chip’s contents. 

One warning though, you might want to watch out for Hurston Security. They've been a hassle lately, so I wouldn't be surprised if you ran into them.

When I've got the data I’ll wipe your crimestat and then, voila, you’ll be free and clear. What you do after that is entirely up to you.

contracts.title: High Risk Shipment Recovery
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got a transport in need of backup over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Signal was patchy, but their comms made it sound like a group of outlaws had gotten wind of what they were hauling and attempted to take it from them.

Considering the state of things before we lost contact, I'm considering this a recovery mission. Multiple hostiles are expected at the site, so a skilled crew is crucial for the success of this operation. There will be a high volume of cargo to deal with, so a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> will be needed. 

Upon successful extraction of cargo, deliver to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Recoup Stolen Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
A crew recently raided a distribution center and made off with <EM4>~mission(CargoGradeToken) load of cargo</EM4>. Foxwell has been hired to get all those goods back. We’re getting reports of these outlaws using old Hathor facilities as stash houses and we believe the stolen items are currently at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

If interested, you’ll need a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. Doubt you’ll be able to slip in and out of that PAF without being noticed either, so best be prepared to clear the location. Once safe, grab the goods from the freight elevator and deliver them to the <EM4>freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Crucial Supplies Need Retrieving
contracts.description:
We were in the process of delivering an urgent shipment to the folks over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> when our pilot ran into a group of outlaws. They tried to run, but it was already too late.

There is silver lining though. The trackers are showing the cargo is still intact, located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. There's a good chance the outlaws are guarding it while they locate a ship big enough to transport everything. While I don't want to risk losing another pilot, the need of the cargo aboard is desperate enough that it justifies the decision to send someone to recover it.

This won't be easy, these outlaws showed our pilot no mercy. You'll need to take them out first before getting the cargo back. Bring a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for the moving. Deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination)</EM4>  and let's make this right.

Fly safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Raid to Recover Supplies
contracts.description:
Hey,

Outlaws in the system have been getting aggressive lately, targeting more of our convoys. They recently ambushed one of our cargo ships and stole supplies desperately needed by our operations. If we don’t get it back, we’re worried that the locals will start losing faith. They need to know that Citizens for Prosperity can’t just be bullied out of operation.

We managed to track the outlaws to ~mission(Location|Address). Now we need someone who isn’t afraid of crossing these criminals to recover the shipment and deliver it to ~mission(Destination|Address). 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

So, do you think you could make the run for us?

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.description:
Hey,

Outlaws in the system have been getting aggressive lately, targeting more of our convoys. They recently ambushed one of our cargo ships and stole supplies desperately needed by our operations. If we don’t get it back, we’re worried that the locals will start losing faith. They need to know that Citizens for Prosperity can’t just be bullied out of operation.

contracts.title: Locate Missing Family Member
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP45648
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has tasked us with tracking down with one of their family members who has gone missing. After exhibiting erratic behavior, they cut off all communications and left for ~mission(System). We were able to track down their general whereabouts but need an investigator to head there in person to assess the situation.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
There is a high chance that you will encounter hostiles while conducting your search. We recommend considering bringing along backup to support you.

contracts.title: Taking Back Our Goods
contracts.description:
Some upstarts hit my hauling crew on their way to do a delivery. Our tracker is telling us that our ship’s still located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> so I need you to head over there and get the cargo. You’ll need <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to lug the goods from the ship.

I’d bet that whoever attacked us is still there waiting. Arm up, bring your crew, and if you can, give them one from me.

Once you’ve taken back our goods, drop it off at the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Taking Back Our Goods
contracts.description:
Some upstarts hit my hauling crew on their way to do a delivery. Our tracker is telling us that our ship’s still located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> so I need you to head over there and get the cargo. You’ll need <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to lug the goods from the ship.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Jackpot
contracts.description:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, there’s a catch.

The cargo’s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ain’t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesn’t deserve to go to anyone else. I’ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

Be lucky as hell if we were the first to know about this, but I’d wager there’s gonna be more ships swarming around there than flies on a kopian carcass. If you got some pals you can trust, bring them along and ghost those assholes. And don’t forget your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> of course.

You manage to get that cargo and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>, I can get you a nice cut of the sale.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Stock Taking
contracts.description:
I won’t bore you with the details, all you need to know is: one of our haulers got attacked and now our goods are sitting in a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Up to you how you get the goods out, but if you happen to ghost a few of our rivals in the process, I ain’t complaining. Once you’ve got the stuff take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>, then we can sort your payment. 

A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: XL Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Headhunter attack on [Location]
contracts.description:
A distress call just came in from ~mission(Location|Address) claiming that a large Headhunter force has just attacked our outpost there. There have been multiple deaths and injuries from those who managed to flee the scene. We're looking for any available security personnel to head there and retake the outpost.

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Help defend [Location] from Headhunters
contracts.description:
We just received a frantic comm from ~mission(Location|Address) and are looking for any available combat specialists to help repel a Headhunter attack. There are still hostiles on site and there are reports of several casualties so we need this handled quickly.

I will provide all relevant data upon acceptance. Thank you for your assistance.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Protect [Location] from XenoThreat Attack
contracts.description:
We’ve learned that XenoThreat is about to launch an attack on ~mission(Location|Address). If they are successful, the number of casualties is expected to be high. I’m hoping that with your aid in defending them, we can make sure that doesn’t happen.
 
We know from past encounters that XenoThreat sends several raiding parties to carry out their attacks, so make sure you don’t leave the outpost until you’ve fought off all the reinforcements. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Outlaw attack at [Location]
contracts.description:
Several CFP clusters near ~mission(Location|Address) just got hit by a group of outlaws led by ~mission(TargetName). We're looking for any available combat specialists to help retake the outposts.

I can provide the locations upon acceptance but we need to clear out the main outpost and satellite installations from all hostile forces and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last) as it's unlikely that they will not cease their hostilities if they escape.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Need Resource for Research\n
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current ‘Regen Crisis’ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

We’ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we won’t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team can’t wait that long, and we’re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, there’s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #5
contracts.description:
Congrats on completing part four of this eight-part course.   

The fifth scenario focuses on defensive tactics. Knowing when to take evasive measures and deploy either decoys or noise countermeasures is essential to your survival. That’s why the aggressors in this exercise will be armed with missiles.   

Ensure your countermeasures are fully stocked and then go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to start.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Ready to Launch - Easy access to your decoys and countermeasures can be critical in your success in dealing with incoming missile fire. 
- Stand and Fight - Resist the temptation to hit the afterburner to escape as you’ll increase your signature and make it easier for the missile to hit you. They’re almost certainly much faster than you anyway.
- Close the Gap – While it may seem counterintuitive, getting closer to an enemy ship can be an advantage. Missiles have a minimum range and if you’re inside of it they won’t be able to get a lock on you.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent order,we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Need a death at [Location]
contracts.description:
Need someone taken care of. They're holed up near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure if you care who they are, but their name's ~mission(TargetName). Not much to tell, local thug who killed someone who was connected.

They've been on the run, so they're gonna be skittish. I'd approach with caution.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Additional Resources For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: High-Risk Ship Encounter
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we recommended that a client use a specific route to cross Nyx safely. Turns out it wasn’t as secure as we assumed, because a group ambushed our client’s ship. We need to get this cleaned up ASAP. Are you available to help? 

Intel from the client indicates a well-organized attack, so you better be equipped to deal with experienced hostiles on this one. Hurry to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, help them survive this, and we’ll pay you well for your trouble.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Convoy Caught in Brutal Attack
contracts.description:
We just received word that a convoy of Citizen for Prosperity affiliated ships have been targeted by outlaws and that our people are in dire need of assistance. 

If you are available, we need combat ready pilots at ~mission(Location|Address) to defend our people. Note that at this dire time, we cannot afford even a single lost ship and expect with your assistance for all of our people make it out alive.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Find Missing Cargo Hauler
contracts.description:
Hey, 

One of our veteran haulers got sick and backed out of a run that we desperately needed. ~mission(TargetName) stepped up and offered to do it. I was hesitant to give it to ‘em because it’s riskier than the routes they normally do. Seems like my concern was warranted. Last update we got from ‘em was near ~mission(Location|Address), which is XenoThreat territory.

Can’t have this hanging over my head much longer. Any chance you’d be willing to head to their last known location and see if you can find out what happened? It’d mean a lot to me and others. Not only to know the status of ~mission(TargetName) but also the cargo, which is really needed at ~mission(Destination|Address). If you find it and complete the delivery, it would be a huge help to the CFP members there.   

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Lima Endicott

contracts.title: Bring Down the Hammer
contracts.description:
Sent ships to investigate a distress beacon only for it to turn into an ambush by the People’s Alliance. They’ve been fighting like hell to get away but can’t seem to extract themselves.

Let’s get ‘em some help on the double. Think you can go on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to give ‘em some support?

-Stows

contracts.title: Assist Retreating Ship
contracts.description:
One of our people is currently under attack at ~mission(Location|Address). They have attempted to elude their attackers to get to safely, but the outlaws have proven too skilled for them to break away. 

We need you to fly there, engage with the attackers, and then destroy the nearby fuel reserves. The hope is that this display of destruction will dissuade them from continuing pursuit.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Destroy XenoThreat Logistic Data
contracts.description:
We got a bit of a problem that I'm hoping you can solve for me. One of our informers has revealed that XenoThreat has been amassing data on Citizens for Prosperity operations throughout the system. 

This information, if used correctly, could put our people at serious risk. The best solution is for you to completely destroy the servers where the data is being stored at ~mission(Location|Address).

With their trove of information wiped out, it should give our people a fighting chance.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: [Location] needs help
contracts.description:
We just received reports of a massive attack against ~mission(Location) by a large group of armed individuals led by ~mission(TargetName), a notorious outlaw who has been threatening Citizens for Prosperity personnel for months. Details are still yet to be confirmed but we know there have been multiple casualties.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any qualified security personnel to go and retake the outposts from these hostile elements. Our understanding is that ~mission(TargetName|Last) tends to hide behind their soldiers, but will emerge if you take enough of the rank-and-file out.

While we don't like to resort to violence, management can see no other way of resolving this situation and continuing our good work in the system.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Defenders needed against Headhunters
contracts.description:
We received an emergency comm from ~mission(Location|Address) reporting that they are currently under attack by a group of Headhunters. We know our presence in the system has upset the Headhunters, but it hardly excuses this unprovoked attack.

If available, please gather your gear and head out. Just understand that Headhunters are experienced fighters and will not back down easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Taking back from the Headhunters
contracts.description:
We are currently looking for any qualified and available security operatives to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) and reclaim a CFP installation that had been taken by Headhunters. 

The group that's currently occupying the outpost is being led by ~mission(TargetName), a Headhunter of some note who's had a history of aggression against locals and CFP volunteers.

We need all Headhunters secured and ~mission(TargetName|Last) taken out.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Blow Up Citizens for Prosperity Fuel Reserves
contracts.description:
I'm getting pretty bloody sick of Citizens for Prosperity sticking their noses where they don't belong. 

Started thinking that it might be pretty nice to ground their fleet for a little bit. We blow up their fuel tanks at ~mission(Location|Address) and those little pissheads won't be going nowhere quick.

Sound like your kinda thing?

-Stows out

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC / UCM / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent order,we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Ling Family [ReputationRank] Cargo Haul - [CargoGradeToken] Scale
contracts.description:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Remove Upstart Gang From Sector
contracts.description:
It feels that whenever we start to make real progress in the system, the outlaws are there to push one step back. We had recently cleared out ~mission(Location|Address) only to learn that a new outlaw gang has taken root there, using it as a launching point for various criminal enterprises. 

Since we can't afford to let this rot spread, you and a few support ships are being charged with heading there to clear out all the gang's packs. After you deal with one pack, be sure to wait until all of the hostile packs have been dealt with.

Know that you are helping to make a real difference,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Just got off a comm with a client. They got cargo (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)  

I'd recommend taking a few minutes to plan your route before taking off. Might save you a bit of fuel. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a bunch of comms this morning. Seems one of the local trash collectors' ship is busted and we're gonna be picking up the slack.

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Intensive Eradication Effort
contracts.description:
Native plants and animals near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> are on the verge of environmental collapse due to the dramatic population spikes of several invasive species. We’ve been contracted to dramatically reduce the current population of these species to help avoid an environmental collapse. We need a dedicated and highly skilled exterminator to carry out this contract.     

You can better acquaint yourself with the creatures in question by referencing <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Find XenoThreat Captive and Stolen Data
contracts.description:
The family of ~mission(TargetName), a Citizens for Prosperity courier, has been in contact with me with the terrible news that they never arrived back home. We learned that ~mission(TargetName|First) was captured by XenoThreat while transporting some critical data. 

We need you to search ~mission(Location|Address) and see if you can learn what has become of ~mission(TargetName|First) and then destroy any XenoThreat servers that may contain stolen data.

Thank you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Find Headhunter Captive and Stolen Data
contracts.description:
I just have received confirmation that ~mission(TargetName), a Citizens for Prosperity courier, was captured by the Headhunters while transporting some critical data. 

We need you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to ~mission(TargetName|First) and then destroy any Headhunter servers that may contain stolen data.

We're counting on you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Ling Family [ReputationRank] Cargo Haul - [CargoGradeToken] Scale
contracts.description:
Hi, 
 
Normally Reyes schedules our hauls, but she’s gone for the day, and I just got a comm inquiring about a simple, direct run from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. The cargo is a load of fruit that will lose its value if it spoils. We don't want to anger this client, so would appreciate it if you knocked this out in a timely manner.  

Here’s some other details you should know. The largest container used is <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>, so don’t forget your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. 

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: DEAD SAINTS - Trial Cargo Haul
contracts.description:
Call me Twitch. I run the Dead Saints. 

I doubt this is the first time you've heard of us, but in case you haven't, we do a lot of things, but one of them is transporting goods that need discreet handling. 

I got your info from one of my contacts. They say you've got the stuff we like in a hauler, which works for me, because we're looking for one. 

Here's my proposal – we're offering creds to the pilot that can transport some special cargo for us. Your ship’s hold will need room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and you'll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading. All you have to do is get everything from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> without getting security involved. 
 
If you can pull the job off, the Saints will have more contracts for you down the line. 

-Twitch
unlocks: DEAD SAINTS -- [ReputationRank] Rank, [CargoGradeToken] Scale Cargo Run

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Updated Power Usage Data
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
It would be helpful to have the most recent energy anomaly data so that we can compare it to what you delivered last time. Any difference between the two data sets could prove useful.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Energy Anomaly data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll send you a <EM4>ASD Secure Drive</EM4> that you can collect at your home location.

contracts.title: Cargo Transfer from Shuttered Facility
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL 
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' 
----------------------------    

ASD reached out to us as it seems one of their old labs, <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, still has some cargo being stored there they want to get their hands on.

You would fly there in a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size, land in the hangar, load up from the freight elevator, and then transport it all back to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Just be sure to keep your head on swivel while you’re at the facility and try not to let your curiosity get the better of you Abandoned sites like this can be home to all sort of nastiness.  And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

BE YOUR BEST – Take pride in the work you do and you’ll do work to be proud of.

contracts.title: Protect [Location] from XenoThreat Raid
contracts.description:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is targeting ~mission(Location|Address) to send a message to other settlers about what happens if they accept our support. 

If you’re able to fend off the attackers, I’m sure they’ll send additional forces, so you’ll need to dig in for multiple assaults. Since XenoThreat has a lot of resources at their disposal, you should think about recruiting others to help you keep everyone safe.

We’re all counting on you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Hit a CFP Ship
contracts.description:
CFP Security forces have been attacking locals and we're looking to balance the scales. Caught wind of one in particular named ~mission(TargetName|Last) who's been causing some damage and we need them taken out.

You can find them flying around ~mission(Location|Address). Go introduce yourself.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Recover Cargo
contracts.description:
Hi,

Someone knocked out one of our supply ships and towed it to ~mission(Location|Address). We really need the cargo onboard. You available to head over there and recover that cargo? 

Once you’ve got the goods, we need them taken to their original destination at ~mission(Destination|Address). Did a little digging into this group, and let’s just say, they don’t come off as very professional. Shouldn’t give you too much resistance, but still best to show up ready to throw down.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Fly Safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at QV Breaker Station
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Nyx
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Claw Salamanders

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Special Covalex Delivery Stanton System
contracts.description:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. contracts.title: Gone But Not Forgotten
contracts.description:
Not sure what happened, but a ship moving some important supplies across the system disappeared around ~mission(Location|Address). Our crew at ~mission(Destination|Address) really needs that cargo for an upcoming operation. Any chance you could go looking for the ship and help complete the delivery?

Have no idea what happened, but my bet’s that they got ghosted. Maybe it’s just me, but I’d rather be a prepared pessimist and an ill-equipped optimist. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Reclaim XenoThreat Outpost
contracts.description:
Despite our efforts to promote non-violence, local outlaw groups continue to attack our organization. XenoThreat recently assaulted ~mission(Location|Address) and chased out our volunteers that had been working there.

We're looking to enlist combat personnel to retake the outpost. Ideally we could work something out to encourage them to move on, but XenoThreat quickly resorts to violence to solve all their issues so there will undoubtedly be a fight.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Wipe Citizens for Prosperity Data Farm
contracts.description:
Turns out those Citizens for Prosperity bastards have been gathering intel on us. They're going to try to cut us off from several revenue streams and bleed us dry. Can't let that happen. 

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy their data storage. 

That should teach them not to stick their noses where they don't belong.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Blow Up Citizens for Prosperity Fuel Reserves
contracts.description:
I'm getting pretty bloody sick of Citizens for Prosperity sticking their noses where they don't belong. 

Started thinking that it might be pretty nice to ground their fleet for a little bit. We blow up their fuel tanks at ~mission(Location|Address) and those little pissheads won't be going nowhere quick.

Sound like your kinda thing?

-Stows out

contracts.title: Knock Power Out
contracts.description:
Got a few scavs that have rooted themselves into ~mission(Location|Address). We have our own plans there and need the place cleared out. 

That's why I want you to ho and turn off their power. Let's see if that doesn't cause these rats to abandon the place for good.

-Stows

contracts.title: Convince Upstarts to Abandon Sector
contracts.description:
Everyone has been talking about a new player named ~mission(TargetName) who is operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). They've become a real concern for the Headhunters. 

It's time to shut them down. 

Head over, take out ~mission(TargetName|Last) and then clear out any fuel stores they have there to convince anyone remaining to leave. 

Figure after you pull this off, nobody will even remember their name.

-Stows

contracts.title: Defend InterSec Operative
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship 
Briefing: Require urgent assistance for an InterSec operative who is currently under fire at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

A group of outlaws had previously taken our operative captive with the intention of extracting sensitive information from them, but miraculously they were able to escape. Unfortunately, the pursuing outlaws now have them pinned down.

Due to the number of the ships assaulting them, we're offering additional compensation to accommodate the added danger. <EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is highly advised.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

contracts.title: New Defense Contract: [TargetName] Elimination
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been hired to combat the rising number of outlaws using Nyx as a staging ground for their operations, with the intention of attacking neighboring UEE systems.

As a preventative measure, we require you to travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and eliminate the ringleader <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> to deter their planned attack on Stanton. They and their crew are highly dangerous and you are <EM4>advised  to bring a wingman</EM4> for support.

Contractors who can prove themselves reliable and competent in executing operations will be eligible for future missions with InterSec.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Terrorist [TargetName] to be Neutralized
contracts.description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has identified more outlaws who are planning an operation against UEE interests from within Nyx. Your mission will be to neutralize this potential threat before they can enact their plans.

Travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and dispatch the leader of these outlaws, <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> without hesitation. We have scouted a small number of ships, but our report suggest these are competent pilots - <EM4>bringing back up is advised.</EM4>

Remember that eliminating these outlaws not only serves the people of Nyx, but the UEE too.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

contracts.title: Hit XenoThreat at [Location]
contracts.description:
One of our people stumbled across a group of XenoThreat hiding out over near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure if they're dug in or just passing through, but we want to hit them before they move.

Maybe bring some people if you got 'em because XenoThreat don't tend to go down easy. Get there and remind them who the power is in this system.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
contracts.description:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and I’m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step – cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and that’s great news for both of us.   
 
If you’ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and I’ve got a haul of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but here’s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a ‘trusted contractor’ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

contracts.title: Missing Volunteers
contracts.description:
Two of our volunteers vanished while on a recent foraging expedition. It has been over two standard days since their disappearance, and their families have begun to fear the worst and are willing to offer a reward if someone can help trace their whereabouts.

They were last seen in the vicinity of ~mission(Location|Address). It is possible that they may have been injured and sought shelter in an abandoned building or a cave. The area is full of potential hiding spots, so your search will need to be thorough. 

Thank you for taking this on. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Red Wind Special Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We have a special assignment for only the most competent contractors. One of our haulers who is sadly no longer with us failed to complete their last job. The cargo they were supposed to deliver is sitting stationary in their former ship in the location listed below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

I’m not going dance around the issue, this is an extremely challenging job. You’ll need to bring a strong team of skilled pilots with you to deal with the outlaws that killed the previous contractor and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s cargo. That said, if you take on this contract, we will make it worth your time.

HOW DID WE DO – Complete our short feedback survey on our Spectrum page for a chance to enter our monthly prize draw.

contracts.title: Recover VIP Covalex Shipment
contracts.description:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Blow Up XenoThreat Fuel Reserves
contracts.description:
It seems that XenoThreat has gotten the same intel we did and are looking to pull off the same job as us. 

I want you to knock the competition out of the picture. Go to ~mission(Location|Address) and take out the fuel tanks they got there.

Then my people can finish up without worrying about XenoThreat crashing the party.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Ship Needs Emergency Assistance
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

I'll instruct our traders to be more careful about who they deal with in the future, but for now, I would really appreciate you lending them a hand in fighting off these attackers. 

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Those XenoThreat assholes ambushed one of our outposts. We eventually kicked their ass out of there but once the cowards knew they'd been beat, they took ~mission(TargetName) hostage as a Human shield. We let 'em go, because we don't betray our own like that, but we're not planning on letting this stand. 

Word is that they fled to their base at ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to break in, find ~mission(TargetName|Last), and relay the info back to me. There's a lot of creds in it for you if you do the job right. 

Keep in mind this isn't their only outpost in the system. If they give you the slip, you may need to track them to another sector. 

Stows out.

We let 'em go, because we don't betray our own like that, but we're not planning on letting this stand. 

Word is that they fled to their base at ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to break in, find ~mission(TargetName|Last), and relay the info back to me. There's a lot of creds in it for you if you do the job right. 

Keep in mind this isn't their only outpost in the system. If they give you the slip, you may need to track them to another sector. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Find Headhunter Crewmember and Help Finish the Job
contracts.description:
I'm a bit at the end of my rope. I had sent ~mission(TargetName), a pretty dependable Headhunter, out to destroy the XenoThreat data servers at ~mission(Location|Address).

That was a while ago and I still haven't heard from them and the servers are still sitting there intact. 

Do me a favor, huh? Go on over and see if you can figure out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|NickOrFirst) and help finish destroying the servers.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Complete Stranded Ling Shipment
contracts.description:
Hello,

Some sad news. Unfortunately our hauler ran into some trouble and had to abandoned the cargo they were due to deliver. We haven't heard anything back from them so we're assuming the worse.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent average-sized order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Lrg. Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
requiresCompletion: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials

contracts.title: Special Covalex Delivery Stanton System
contracts.description:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Treat yourself to a fight
contracts.description:
Another gang tried to make a move and carve out some territory for themselves. They failed but Headhunters don't forget. We've taken out most of them but one of the last members named ~mission(TargetName) has been spotted flying around ~mission(Location|Address).

Odds are they're getting desperate, so don't underestimate them in the fight.

You'll get paid when it's done.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Protect Location
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve gotten word that outlaws have their sights set on attacking <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Our client is concerned the attack is imminent and requested that security be deployed to the site immediately. If you’re interested and available, gather all the supplies and support you may need and head to the location pronto.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Protect Settlement from Kopion Packs
contracts.description:
Members of the group Citizens for Prosperity were recently ambushed by several packs of kopions at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and have requested Highpoint's services in dealing with them. For the safety of everyone trying to settle in the area, we require the immediate services of someone who can deal with this on our behalf.

Expect a large number of animals and prepare yourself accordingly.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: [Ship] Needs Assistance
contracts.description:
Got an orange level contract for any available combat pilots. A ~mission(Ship) is under attack around ~mission(Location|Address) and is in desperate need for assistance. We're not sure how many perpetrators there are, but they seem motivated and dangerous so exercise caution.

Once on site, engage and destroy any hostiles you encounter and protect the client. Once they've transferred the credits, we'll route you your payment.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Protecting outpost from XenoThreat
contracts.description:
XenoThreat forces launched an unprovoked attack near ~mission(Location|Address). We're looking for any available combat operators to go and provide support. 

If you haven't dealt with them before, it's important to know that XenoThreat are trained fighters so this will not be an easy fight, but it's a necessary one.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Need a CFP taken down
contracts.description:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at ~mission(Location|Address). Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Wipe Citizens for Prosperity Data Farm
contracts.description:
Turns out those Citizens for Prosperity bastards have been gathering intel on us. They're going to try to cut us off from several revenue streams and bleed us dry. Can't let that happen. 

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy their data storage. 

That should teach them not to stick their noses where they don't belong.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Cull Irradiated Kopions
contracts.description:
As a consequence of the ongoing radiation storm on Pyro I, some of the invasive kopions have become irradiated. This poses a threat to the health of the indigenous wildlife and to those who live and work in <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. 

We are seeking out a skilled contractor who can cull any irradiated kopions in and around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Do not accept this contract unless you have the proper weapons and equipment that can reliably function in a radioactive environment. 

Your compensation will be adjusted to match the risks associated with this contract.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Patrol Dangerous Travel Lanes
contracts.description:
Outlaws have been increasing their activity along one of the more popular routes in the system and we’re hoping to provide a deterrent before the problem gets out of hand. As such, we’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and deal with any hostiles you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Patrol Dangerous Travel Lanes
contracts.description:
Outlaws have been increasing their activity along one of the more popular routes in the system and we’re hoping to provide a deterrent before the problem gets out of hand. As such, we’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and deal with any hostiles you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Space Patrol
contracts.description:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 


Stows out.

contracts.title: Tricky Ambush
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Looking for a competent contractor who can recruit a wingman to help execute an ambush. The target is a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> which has been involved in several operations against one of our most important clients. By neutralizing it once and for all, it’ll make our client’s life a hell of a lot easier. While the ~mission(AmbushTarget) is our focus, they usually don’t fly anywhere without a sizable escort, including large craft. 

We’ve gotten word that this group will be passing by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Any chance you could hurry and beat them there? That spot has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that you can power down your ship and hide in. Then when they pass, you should have the upper hand.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client knows this one will be tough, so they threw in a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> that’ll go to the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Reprisal Attack
contracts.description:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Just got off a comm with a client. They got cargo (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)  

I'd recommend taking a few minutes to plan your route before taking off. Might save you a bit of fuel. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
requiresCompletion: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Security Patrol
contracts.description:
A client is concerned about activity near some of their interests. We’ve been contracted to patrol the area and run scans at several locations. Interested? If so, head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start the patrol.

The client wasn’t specific about the threats, but they don’t think everything’s on the level out there. Hopefully we’ll be able to bring them some peace of mind.

Additionally, the client arranged for us to offer a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.


Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Potential Security Threat

contracts.title: Space Patrol
contracts.description:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 


Stows out.
