contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: [Location] needs assistance
contracts.description:
Headhunters have launched an unprovoked attack against ~mission(Location|Address). Although we don't support the use of violence, Citizens for Prosperity won't let innocent people die. We need qualified security personnel to retake the outpost.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Updated Seismic Data
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
One of the biggest issue when it comes to ongoing investigations is intel growing stale. To help alleviate that, I’m going to have you head back into Onyx and grab the latest seismic sensor data. Would be good to see what the latest readings say.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Seismic data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll send you a <EM4>ASD Secure Drive</EM4> that you can collect at your home location.
blueprintRewards: Zenith Laser Sniper Rifle Battery (22 Cap)

contracts.title: Eradicate All Traces of Headhunter Data
contracts.description:
We're just putting the full picture together now, but so far we've learned that a Headhunter by the name of ~mission(TargetName) recently stole some sensitive data that if exposed will be detrimental to Citizens for Prosperity's cause. 

We need to ensure that all traces of the stolen data are eradicated. This means taking out all the Headhunter servers at ~mission(Location|Address) as well as tracking down ~mission(TargetName|Last) to stop them from further disseminating the information.

Your help is much appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
contracts.description:
Recently, a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> baited Foxwell forces with a bogus rescue beacon. By the time our forces realized what was happening, a squad of ships unleashed a devastating attack and only one Foxwell contractor survived. Their scan logs identified the bait ship, and we’ve had scouts monitoring them ever since.

Our surveillance has revealed the squad has a regular flight pattern that we think we can exploit. There’s a sizable emission cloud at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that makes it an ideal spot to post up. Think you have what it takes to handle this for us? 

It’ll be you against the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, other large craft, and a sizable escort. Wish I could be more specific than that but this crew regularly rotates ships in and out of the squad. Would be smart to bring some support, so you don’t get overwhelmed by their numbers.   

Complete the job and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
unlocks: Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad

contracts.title: Reprisal Attack
contracts.description:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent average-sized order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Stop Attack on High-Profile Client
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high-profile client decided to tour Nyx system but got jumped by hostile ships around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Sounds like they’re overwhelmed. Any chance you could head to their location and provide support? 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Ship Needs Emergency Assistance
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

I'll instruct our traders to be more careful about who they deal with in the future, but for now, I would really appreciate you lending them a hand in fighting off these attackers. 

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Backup Needed Now
contracts.description: Some People’s Alliance members with a death wish decided to target one of our ships. Need someone to hustle over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show ‘em what happens when you mess with the Headhunters.\n\nStows out.

contracts.title: Headhunter Ship Needs Backup
contracts.description:
One of my pilots wasn't thinking straight and got themselves mixed up in a heap of trouble over at ~mission(Location|Address). 

The real kicker is the fool has a full hold. Can't really afford to lose the stuff they're carrying, so I'd appreciate it if you could go bail them out for me. 

- Stows out

contracts.title: Red Wind Dangerous Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Putting out a call for a highly skilled pilot who can recover our client’s cargo. Please only accept this contract if you have experience dealing with extremely hostile situations involving multiple combatants. Additional crew members and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are highly recommended.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

The cargo should be in the bay of the abandoned ship. The client has already expressed frustration regarding the cargo’s delay so please work quickly and efficiently.

BE RESILIENT – Life is hard and sometimes you have to roll with the punches. Keep going and don’t let it bring you down.

contracts.title: Bulk Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
contracts.description:
Hi,

Here's the situation. After spending an hour on comms talking to the hauler, trying to help them diagnose what's wrong with their ship, it's been decided that we now need to get someone to head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and complete the delivery.

This is a pretty big one. You'll need a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and unless you're super strong a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to shift it all.

I would really appreciate if we could just get this one done. Take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this all behind us.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #4
contracts.description:
Congrats on completing part three of this eight-part course.

Good combat pilots know not all threats are apparent. It’s the threats you don’t expect that can be the most devastating. Scenario four is focused on how to identify and deal with stealth targets. Hopefully by the end, you’ll understand just how important your radar is in determining who you’re really up against. Expect to have regular and stealth ships hunting you down.    

Make your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> whenever you’re ready, and remember to keep your eyes on your radar.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Surprise Attacks - Pinging your surroundings can sometimes reveal hidden ships. Be ready for contacts to show up unexpectedly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: Inter-Outpost Delivery at [Destination] - Multiple Boxes
contracts.description:
Hi,

Citizens for Prosperity needs help moving supplies around one of our outposts. The boxes need to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Doesn’t sound too difficult, does it? Just make sure you’re wearing a comfy pair of shoes. Also, to make your life easier, I'd bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Little Heavy Lifting at [Destination]
contracts.description:
Got a bunch of boxes sitting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that have to be moved to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Seems easy enough, right? Well, guess it ain’t. 

The idiot who was supposed to move these things threw out his back trying to carry all of ‘em at once. So, you know, maybe bring a <EM4> handheld tractor beam</EM4> and try taking ‘em one at a time like a normal person. But, hey, don’t let me tell you how to do your job. Just get it done. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Defend [Location] from Outlaws
contracts.description:
We learned that ~mission(Location|Address) is under threat of attack by outlaws and has asked for assistance. We need someone to protect them and drive away the outlaws. 

Make sure you stay close after their initial attack. Too often, outlaws win fights just by sending more bodies than anyone can reasonably defend against, so make sure you fight off any reinforcements before leaving the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Alert: [Location] under attack
contracts.description:
We need any available security personnel to report to ~mission(Location|Address). A group of armed individuals have attacked one of our outpost clusters and we're in desperate need of help. Although the group seems to be unaffiliated with any of the known gangs, we've received word that their leader is ~mission(TargetName), a local outlaw with a vicious reputation.

Please head out as soon as you can and secure the area by taking out the outlaws and ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Executive Protection Detail
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A group of ships located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> are requesting an escort. If you accept, head to the location immediately and await instructions. The client claims that this escort is purely a precautionary measure, but that doesn’t mean you should drop your guard. Expect some hostile forces and deal with them appropriately.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at QV Breaker Station
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Nyx
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Claw Salamanders
NOTES: These old, abandoned QV Breaker Stations should be approached with caution. Not only are they are in a state of significant disrepair, but they are frequently inhabited by dangerous fauna and outlaws, like the target's associate gang members.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Protect Our Site
contracts.description:
Some idiots with a deathwish are attacking our ships around <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>. Can’t let ‘em do that without paying the price. Want to do the honors?

If so, head out and get after ‘em. The crew there is tracking the attacker’s movements and I’ll pass along situational updates as they come in. 

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: A Well Deserved Break
contracts.description:
A request has made its way to my desk regarding the untimely end of one ~mission(TargetName), a member of the Claw Salamander who is currently scuttling around an old QV Breaker Station. 

It is highly likely that you will find them at ~mission(Location|Address).  Be mindful though that with a station this large it may take a bit of searching to track them down. 

Hope you enjoy your time in Nyx,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Interested in Building a Better Future?
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

contracts.title: Additional Resources For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Secure Site
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has intercepted comms between gang members and discovered that they’re planning an attack on <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Now they need our help to ensure the attack isn’t successful.   

Looking for a contractor who can defend the location from this offensive. Don’t have any specifics on the outlaws, but doubt they’re that skilled if our client cracked their comms so easily. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Need a Hauler
contracts.description:
Hi, we need to move some cargo across the system and were wondering if you could help. I know this is outside your usual purview, but I'm low on options. This would also be a great way to show your committed to Citizens for Prosperity's greater mission here.

If you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, there should be some cargo accessible via a freight elevator that we'll need you to take to another freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Only thing to call out is that your ship must be able to handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. To make your life easier, be sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. Otherwise, it should be a simple run. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System)
RISK ASSESSMENT: ~mission(Danger)
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: HeadHunters
NOTES: Headhunters are a reputed criminal organization who have a long history of clashes with law enforcement. There is a good chance that they might have other gang members when confronted so exercise caution when engaging.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Hauling ask.
contracts.description:
You been doing good work for us, so I got a favor to ask. I'll still pay you, but it's a favor. Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

Only thing is you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.  A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

If you could sort it out for me, that'd be great.

- Stows out

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Defend [DefendLocationWrapperLocation]
contracts.description:
Ships coming and going from <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are being targeted by hostile forces. The folks there have hired us to deal with this problem immediately.

Need someone to get there pronto and start fighting off these ships. The situation appears to be constantly evolving, so I’ll keep you updated on where you’re needed most. 

For the hustle and effort, we’ll also be paying a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for dealing with this.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Ship Protection Needed

contracts.title: Special Covalex Delivery Stanton System
contracts.description:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Protect Our Site
contracts.description:
Some idiots with a deathwish are attacking our ships around <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>. Can’t let ‘em do that without paying the price. Want to do the honors?

If so, head out and get after ‘em. The crew there is tracking the attacker’s movements and I’ll pass along situational updates as they come in. 

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Ship Protection Needed

Lima Endicott

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent average-sized order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Special Order of RMC / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and components by stripping abandoned ships and removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, even with the amount of ships buzzing through a system as populated as Stanton, so don't be surprised if you have to put a bit more effort into hunting down what's needed.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: Shutdown Xenothreat Comm Towers
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity are eager to help the people of Pyro, and it starts with freeing them from the grasp of XenoThreat.

We’re preparing a team to infiltrate one of their outposts, but we need someone to go in ahead to take out their communication towers first. Once those towers are offline, they won’t be able to call for reinforcements and we can proceed with our plan.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and find the towers. At the <EM4>top is a control panel</EM4> that can be used to disable them.

Also, it’s worth noting that most outposts use a similar system, so you’ll know how to disable the comms towers rather than risk fighting reinforcement dropships when you’re doing other jobs.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Silence the Xenothreat
contracts.description:
We’re making a play to hit some XenoThreat assholes where it hurts but need to be smart about it. That’s why we’re sending you in first to take out their comm towers so they can’t call for backup. You do that and we can be in and out before they know it.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and climb the comm towers there. Should be a <EM4>control panel at the top</EM4> you can use to switch them off.

In fact, same goes for most other outposts. Rather than having to deal with reinforcements, you can just turn off the comm towers. But hey, if you wanna ring the bell to ghost a few more Xenothreat I ain’t complaining.


Stows out.

contracts.title: Back up needed at outpost
contracts.description:
Those XenoThreat punks launched an attack against ~mission(Location|Address) so we're looking for people to go fend them off. 

Get out there and waste every XenoThreat you see.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Back up needed at outpost
contracts.description:
Those XenoThreat punks launched an attack against ~mission(Location|Address) so we're looking for people to go fend them off. 

Get out there and waste every XenoThreat you see.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Destroy Outlaw Infrastructure
contracts.description:
We are looking for a highly competent mercenary team to assist with a challenging demolition for a VIP client.

The outlaws operating at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> has been identified as a threat of growing concern in the area and to help deal with this situation your team is being tasked with taking out the fuel tanks at the location. 

However, it won't be as easy as just slipping in and out - expect to deal with multiple hostiles and turrets that will be expecting you. The stronger your crew the better your chances at completing this operation successfully.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Clear CFP Route of Hostiles
contracts.description:
To help protect our pilots, Citizens for Prosperity will often recommend the use of less traditional routes through the system. However, it seems that a gang of outlaws has gotten word and has begun to stage repeated ambushes along one such flightpath. Rather than just go around the problem and risk it persisting along the new route, we feel it we be prudent to meet these outlaws head on.

You and whatever support ships you enlist will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Outsmarting our Enemies
contracts.description:
We've heard news that a new gang are planning a bombing run on a place over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They figure if they can take out the fuel supplies there then it's theirs for the taking.

But little do they know that we're gonna send you in first to blow the fuel tanks so we can claim the place before they do. If it all goes to plan, we can clear the location out and stick it to that gang at the same time. Two birds, one stone.

Only problem is this place is armed to the teeth. Bring a crew and get those fuel tanks out of action. We'll take care of the rest.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Plug a traitor
contracts.description:
This shit saddens me. Not sure if you've ever crossed paths with ~mission(TargetName) in your dealings with us. Thought they were a real good one. Been with the Headhunters for years, but something must have happened because they went running to CFP for protection. Sold out some of our brothers and sisters along the way.

All the Judges are furious and wants blood. That's where you come in. Go to ~mission(Location|Address), find ~mission(TargetName|Last), and kill them.

Doesn't have to be anything fancy. Just want the result.

Damn shame.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Precision Strike on [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Got a line on a bounty named <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>. Someone spotted them along with known criminal accomplices at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Need you to get there before they get going. 

<EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4> has a reputation for only showing their face in places with civs. Really need you to take down this bounty without there being any civilian collateral damage. Foxwell can’t afford to be caught in the shitstorm that would erupt over the loss of innocent life. 


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Knock Out New Drug Op
contracts.description:
Some folks will do anything for a few creds. There’s a group of upstart outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that have decided to start manufacturing drugs. Turns out they’re not too good at it, or maybe a little too good. The junk they’re pumping out is stronger than the normal stuff and a real danger to anyone who uses it. 

We’ve been hired to knock out their operation and destroy whatever drugs stashes are on site. Armed guards are protecting the place, but they don’t seem too skilled. Our surveillance teams observed one of them almost shoot himself in the foot. Can’t say for certain, but odds are they won’t give a pro like you too many problems.  


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: [Location] has been greenlit
contracts.description:
Word came down from the Judge that we're to hit ~mission(Location|Address). It's owned by CFP and security there have been less than hospitable to some of the locals, so they gotta go.

They may talk a big game about bringing security, but they got guns and are more than happy to use 'em.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Death and cargo
contracts.description:
Local crew decided to hit one of our convoys and steal our shit. They got away, but we aren't gonna let them celebrate for long. I want you to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) where they got a base, blast them into ash, and get our stuff back. 

Once you got the cargo, take it over to ~mission(Destination|Address) and we can all forget these assholes ever existed.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Death and cargo
contracts.description:
Local crew decided to hit one of our convoys and steal our shit. They got away, but we aren't gonna let them celebrate for long. I want you to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) where they got a base, blast them into ash, and get our stuff back.

contracts.description:

Once you got the cargo, take it over to ~mission(Destination|Address) and we can all forget these assholes ever existed.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Taking out some XenoThreat trash
contracts.description:
Just got clearance from my Judge to start banging back against XenoThreat. Been eyeballing some spots under their control near ~mission(Location|Address).

I'll give you the targets to hit, you kill everyone you find. Hell, I'd love to go myself, sounds like fun.

-Stows

contracts.title: Driving CFP out
contracts.description:
We've been trying to play nice with these Citizens for Prosperity people, but they've made it abundantly clear that we don't have a place in their 'safe system.' Their use of mercs for security have been causing all kinds of unreasonable violence like when this asshole ~mission(TargetName) opened fire on a group of settlers to drive them away from an outpost they'd been eyeing. So now the gloves are coming off.

I need some hard workers to go hit ~mission(Location|Address) and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last). Odds are, they'll stay hidden until you prove you're enough of a threat, so make sure you do some damage.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
requiresCompletion: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials

contracts.title: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] | [Danger]
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System)
RISK ASSESSMENT: ~mission(Danger)
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: They have several known associates with criminal records so they may not be alone so arm up and exercise caution when engaging.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: [Location] needs massive repairs
contracts.description:
The storms over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> are getting to be a real pain in the ass. One of our outposts got absolutely reamed yesterday and needs some serious repairs so we're looking for help.

Figure you'd need to bring <EM4>about six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to deal with at most eight busted pipes</EM4>. We think that’ll cover, but you'll get exact numbers on site.

Hell with this place.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, that <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Some of my people were involved with a raid over at ~mission(Location|Address). Most of them got out clean, but after the dust settled nobody is sure of what happened to ~mission(TargetName).

A lot of other gangs would just leave the poor bastard to rot, but that’s not the way the Headhunters do things. I want to know for sure if ~mission(TargetName|Last) is alive or dead and I’m willing to pay you good credits to find out.

Just be careful when you get there because I bet the assholes who live there are still gunning for a fight.

- Stows

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
We’re on the market for a new stash house, so I sent ~mission(TargetName) over to ~mission(Location|Address). They were supposed to just have a quick look and report back to me if any of the hangars would work for us, but I haven’t heard from them since.

My guess is that someone else was already using the hangar, but I’d sleep better knowing for sure.

If the credits seem right, head over and see if you can find out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|Last). Just be careful. I’d hate to have to hire someone to find your body next.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
A few days back I dispatched ~mission(TargetName|Last) to scope out a cave system for potential use as a storehouse. Haven't heard from them since. 

My gut tells me they ran into trouble. The local wildlife isn't known for being friendly, and ~mission(TargetName|Last) isn't exactly known for being cautious. If you're in need of some creds, I'm offering some up for anyone who can get in there and figure out what happened. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Find [TargetName]\n
contracts.description:
Last night, some no-name drifters threw down with our enforcers and ran when things got too hot. Didn't find out 'til they were long gone, but they made off with one of our Prospects when they split. Goes by the name of ~mission(TargetName). 

Last we saw, they were headed in the direction ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to head there and track down our missing Prospect. 

If you take any of them down while you're at it, all the better.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Neutralize Shipjacking Gang
contracts.description:
Okay, this might be a bit of stretch to do on your own, so if you got any favors to call in, it could be good to cash those chits now. There's a group of desperados striking delivery ships up and down this sector and we've been tasked with cleaning them up. 

Once your crew is ready, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take the hostiles there down. Now, these bastards are a bit clever so they tend to split up into smaller packs. Make sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives."
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.description:
To help protect our pilots, Citizens for Prosperity will often recommend the use of less traditional routes through the system. However, it seems that a gang of outlaws has gotten word and has begun to stage repeated ambushes along one such flightpath. Rather than just go around the problem and risk it persisting along the new route, we feel it we be prudent to meet these outlaws head on.

You and whatever support ships you enlist will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Destroy Headhunter Stolen Data
contracts.description:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Destroy XenoThreat Logistic Data
contracts.description:
We got a bit of a problem that I'm hoping you can solve for me. One of our informers has revealed that XenoThreat has been amassing data on Citizens for Prosperity operations throughout the system. 

This information, if used correctly, could put our people at serious risk. The best solution is for you to completely destroy the servers where the data is being stored at ~mission(Location|Address).

With their trove of information wiped out, it should give our people a fighting chance.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Red Wind Challenging Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We’re having trouble completing a hauling mission and need a reliable contractor who has experience working in dangerous environments to complete the job. Just as a heads up, the cargo is in an abandoned ship surrounded by multiple, highly dangerous outlaws. We strongly advise you bring some backup with you and <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s goods. Details follow:

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

Since this is a bit risky, we’re offering proportionate pay. I’ll leave it up to you to decide how to distribute it to your crew.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Large Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
contracts.description:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for Volt weapons. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Expel Outlaws
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is sending frantic comms that one of their locations is under attack. We need a contractor who can hustle to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and clear the location of hostile actors. 

According to onsite personnel, the outlaws are currently holed up near the <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Approach with caution and be prepared to use lethal force if the outlaws resist being removed.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Combat Support: [Location]
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Urgent request came in from Associated Science & Development to provide combat support at ~mission(Location). Apparently they have been attacked by outlaws and their security forces have been unable to handle it on their own. 

You've been cleared to go on site and aide local security elements in taking out the outlaws, but ASD reserves the right to restrict you from certain areas.

This is a confirmed combat op, so prepare accordingly.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Danger: Contraband Weapons Inbound
contracts.description:
This is a general warning. We have learned that the Headhunters are transporting a large amount of weapons into the system with the intent of launching attacks against CFP-owned settlements.

While we believe that change can only come to this system through nonviolence. The presence of these weapons will undoubtedly cause considerably more bloodshed and devastation so we want to remove them from the equation.

Any of our supporters with appropriate combat training are asked to undertake this dangerous assignment out near ~mission(Location|Address). We will compensate you for the tremendous risk you are taking.

Thank you and be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Defenders needed against Headhunters
contracts.description:
We received an emergency comm from ~mission(Location|Address) reporting that they are currently under attack by a group of Headhunters. We know our presence in the system has upset the Headhunters, but it hardly excuses this unprovoked attack.

If available, please gather your gear and head out. Just understand that Headhunters are experienced fighters and will not back down easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Need someone taken out
contracts.description:
Got a crew that's been hitting Headhunter ships lately. Their leader's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). We've tracked them to  ~mission(Location|Address), so we're looking for someone to put them down for good.

This group likes to fight, but shouldn't be a problem for someone like you. 

Get over there and get it done.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Supply Order: Sadaryx Focus Lenses
contracts.description:
CONTRACT: Manufacturing Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
If you happen to have any other work bringing you to one of the QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, Shubin Interstellar would be highly interested in contracting you to obtaining a supply of hard-to-source mining laser focus lenses.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
While there may be some focus lenses that can be recovered from the QV Breaker Station's storage, you must likely will need to manufacture them using <EM4>Sadaryx crystals</EM4> and the on-site lens fabricator. While the ore is rare, these Breaker Stations typically have sadaryx veins that can be mined directly with a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4>.

Deliver the procured lenses to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> for processing.

Contractors have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws, so caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Extensive Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
We need some help. The CFP facility at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> suffered severe damage during a recent electrical storm and we're looking for anyone who can help with repairs.

Surveying the site, you'll have to bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to take care of eight or so pipes</EM4>. That should be enough to repair the damage and get the outpost back in operation.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Do you think you can help?

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Eliminate Fuel Stores
contracts.description:
We've been having escalating issues with the outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) and can no longer stand by and watch as their aggressive actions hurt our community. 

We are wary of launching a full scale assault, but believe that if their fuel stores are wiped out, it would deter them from further hostile actions. 

If you're able, I'd appreciate you handling the destruction of the fuel personally. A ship capable of launching missiles would probably make the most sense, but I leave that up to you.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent average-sized order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Looking to execute a bounty on <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>. We’ve learned that they’re currently hiding out with some confederates at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

I’d be prepared to deal with the lowlifes hanging around <EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4>, but our only real concern is that you land the target. 
    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Journeyman Tracker License Certification
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: ~mission(Location)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As your standing in the community continues to grow, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Journeyman Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend High-Risk Targets (HRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with several escorts. The additional offensive and defensive capabilities make them difficult targets for all but the most skilled guild members.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a HRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> last seen at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
unlocks: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at QV Breaker Station

contracts.title: Kill the king
contracts.description:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at ~mission(Location|Address), they're getting hit by some geniuses led by ~mission(TargetName). We've tussled against ~mission(TargetName|Last) in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up. 

We want you to head there and take them down. Kill whoever you like, but ~mission(TargetName|Last) should be your focus.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Defend [Location] from Outlaws
contracts.description:
We learned that ~mission(Location|Address) is under threat of attack by outlaws and has asked for assistance. We need someone to protect them and drive away the outlaws. 

Make sure you stay close after their initial attack. Too often, outlaws win fights just by sending more bodies than anyone can reasonably defend against, so make sure you fight off any reinforcements before leaving the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Reclaim Headhunter Outpost
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for security personnel to take a former CFP outpost that's currently serving as a hideout for Headhunters to launch attacks throughout the system. 

Located near ~mission(Location|Address), reclaiming this outpost will allow CFP to provide greater support to local efforts to build stability.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Red Level Contract: Fuel Container Demolition
contracts.description:
Foxwell have been hired by a client to take part in a multi-stage operation on a known outlaw base at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and need a strong pilot to play their part in this.

You, and whatever additional support ships you arrange, will be tasked with taking out the fuel tanks located there to set the stage for the rest of the operation to follow. 

Unfortunately, this place is swarming with ships and anti-air turrets. So make sure you and your people are ready, and remember, the fuel tanks are your priority. No need to be a hero.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Trapping a Rat
contracts.description:
Got a plan to take care of a rat I've been dealing with and need a hand.

Had a client default on some debts and now they've decided they ain't going to pay up. Got a tip that they're hiding out over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. If you can take out their fuel tanks they'll have no choice but to reconsider their crap decisions.

Just be sure you don't underestimate this slimebag. They might be dumb but they're not stupid, if you get me. I've heard this place is swarming with ships and turrets, you'd have to be a total nullbrain not to bring backup.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Protection against [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Reports indicate that ~mission(Location|Address) has come under attack from a group of armed individuals led by a notorious outlaw named ~mission(TargetName). There have been multiple reported deaths and injuries, so Citizens for Prosperity has been looking for qualified combat operatives to provide some support. 

Though we don't advocate conflict resolution through violence, we believe that the group will disperse if ~mission(TargetName|Last) is not there to lead them.

Head over as soon as you can. Lives are on the line.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
requiresCompletion: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials

contracts.title: Support Client Under Attack
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients got the brilliant idea to test their dogfighting skills in a real world scenario. Doesn’t sound like it’s going well, because they comm’d us asking for some support. 

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and help clean up the mess they created.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Pilot Seeking Combat Support
contracts.description:
One of our pilots had just picked up a shipment of supplies near ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by some vicious shipjackers. 

We just received their distress beacon and I'm hoping you can go provide them combat support.

Any assistance you could give would make all the difference.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Destroy Headhunter Stolen Data
contracts.description:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Take Outlaws at [Location] Offline
contracts.description:
We have gotten word that the outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) have begun recruiting with the hopes of launching a raid against Citizens for Prosperity. 

In order to deescalate the situation before it gets out of hand, we would like you to disable their power generators and halt their expansion. 

Pull this off and it could save a lot of lives.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Halt Narcotics Operation
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity has been working hard to improve people's lives across the system, but an already difficult task becomes near impossible when drugs get involved. We've recently seen a dealer specifically targeting our most vulnerable and have experienced setbacks across the board. This needs to stop.

We would like you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and put a permanent end to their production line.

Do this and we can hopefully get our people back on track. 
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Halt Narcotics Operation
contracts.description:

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Updated Security Data
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
Out of an over-abundance of caution, it would be good to see if the security systems have picked up anything new since the last batch of data you delivered. That way we can make sure we’re up-to-date on what’s been happening down there.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Security data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll send you a <EM4>ASD Secure Drive</EM4> that you can collect at your home location.

contracts.title: Headhunter Needs Help
contracts.description:
You busy? A promising prospect was doing a special run for me but ran into trouble with the People’s Alliance around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. This one’s on me. Knew they weren’t the best dogfighter but thought they could do this without running into any other ships. 

Told ‘em to hold tight and do everything they can to stay alive until support gets there. Shouldn’t be too much trouble for someone with your skillset.  

-Stows

contracts.title: Blow Up Citizens for Prosperity Fuel Reserves
contracts.description:
I'm getting pretty bloody sick of Citizens for Prosperity sticking their noses where they don't belong. 

Started thinking that it might be pretty nice to ground their fleet for a little bit. We blow up their fuel tanks at ~mission(Location|Address) and those little pissheads won't be going nowhere quick.

Sound like your kinda thing?

-Stows out

contracts.title: Cull Invasive Creatures
contracts.description:
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists are dedicated to keeping the delicate ecosystems of the empire in balance. A client recently hired us to evaluate the environmental impact of a number of invasive creatures near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. We’ve determined that to preserve the natural order of the region a conscientious culling of these species is necessary.  

Looking for someone able and willing to help in this effort. Please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for further information on the creatures being targeted.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Standard Cargo Recovery Op.
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Looking for a competent contractor who can salvage a messy situation. A client's trusted pilot apparently wasn't so trustworthy and made off with a shipment. But thankfully our trackers are reporting the shipment's static for the moment, waiting to be picked up. If we play our cards right, there's still time to resolve this.

The abandoned ship is located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and will need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the goods. A ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> is a necessity, and expect contact from whatever outlaws this double-crossing pilot was hoping to sell to. 

Once recovered, deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
