contracts.title: Carefully Clear Site
contracts.description:
We’ve been contracted to take care of a delicate situation. A gang has settled into <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that we need to get cleared out. Only issue is that there’s still some civilians there too. 

Looking for someone with the skills and good trigger sense to get rid of those outlaws without harming any innocent people. If that’s you, grab your gear and get over there. 


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Recovering Valuable Supplies
contracts.description:
A Citizens for Prosperity ship has been ambushed by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and we need a skilled pilot to help them out.

We lost contact with them mid comms, but it sounded like they were taking heavy fire. It may be too late for them, but the vital supplies they were carrying could still be put to good use. Fly over there, take out any hostiles, and recover the shipment. You'll need a ship that can support <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the supplies onto your ship.

Take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll guarantee they'll be put to good use.

Be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Locate Missing Team
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP74384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
We had sent in a two-person team to ~mission(System) to investigate a case, but have received no reports from them for several days. At this juncture we are forced to assume that they had run into an unforeseen obstacle and may be in need of rescue, or worse, have been killed.


Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Consider the dangerous nature of their investigation, there is a very strong chance there will be hostiles on site.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for Volt weapons. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.



Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Finish the job
contracts.description:
One of our pilots was supposed to bring a shipment back to us, but seems like he got into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Either he got his brains blasted all over the cockpit, or freaked out and ditched his ship. For his sake, I hope it’s the first one so I don’t have the hunt this asshole down. What’s important right now is that our cargo’s just sitting out there.

If you’ve got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a decent ship, can you head over there and get our stuff? Chances are the assholes who attacked my pilot are still there, and I’m betting they’re pretty tough.

If you get out alive, take the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and I’ll get you paid.

Stows out.

contracts.title: High-Risk Bounty: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve received actionable intelligence on a dangerous bounty, who’s turned out to be extremely elusive. <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> was spotted with a dedicated contingent of known associates at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We’re looking for a contractor ready and willing to execute this bounty before they disappear again.

Based on previous attempts to apprehend this criminal, there’s a good chance that <EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4> will try to avoid a direct confrontation, and instead send their allies to confront you. We believe that neutralizing these protective forces, and shredding the safety net they provide, is the best way to draw out <EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4> to face you directly. 

Expect to confront a significant and skilled force. We advise that you plan accordingly. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Lrg. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Extensive Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
We need some help. The CFP facility at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> suffered severe damage during a recent electrical storm and we're looking for anyone who can help with repairs.

Surveying the site, you'll have to bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to take care of eight or so pipes</EM4>. That should be enough to repair the damage and get the outpost back in operation.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Do you think you can help?

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Surveying the site, you'll have to bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to take care of eight or so pipes</EM4>. That should be enough to repair the damage and get the outpost back in operation.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Do you think you can help?

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Med. Supply of RMC)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent average-sized order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Ship Under Attack
contracts.description:
Foxwell is looking for an available combat pilot to provide immediate assistance to a ~mission(Ship) under attack over by ~mission(Location|Address). We have not identified the perpetrators in the attack, but have been assured it is a small force.

Please dispatch quickly and clear out all hostiles. We need the client to make it through this as they haven't paid us yet.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Disable Outlaw Stronghold at [Location]
contracts.description:
Following a series of raids against Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we believe we have traced those responsible back to ~mission(Location|Address).

Attacking them directly will pose too great of a risk and most likely encourage aggressive reprisals. Instead, we believe that if their power generators were to be disable it could force them to settle somewhere else.

Do you think you could handle it for us?
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Reduce Outlaw's Operational Readiness
contracts.description:
There is a group of outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) that have become increasingly brazen in their attacks on Citizens for Prosperity assets in the system. 

To minimize loss of life, we want to first try convincing them to move on to somewhere else by disabling their generators and destroying their fuel reserves. 

Hopefully, that should be enough to convince them to move on to greener pastures.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Need Resource for Research\n
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current ‘Regen Crisis’ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

We’ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we won’t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team can’t wait that long, and we’re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, there’s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Reduce Valakkar Breaker Station Population
contracts.description:
If you have any work that's going to be bringing you to one of those old QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, we have something else that we could use your help on while you're there.
 
We've recently been contacted by the People's Alliance to assist with an initiative to help prepare these abandoned stations for repairs. Unfortunately, a Valakkar infestation is creating serious problems for not only the stations' infrastructure, but also for the chances of them being brought back online one day. Due to Valakkar's status as an invasive species, we have decided that culling them is the only viable option.
 
Reduce the Valakkar numbers at any of the old QV Breaker Stations and we will offer you payment.
 
Best,
 
Wanda Werkheiser

Contract Manager

Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Expel Outlaws
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is sending frantic comms that one of their locations is under attack. We need a contractor who can hustle to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and clear the location of hostile actors. 

According to onsite personnel, the outlaws are currently holed up near the <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Approach with caution and be prepared to use lethal force if the outlaws resist being removed.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Patrol Risky Travel Lanes
contracts.description:
We’ve noted an increase in traffic along one of the travel lanes we monitor. Chances are that we won’t be the only ones paying attention. I’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and make sure there are no outlaws attempting to take advantage of this sense of security.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Scout and Scan
contracts.description:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Simple Hit
contracts.description:
Got another scumbag who needs their ticket punched. ~mission(TargetName) is just a low level thug who doesn't seem to learn. We've warned them to either throw in with us or move system, but they don't seem to be listening so we're out of patience.

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and you should find ~mission(TargetName|Last) flying around. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Requesting Help
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got an emergency request from Associated Science & Development for any available operators to report to ~mission(Location) and deal with some hostiles who have overtaken one of their facilities. 

Once on site, you will need to engage and eliminate any hostile elements. ASD has indicated that this facility provides shuttle services to one of their embedded research centers but were very clear that you are not authorized to travel there. Trespassers will be shot and you will be no exception, so stick to the prescribed AO.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Access Research Files
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update:
The files you found in Engineering confirm that Dr. Jorrit is actively pursuing something at the site, but it is still unclear what the doctor is up to. I’m hoping that if you can find the data he was accessing in Research it will provide further clarity.


Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing to locate and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4> .

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you accessed these files, I'll be sending you <EM4>5 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of whatever data we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
requiresCompletion: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials

contracts.title: Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
unlocks: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Deliver a Message
contracts.description:
Surprise, surprise. Seems like not everyone’s happy that the Headhunters are making inroads in Stanton. One crew in particular has been hitting our people and then scurrying back to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Want you to go there and give ‘em a taste of their own medicine. Removing these lickboots should send a pretty clear message about what happens if you screw with us. 


Stows out.

contracts.title: Find [TargetName]\n
contracts.description:
Last night, some no-name drifters threw down with our enforcers and ran when things got too hot. Didn't find out 'til they were long gone, but they made off with one of our Prospects when they split. Goes by the name of ~mission(TargetName). 

Last we saw, they were headed in the direction ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to head there and track down our missing Prospect. 

If you take any of them down while you're at it, all the better.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #3
contracts.description:
Congrats on completing part two of this eight-part course.   

The third scenario throws tactical considerations into the mix. This time around the attacking ships are from distinct classes with distinct battlefield applications. Knowing what targets to prioritize is vital to surviving engagements against multiple ships.      

Whenever you’re ready, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to get started.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Bigger They Are – Try to evaluate which threat is the most dangerous and take them out first.
- Shields – If you’re taking a lot of damage, don’t be afraid to boost away and let your shields regenerate.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: Find Lost Supply Ship
contracts.description:
Hey,

I’m concerned a ~mission(Ship) moving medical supplies for us might’ve come under attack. The signal was lost around ~mission(Location|Address), which has seen a spike in outlaw activity recently. Losing that ship alone would be bad enough, but it’ll be even worse if those supplies don’t make it to ~mission(Destination). 

We would need you to search for the ship at its last known position, recover the supplies, and then take them to ~mission(Destination|Address). Your help would make a bad situation better. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Reclaim Stolen Cargo
contracts.description:
Hey,

Outlaws used a fake distress beacon to lure one of our cargo ships into a trap and steal the supplies onboard. Thankfully, we placed trackers in the cargo containers, because the stuff is valuable mining and construction materials needed at ~mission(Destination). 

Looks like the goods ended up at ~mission(Location|Address). Need someone to head there, reclaim the supplies, and take them to ~mission(Destination|Address). Doubt they’ll make it easy for you, but if it helps, they didn’t show any mercy to our ship crew. Reclaiming those supplies will not only help the CFP but ensure that our crew didn’t die in vain.   

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Security Sweep
contracts.description:
Need someone to knock out a security patrol. You’ll need to go to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and then scan several designated waypoints ensuring that they’re safe and secure. 

Satellites in that region have been acting up recently. Not exactly sure what’s going on out there, but best be prepared in case there’s any trouble.

Complete this contract and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Rescue Incomplete Ling Delivery
contracts.description:
Hi,

Got a relatively straightforward one for you if you're interested.

One of our pilot ignored a maintenance warning and sure enough, a couple of hours later their ship broke down over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They're on their way back to the office now but we could do with a reliable hauler whose got a ship big enough to transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to complete the haul for us.

Think you could help us out? You just need to pick up the stranded shipment and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  And I probably don't have to say this, but a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> would probably be handy to have along.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Scout and Scan
contracts.description:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Expel Outlaws
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is sending frantic comms that one of their locations is under attack. We need a contractor who can hustle to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and clear the location of hostile actors. 

According to onsite personnel, the outlaws are currently holed up near the <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Approach with caution and be prepared to use lethal force if the outlaws resist being removed.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Headhunter Pilot in Trouble
contracts.description:
Just got word that a Headhunter over near ~mission(Location|Address) got roped into a fight and now they can't see it through. The idiot wants me to save their sorry ass.

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows

contracts.title: Wanted: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
We got a greenlight to finally take out ~mission(TargetName). They've been a pain in our ass ever since they came to the system a few years ago and it's finally time to take them out once and for all. 

We've gotten word that ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying near ~mission(Location|Address) and the Judge wants this handled now.

Take 'em out.

- Stows out.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for Volt weapons. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.

~mission(Hint_Location) There have been reported kopion sightings within the area, so caution is advised. 

For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>. 

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Red Wind Straightforward Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A Red Wind hauler has been ambushed by some outlaws and now our clients’ cargo is sitting still whilst they prepare to steal it. We need a pilot with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a combat ready ship to head to the location below and recover the cargo before it’s gone for good.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

The pilot reported multiple hostiles so make sure you take this seriously. 

EVERY OPPORTUNITY COUNTS – Make the most of what’s given to you, show us that you can handle more work.

contracts.title: Med. Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
contracts.description:
Hey El here,

Got a weird one for you. I was checking the delivery stats for the past week and noticed some discrepancies. Seems we have a couple of deliveries marked as fulfilled but the cargo trackers are still showing as active.

One of these is located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> so I was hoping you could fly over and get to the bottom of this. The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Destroy Outlaw Infrastructure
contracts.description:
An opportunity has presented itself for a client to take action against a group of criminals who have been harassing their business.

According to reports, this group of outlaws are currently laying low at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The client thinks this is a good time to catch them off guard and bring them to justice. The job is to take out their fuel tanks and putting an end to their smuggling operations once and for all.

These folks are not to be underestimated. You better bring some backup and fly low to avoid the turrets. Priority as always is the fuel tanks.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Moderate Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
If you happen to be in the area, please read this.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for a qualified mechanic to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> with the required supplies and perform some repairs.

As it stands, you’ll need <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair five pipes or so.</EM4> That should help us get the outpost functional again. We'll compensate you for your time and materials.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at [Location]
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Stanton
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: We have tracked this bounty target to the <EM4>Engineering wing</EM4> of an abandoned Associated Science and Development research facility. While shuttered, various scavengers and other unsavory types are known to frequent the area.

The facility itself might also pose a risk as the nature of the research being conducted there is unknown. Be on the lookout for potential environmental hazards while in pursuit of the target.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Wasting Their Stockpile
contracts.description:
Look, Headhunters don't waste time on petty revenge, but I'm not about to let this nonsense fly either.

Some asshole took out a bunch of my crew and has been bragging all over about it. I've also heard that this nullbrain is stockpiling quantum fuel over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. I'd like to see how they deal with some real heat when you fly over there and burn everything they've built to the ground. Oh, and with the amount of firepower they got gathered over there, wouldn't be smart to fly alone on this one, so take a crew with you.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Red Wind Seeking New Haulers
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Call for Help: [Location]
contracts.description:
We've received a distress call from ~mission(Location|Address). A group of unknown assailants have launched an attack. There have been multiple deaths reported and we need to reclaim the outpost.

I know this is far from your current position, but we're desperate to secure the area and get the outpost back and running again.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Minor Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
Hi,

One of our outposts at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is in need of some light repairs. The folks onsite have estimated that you’ll need <EM4>three fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to fix up to three or so pipes.</EM4>

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks again for your help,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Small Mining Order: Sadaryx
contracts.description:
CONTRACT: Mining Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
One of our prospecting teams recently confirmed that the asteroids which house QV Breaker Stations throughout Nyx's Keeger Belt contain a rare ore type, Sadaryx.

However, owing to the difficulty in access these stations and the inherent risks involved, we are seeking external mining crews to handle the extraction.

We do not have a confirmed location of where the Sadaryx deposits are located within the station, but would recommend starting with the cave sections where minerals naturally form. If you get really lucky, you may even find some crystals in storage that were mined by the old QV work crews.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
Your crew will need to gain access to a <EM4>QV Breaker Station</EM4>, collect the required <EM4> Sadaryx ore</EM4>, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This will require a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4> and a basic understanding of hand mining.

Our prospecting teams have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws. Caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Additional Resources For Research
contracts.description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
requiresCompletion: Interested in Building a Better Future?

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Special Covalex Delivery Stanton System
contracts.description:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Overaggressive Kopions Need Removing
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity recently reported to us that one of their scouts was injured by kopions during a routine exploration mission. According to them, this isn't the first time this particular pack has posed a problem, so they've requested our services to clear out the area. The report shows they were last seen at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

This behavior is typical of kopions looking to expand their territory, so it is highly likely that you will be dealing with more kopions than initially observed. Caution is advised. 

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: High-Risk Bounty: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve received actionable intelligence on a dangerous bounty, who’s turned out to be extremely elusive. <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> was spotted with a dedicated contingent of known associates at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We’re looking for a contractor ready and willing to execute this bounty before they disappear again.

Based on previous attempts to apprehend this criminal, there’s a good chance that <EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4> will try to avoid a direct confrontation, and instead send their allies to confront you. We believe that neutralizing these protective forces, and shredding the safety net they provide, is the best way to draw out <EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4> to face you directly. 

Expect to confront a significant and skilled force. We advise that you plan accordingly. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: cfp_EliminateAllFF_Title_001
contracts.description: cfp_EliminateAllFF_Desc_001

contracts.title: Lrg. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Show Them Who's Boss
contracts.description:
Word’s gotten out that we’re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows

contracts.title: Teach Citizens for Prosperity A Lesson
contracts.description:
Every day it seems like Citizens for Prosperity is out here trying to snatch up more people for their shitty little cause and make life more difficult for hardworkin' folks like ourselves. 

I figure they could use a reminder about who really is in charge here. Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and bomb the living hell out of the area. 

Nothing like a bit of property damage to get a point across.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Launch Surprise Attack
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Need someone to take out a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and deal with the escort ships protecting it. They’ve already interfered with several of our ongoing operations and have become a real problem across several of Eckhart Security cases. Not sure what their endgame is, but it won’t matter once you deal with them.

We’ve let slip that we will be working a job over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> which should serve as bait to draw them out. The spot is ideal for an ambush because of the <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s a perfect place to power down and hide until you’re ready to strike. If you’re available, the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escorts should be passing through soon.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The main contractor will also receive a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Still Looking for Work?
contracts.description:
Due to a corporate restructuring, Foxwell has some new vacancies that need to be filled immediately. Foxwell knows you’ve previously expressed interest in this line of work, and we’re wondering if you would want to take another crack at a contract.

One of our clients needs support at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> where their security forces are struggling to handle an outlaw incursion. Head there and help the local forces get rid of the problem before it’s too late. 

Successfully complete this contract, and Foxwell would be happy to send more work your way.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Help Protect Site
contracts.description:
Got word that outlaws are attempting to overrun <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. There’s local security forces there, but they’re struggling to stop that attack.

Need a contractor to hustle there and help take care of the aggressors. Bring plenty of gear, and be careful when engaging targets. Don’t want to hear about any security team members getting caught in your crossfire.    


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Ambush Op
contracts.description:
One of our Clips put out a kill order on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Feel like making ‘em happy by taking it out?

Here’s what you need to know. The target and their escort are scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Looks like there’s an emission cloud nearby that can hide your ship’s sig. Wait there until you’re ready to strike. 

The Clip only cares about wiping out the target. Anything of value you find floating in the wreckage is all yours. 

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount)</EM4> Council Scrip to sweeten the pot. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Disable Headhunter Comm Towers
contracts.description:
Violence is never our first choice, but sometimes it must be used as a preventative measure.

We’re planning a strike on a Headhunter controlled outpost and need your help.

We need to make sure that if something goes wrong they won’t be able to call for backup and escalate the situation. That’s where you come in. We need you to head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and disable the communication towers. There should be a <EM4>control panel located at the top</EM4> of each tower that you can use to deactivate them.

If you’re able to do this, Citizens for Prosperity will be able to gain some vital ground in Pyro.

It’s also worth keeping in mind for future contracts that you can choose to take out the comms towers instead of risking a fight with reinforcement dropships.

Stay alert and stay safe.

Thank you,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Shutdown CFP’s Comms
contracts.description:
CFP think they’re safe over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> but we got big plans for them. You’re gonna pave the way for us by heading there and shutting down their comm towers.

There should be a <EM4>control terminal at the top</EM4> that you can use to shut the tower down. You get that sorted and they won’t be able to call for backup. Then we can show those skags who this system belongs to.

Most outposts use the same system, so this’ll come in handy next time you want to make sure reinforcements don’t mess with you.


Stows out.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Special Order of RMC / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and components by stripping abandoned ships and removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, partly in thanks to how many outlaws are flying around in Pyro and partly because this request isn't for your average everyday component. But lucky for you, the extra effort will be rewarded.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.description:

LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Low Risk Protection Detail
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has requested a contractor with immediate availability to provide extra support to a number of ships leaving an asteroid base located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>). Once you’ve accepted, rendezvous there and await further instructions. In this instance, your job is to provide support for their safe passage. Hostiles may be present, but they shouldn’t be too challenging to deal with.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Eliminate Annoyance
contracts.description:
Headhunters flying in and out of <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are being harassed by some aggressive upstarts. Need them dealt with before they become a real pain in the ass.   

Get there and I’ll update you on what these pests are doing so you can hunt ‘em down. 

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig as a bonus.

- Stows

contracts.title: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
contracts.description:
Foxwell has been tracking a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> used by outlaws and discovered a pattern to its movements. The ship should be passing by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon.

Looking for a contractor willing to hustle there, hide in the emission cloud, and then spring the trap when the time is right. There’s usually escort ships with the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Careful not to jump the gun and blow your cover. The element of surprise is crucial from what I’ve read.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad

contracts.title: Overaggressive Kopions Need Removing
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity recently reported to us that one of their scouts was injured by kopions during a routine exploration mission. According to them, this isn't the first time this particular pack has posed a problem, so they've requested our services to clear out the area. The report shows they were last seen at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

This behavior is typical of kopions looking to expand their territory, so it is highly likely that you will be dealing with more kopions than initially observed. Caution is advised. 

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Stand Up to Aggressors
contracts.description:
Outlaw ships are harassing anyone attempting to land or leave our client’s operations at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>. Need someone to fly there to defend the site and protect our client’s ships before the situation gets out of control. Get there, get after those aggressors, and I'll keep you updated on the situation. 

Help take care of this and we'll pass along a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: PURGE ASD SERVERS
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has asked us to infiltrate an old ASD research site and wipe the contents of a few specific servers there.

We believe the servers are located somewhere within the <EM4>Xenotech Lab, in the Research wing</EM4>. The client has also informed us that despite the facilities being publicly declared as closed, you're still likely to find hostile forces there.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

Initial surveillance indicates the servers are within the facility’s <EM4>Energy Lab, located in the Research wing</EM4>. We’ve also picked up on a number of hostile forces, so be on alert.

contracts.title: Verified Bounty: [TargetName] at [Location]
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Stanton
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: We have tracked this bounty target to the <EM4>Research wing</EM4> of an abandoned Associated Science and Development facility. While shuttered, various scavengers and other unsavory types are known to frequent the area.

The facility itself might also pose a risk as the nature of the research being conducted there is unknown. Be on the lookout for potential environmental hazards while in pursuit of the target.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Med. Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Looking for a contractor with a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to run a delivery for us across Stanton.

This isn't a particularly long delivery route, but you will be moving between couple of different locations. To make sure things go smoothly, bring enough fuel and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to speed up moving the boxes.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: ENTRY LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON
unlocks: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
unlocks: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Green light on [Location]
contracts.description:
It's sad to say but we lost one of our outposts to XenoThreat. Appalling if you ask me, but that's why we're looking for someone who's got the time and ammunition to take it back.

If that's you, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take it back.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Looking for a little revenge
contracts.description:
Here's the deal. Some of those mercs that CFP hired as security went and shot up some Headhunters that were just moving through the system. They weren't even doing anything, just flying.

Anyway, we tracked them back to ~mission(Location|Address) and want to dish out some payback. Grab your gear and be our weapon, we'll make it worth your while.

- Stows

contracts.title: [TargetName] needs stomping
contracts.description:
Got a small fry who thinks they can hit the Headhunters and get away with it. So ~mission(TargetName) tried to knock over one of our stashes and think they can get away with it. 

Last we heard they were spotted around ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to head over and send a very clear message who is the reigning power in the system.

Do it quick and clean.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Target at [Location]
contracts.description:
There's a nest that needs to be taken out around ~mission(Location|Address) that has been taken over by some squatters. We don't care about most of them, but word's gotten back to us that they're sheltering ~mission(TargetName) who has a long history of stealing Headhunter loot. Time's come to take them out.

Word is that ~mission(TargetName|Last) is in a ship, but may rely on the base's defenses to protect them, so be careful. You kill 'em, you get paid. 

You know, the usual.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Protect CFP Members from Overactive Kopions
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity have approached us with information that multiple groups of kopions have been attacking people at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> without provocation. Currently, no deaths have been reported, but they are concerned their most vulnerable will be at risk if these kopions continue running rampant.

Ensure you are prepared adequately, kopions hunt in packs and it is easy to become overwhelmed by their sheer numbers.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: [Location] needs a bunch of repairs
contracts.description:
Need somebody handy with tools to pop over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and help out with some repairs. Our last repair guy knocked out most of the fixes but there's still some stuff that could use looking at.

I think if you've got <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to patch up around five pipes</EM4>, you should be covered.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Minor Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Reclaim Stolen Cargo
contracts.description:
Hey,

Outlaws used a fake distress beacon to lure one of our cargo ships into a trap and steal the supplies onboard. Thankfully, we placed trackers in the cargo containers, because the stuff is valuable mining and construction materials needed at ~mission(Destination). 

Looks like the goods ended up at ~mission(Location|Address). Need someone to head there, reclaim the supplies, and take them to ~mission(Destination|Address). Doubt they’ll make it easy for you, but if it helps, they didn’t show any mercy to our ship crew. Reclaiming those supplies will not only help the CFP but ensure that our crew didn’t die in vain.   

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Search for Ship
contracts.description:
Just lost contact with a ~mission(Ship) on an important run. Before they went dark, the crew was convinced someone was following them, so I’d put money on them being under attack. 

Looking for someone to get their ass over to ~mission(Location|Address) to search for the ship and retrieve the goods. If I’m right, there will be some uninvited guests hanging around that will need to be dealt with too. Once you’ve secured the stuff, it needs to go to ~mission(Destination|Address).   

You down to crack a few skulls and lug some cargo. Sounds simple enough, right? 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Return Goods
contracts.description:
Just got a frantic comm from a ~mission(Ship) that cut out quite dramatically. Seems like they were dumb enough to get lured into a trap, even though I made it damn clear that getting those goods to ~mission(Destination|Address) was all they should worry about.   
 
Well, it looks like they failed. Trackers hidden in the cargo now show it at ~mission(Location|Address). Time to send in backup to reclaim our goods and teach a lesson to those who took it. You interested in delivering that message then delivering the goods?

- Stows

contracts.title: Hitting a CFP site
contracts.description:
Need someone to sweep ~mission(Location|Address). CFP security forces seized the outpost from a group of locals that'd been there for years. Beat the hell out of 'em from what I heard, so they came to Headhunters asking for revenge. 

Need it done fast and clean. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Need a hitter
contracts.description:
So here's the deal, we got some small time dirtbags who think they're hotshots running out of a base near ~mission(Location|Address). I don't know what toxic shit they're drinking but they thought it'd be a good idea to step to some Headhunter Clips. Killed one, injured three more. So I'm looking to send someone there to blast their ambition right out of their skulls.

Head over and get it done. You'll get a nice bump of creds for it.

- Stows
