contracts.title: Lrg. Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) 

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Inter-Outpost Delivery at [Destination] - Multiple Boxes
contracts.description:
Hi,

Citizens for Prosperity needs help moving supplies around one of our outposts. The boxes need to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Doesn’t sound too difficult, does it? Just make sure you’re wearing a comfy pair of shoes. Also, to make your life easier, I'd bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Little Heavy Lifting at [Destination]
contracts.description:
Got a bunch of boxes sitting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that have to be moved to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Seems easy enough, right? Well, guess it ain’t. 

The idiot who was supposed to move these things threw out his back trying to carry all of ‘em at once. So, you know, maybe bring a <EM4> handheld tractor beam</EM4> and try taking ‘em one at a time like a normal person. But, hey, don’t let me tell you how to do your job. Just get it done. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Save Ship
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Orange Level Contract: Take Out Fuel Supplies
contracts.description:
We're in need of a sharp contractor for a hit and run operation. Client says some local thugs have been congregating in concerning numbers and we have been tasked with disrupting their base of operations.

Get on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you're successful we can set these folks plans back a while, and most importantly, without having to deal with them directly.

Reports are showing there's a couple of ships buzzing around the area and some defense turrets. Just focus on the fuel tanks and you should be alright.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Seeking Experienced Combat Pilots
contracts.description:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If you’re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and we’ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
unlocks: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party

contracts.title: Pilot in Distress
contracts.description:
It seems one of the routes that we had thought relatively safe has proven otherwise. Outlaws have attacked one of our pilots over at ~mission(Location|Address) and they won't make it much longer without support. 

I'd appreciate it if you could fly there as quickly as possible and help them deal with these attackers.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.description:
One of our pilots had just picked up a shipment of supplies near ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by some vicious shipjackers. 

We just received their distress beacon and I'm hoping you can go provide them combat support.

Any assistance you could give would make all the difference.

Lima Endicott

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Updated Energy Anomaly Data
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
It would be helpful to have the most recent energy anomaly data so that we can compare it to what you delivered last time. Any difference between the two data sets could prove useful.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Energy Anomaly data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll send you a <EM4>ASD Secure Drive</EM4> that you can collect at your home location.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / UCM)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent small-scale order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and Construction Materials by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Help Headhunters Prospect
contracts.description:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.    

If this kid can’t handle a People’s Alliance ship, they sure ain’t ready for flight assignments. Appreciate it if you could save their hide anyway.

If you’re free, could you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show ‘em how it’s done?

-Stows

contracts.title: Headhunter Pilot Needs a Hand
contracts.description:
Seems we got some upstarts trying to muscle in our operations by hitting a Headhunter ship near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure how they expected to get away with it.

They need to learn the hard way that's not how things work in Pyro. You up for heading over there and teaching these bastards a lesson?

- Stows out

contracts.description: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at ~mission(Location|Address) who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out

contracts.title: Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
unlocks: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement
contracts.description:
Are you an experienced contractor looking to increase your income with some security work? Or maybe you’re new to the field and are looking for some hands-on experience? 

Foxwell Enforcement are looking for enthusiastic new contractors to help with local law enforcement. To see if you’re the right fit for us, we’d like for you to head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)<EM4> and support the security forces on site. Local gang members have been giving that spot problems. Help the local forces take care of these outlaws to qualify for more contract opportunities with Foxwell.

Contractors are employed on a strictly freelance basis. Foxwell expects contractors to supply their own weapons and armor and does not accept any responsibility for any injuries, damages, or deaths accumulated during the contract.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party
contracts.description:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Minor Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Recover Cargo
contracts.description:
Hi,

Someone knocked out one of our supply ships and towed it to ~mission(Location|Address). We really need the cargo onboard. You available to head over there and recover that cargo? 

Once you’ve got the goods, we need them taken to their original destination at ~mission(Destination|Address). Did a little digging into this group, and let’s just say, they don’t come off as very professional. Shouldn’t give you too much resistance, but still best to show up ready to throw down.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Fly Safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: A Well Deserved Break
contracts.description:
I've been having a hard time tracking this target down. They're part of a gang known as the Claw Salamanders who tend to be quite itinerate. However, it seems the group has been trying to get an old QV Breaker Station operational again and I think this just may be the chance to take out ~mission(TargetName) once and for all. 

Start your search at ~mission(Location|Address).  These stations can apparently be quiet cavernous at  times so it may take a bit of effort to locate the target once you're on site.

However, I have all the confidence in your abilities,
Vaughn

contracts.title: A Well Deserved Break
contracts.description:
There is a member of the Nyx gang the Claw Salamanders, ~mission(TargetName), who has made it on to my naughty list. They had been on the run for quite awhile, but just recently popped back up at an old mining station in the Keeger Belt. Our lucky day shall be their last.  

Word is that you can find them at ~mission(Location|Address).  Unfortunately, there is a strong chance you may have to do some repairs to the station itself before you can gain access to that particular area.

But I'm sure you're more than up to the challenge.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

contracts.title: Time to Teach a Lesson
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client of ours has been receiving anonymous threats in an attempt to blackmail them, and after a bit of leg work on our part, we’ve managed to trace it back to an individual who pilots a particular <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. The client wants us to take care of this blackmailer before they have a chance to make good. 

Based on our assessment, the target shouldn’t be too difficult to handle. They fly by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> on the regular, which has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s an ideal spot to power down your ship and lie in wait. Sometimes the target is alone but they often travel with other single-seat ships as protection. Best be strategic when you launch your ambush or the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> could have a chance to get away. We don’t want to lose this one. We’ll alert other contractors in the area of the ambush so they can come help once it pops off.     

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client has also added a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Silent Strike
contracts.description:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows

contracts.description:

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Access Engineering Files
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
From the personnel files recovered at the Onyx Facility, we have now learned that Dr. Jorrit has recently visited the site and accessed files while there. The next step will be to follow this lead and try to learn exactly what Dr. Jorrit was doing in his old lab.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
I've found a work around for the QT issue so you'll be able to travel directly to the site from now on.

Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / UCM)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent small-scale order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and Construction Materials by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: Wipe Citizens for Prosperity Data Farm
contracts.description:
Turns out those Citizens for Prosperity bastards have been gathering intel on us. They're going to try to cut us off from several revenue streams and bleed us dry. Can't let that happen. 

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy their data storage. 

That should teach them not to stick their noses where they don't belong.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Wipe Out XenoThreat Servers
contracts.description:
Something just fell into my lap that is way too good to pass up. XenoThreat's intelligence gathering is a bit of legend in the circles I run in and it turns out that they're storing a whole heap of their best intel at ~mission(Location|Address).

Would be a shame if someone, say like you, were to go there and blow it all up, huh? 

-Stows out

contracts.title: Disable Outlaw Stronghold at [Location]
contracts.description:
Following a series of raids against Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we believe we have traced those responsible back to ~mission(Location|Address).

Attacking them directly will pose too great of a risk and most likely encourage aggressive reprisals. Instead, we believe that if their power generators were to be disable it could force them to settle somewhere else.

Do you think you could handle it for us?
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Ghost [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Can’t believe how many criminals are crawling around this damn system. Guess we’ll have to make some room for ourselves. 

Got a list of high-level leaders here. Nothing brings chaos and disorder to the existing gangs like a good decapitation attack. The next target is <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, who we’ve tracked to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Feel like ghosting ‘em?   

These old Hathor platform facilities are big and spread out. Doubt there’s a way to do this and not attract the attention of their foot soldiers. Ain’t gonna be easy but sure sounds like fun.

- Stows

contracts.title: Need someone taken out
contracts.description:
Got a crew that's been hitting Headhunter ships lately. Their leader's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). We've tracked them to  ~mission(Location|Address), so we're looking for someone to put them down for good.

This group likes to fight, but shouldn't be a problem for someone like you. 

Get over there and get it done.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Shot in the chaos
contracts.description:
My boss is looking for an available hitter. Headhunters are looking to retake ~mission(Location|Address). The CFP Mercs there have been digging in for a long fight. Look, we don't want to kill anyone we don't have to, so we're looking into other options.

Security there's being run by ~mission(TargetName) and my Judge thinks that if they're taken out, the rest'll scatter. Shedding a little blood's better than a lot, right?

-Stows

contracts.title: Wanna be a Headhunter?
contracts.description:
You know us. You know what we do. System’s getting a little crowded, so we’re looking for some good soldiers to help keep our place here.

If you’re up for it and don’t mind getting your hands dirty, we’ve got something to prove you’ve got the stuff we’re looking for.

~mission(TargetName) was a former member who sold us out to XenoThreat and got some of their brothers and sisters killed. Now they think they can just live their life without consequence.

You take them out. You get boosted in. Sounds like a fair trade.

They’ve been spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there and take care of it.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Target takedown for a fast track in
contracts.description:
So here's the deal, Headhunters are looking to expand their talent pool and have a few openings for anyone who's got the stones.

There's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName) who thinks they've been really clever pinching cargo off of haulers moving through the system. We asked for a cut of their profits as a licensing tax to continue operating. When ~mission(TargetName|Last) responded, they were very disrespectful.

We've tracked their ship to ~mission(Location|Address) and need them taken out. You should know, they're being smart and sticking close to some allies so they won't be alone.

Do this and we'll consider you for future Headhunter work.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Special Covalex Delivery Stanton System
contracts.description:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Sent ~mission(TargetName) out to check out a strange noise in one of our storehouses and haven't heard from them in a while. Turns out they got themselves kidnapped. We've got intel that says they're being held at ~mission(Location|Address), but we're not sure about the source. Need someone to swing by and make sure the info is legit.  

Whether it's good news or bad, there are some creds in it for you. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #2
contracts.description:
Congrats on completing part one of this eight-part course.

Scenario two will focus on how to deal with multiple targets at the same time. Goal here is give you a better handle on how to balance offense and defense.   

Whenever you’re set, grab a combat ship, and head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Pick Your Fight - For situations where you’re coming up against multiple targets of equal threat, your best strategy is to focus on neutralizing one target at a time to gradually reduce the amount of incoming fire.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: Recover Cargo
contracts.description:
Hi,

Someone knocked out one of our supply ships and towed it to ~mission(Location|Address). We really need the cargo onboard. You available to head over there and recover that cargo? 

Once you’ve got the goods, we need them taken to their original destination at ~mission(Destination|Address). Did a little digging into this group, and let’s just say, they don’t come off as very professional. Shouldn’t give you too much resistance, but still best to show up ready to throw down.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Fly Safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group
contracts.description: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Sweep and Clear Location
contracts.description:
Looking for someone willing to take out the trash at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Guess a gang has settled in without the permission of the owners. So they’ve hired us to get them out whatever way we see fit. 

I’d bring plenty of ammo, if I were you. Doubt they’ll want to leave willingly. 


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Out PAF
contracts.description:
We’ve been tracking a group of outlaws who’ve been causing trouble for one of our clients. Seems they’ve taken up residence at an old Hathor facility. Don’t know what their plans with that old facility are but our client is eager to have them taken care of.

Looking for someone to go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and neutralize these targets.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Merc Work
contracts.description:
We’ve been following a group of outlaws on behalf of a client, and it looks like they’ve taken a permanent pit stop on an old orbital platform. 

We’re looking for a contractor who can head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and neutralize the targets. The platform is crawling with a bunch of armed and dangerous thugs, so we’ve designated this a yellow level contract.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

contracts.title: Patrol Travel Lanes
contracts.description:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party
contracts.description:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: See What’s Out There
contracts.description:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About us <
As the leading procurer and distributor of salvage rights, Adagio Holdings are now looking to expand into the acquisition and distribution of salvageable materials to both small and large-scale businesses.

> About the job <
As a part of this initiative, we need keen-eyed contractors capable of identifying salvageable materials, efficiently stripping them, and delivering the Recycle Material Composite (RMC) and salvaged components to us.

This introductory contract will require you to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and strip an abandoned ship approved for salvage.

Once you've gathered the RMC, you'll deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
unlocks: Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / UCM)
Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / Components)
Salvager Needed (Small Special Order of RMC / Components)

contracts.title: Red Wind Easy Cargo Recovery
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

One of our haulers ran into some engine trouble whilst transporting some cargo for us and was forced to abandon their ship. Looking for a contractor who can recover the cargo and complete the delivery. You’ll need to bring your own <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the cargo to your ship. Details below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

Be advised, the recovery location hasn’t been verified as safe. You might find an opportunistic outlaw trying to take the cargo for themselves, so be on alert.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

contracts.title: Small Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
contracts.description:
Hiya,

I've got a client who's been messaging me all morning about a shipment they were supposed to receive and when I checked up on the cargo it turns out that it's sitting completely still in the middle of space.

This is obviously bad for a number of reasons, and not just because I had to spend 20 minutes getting yelled at. Can you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and see what happened? The original contract called for a ship that could carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you've got that and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

Once you've got the cargo, can you make sure it's delivered to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>? Thanks a bunch.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Minor Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
Hi,

One of our outposts at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is in need of some light repairs. The folks onsite have estimated that you’ll need <EM4>three fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to fix up to three or so pipes.</EM4>

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks again for your help,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Surprise Strike
contracts.description:
An outlaw who’s been on the run finally returned to the system. Seems like they hoped that disappearing for a bit would make us forget about them. They’re not even trying to hide their identity or vary their routine which means we know exactly where they’re going to be.

Latest intel indicates that they’re flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and will be passing by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. I’ve already scoped out an emission cloud that’s a perfect place for you to find cover, power down your ship, and wait. Only real variable is if they’ll be alone or not. We’ve heard they sometimes roll with friends that all fly single-seaters. Landing that first surprise strike will be important as this crew is battle-tested, but we’ll have reinforcements at the ready to provide support if you need them.

Get this done and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad

contracts.title: Silent Strike
contracts.description:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows

contracts.title: [ReputationRank] Hauler Needed for Direct [CargoGradeToken] Shipment
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

contracts.title: Clear Citizens for Prosperity Servers
contracts.description:
Long story, short - a Headhunter messed up real bad and now Citizens for Prosperity has gotten their hands on some data that could really do some damage to us. 

The bastard is going to need some time to heal so that leaves it to you to clean up the mess. Can you go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy the servers they got stored there? I wanna make sure there's no chance of this info getting out there.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Pest Control
contracts.description:
A client has contacted us about resolving a <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> infestation issue before it gets any worse. Several locations around <EM4>~mission(Location|address)</EM4> are currently beset by the creatures. There’s a growing concern that if this goes on for too much longer, then the natural habit will be ravaged beyond repair. Are you available to take care of this issue?

You can refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specific information on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Disrupt Operations
contracts.description:
We've just received the location of an outlaw outpost where some up-and-coming criminals have been hanging out. Now, our client says there's no reason to engage these folks directly. Instead you will be targeting their supply lines.

Fly on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel stores while dealing with any minimal resistance they may put up. It will be your call on how much you engage with the hostile forces, just don't forget that your main objective is ensuring those fuel tanks are out of action.

This is a yellow level contract so pay will be proportionate.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Patrol Travel Lanes
contracts.description:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Kevin Walton

contracts.title: See What’s Out There
contracts.description:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

contracts.title: No Fly Zone
contracts.description:
Some competition has taken root at ~mission(Location|Address) and they've really been gumming up the works for our operations in the area.

Now part of me sees some potential in the upstarts so I'm hoping to bring them into fold, but at the same time, I can't really afford to have them flying around causing trouble.

Instead, I want you to go and blow up their fuel tanks. That should keep them grounded long enough for me to talk some sense into their thick heads.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Client's Cargo Needs Recovering
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client's cargo was mid-transport when they ran into some ship trouble, and now a group of opportunistic outlaws are looking to cash in on this.

If you accept, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and deal with the outlaws guarding the cargo. Extract it using a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, recover the cargo, load it in to a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and deposit it on the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Intercepted Supply Run
contracts.description:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Retrieve Supplies
contracts.description:
Hi,

It appears an electrical issue caused us to lose track of a ~mission(Ship) carrying medical supplies. Thankfully, I received word that the ship was found at ~mission(Location|Address). We really need someone to get out there and recover the supplies onboard before someone else does. Those provisions are desperately needed at ~mission(Destination|Address). Any chance you could grab them and complete the delivery? 

Makes me nervous seeing that the ship is at a lagrange point. Lots of folks scour them for stuff like this. Would be smart to come prepared to defend yourself if someone else comes looking to steal it.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.    

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Locate Missing Clients
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51643
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Looking for an operative to confirm the status of a client. They and their partner missed a scheduled meeting and all attempts to contact them have proven in vain. Last we heard they were undertaking some business in ~mission(System) and fear that they may be the victim of some unfortunate tragedy.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Be cautious while conducting your search. If the client did meet harm, it would be unfortunate for you to meet the same fate.

contracts.title: Locate Missing Employee
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51132
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us locate the current whereabouts of a client's employee. They were on assignment in ~mission(System) but has failed to report in. Our client is beginning to fear the worst.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and components by stripping abandoned ships and removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: Ling Shipment Recovery
contracts.description:
Hello,

Looking for a quick job? Got a client who's waiting on a shipment but our hauler ran into some engine trouble. Can't seem to get them up and running so we need someone to take over.

Fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and you'll spot their ship. You can't miss it - it's the one that's sitting still in the middle of space. Make sure you bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> along with a decent ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Once you've picked up the goods take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Cleaning Up Someone Else’s Mess
contracts.description:
You know when you ask someone a question and you have a feeling they’re lying, but you choose to give them the benefit of the doubt? Yeah. That’s what I’m dealing with right now.

Two “expert” haulers I hired to transport some gear for me ran into some trouble and ended up ditching my goods over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Needless to say, I’ve ordered a hit on them, but what I need from you is to go recover that cargo. The tracker says the cargo’s still on the ship, so you’ll just need a <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and your own ship to recover it.

You might run into a couple of scavengers lurking around there, but I doubt you’ll have any trouble with them.

When you’re done, take the stuff to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll sort you out with a reward.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Taking what’s ours
contracts.description:
Managed to intercept a ship carrying some goods over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> but we hit a snag - our guys didn’t have enough space in their ships to store it. You wanna make some quick creds? Head over there and grab the stuff. Could be a few scavs there by now so be on your guard.

Just don’t forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> as that shit’s heavy.

When you’re done, drop it off at the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we’ll take care of the rest.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Test Your Mettle
contracts.description:
Heahunters are on the lookout for motivated and competent contractors who can be trusted to do a wide range of work supporting our operations. If you think you have what it takes, I’ve got a mission here that’ll test your skills in several ways. 

A ~mission(Ship) transporting cargo for us is currently under attack at ~mission(Location|Address). Don’t think it’s looking good for our ship, but that cargo is too important to let fall into someone else’s hands. Need you to head to the location and deal with the attackers before they get away, then collect our cargo and take it to ~mission(Destination|Address). 

If you can handle this, then there'll be lots more work I can send your way.  

Stows out.

contracts.title: Get Our Shit!
contracts.description:
Someone with a death wish attacked one of our ships hauling some primo product. Our crew on the scene is outta commission, so we need someone to get there fast and recover the stash before those bozos make off with it. Any chance you can handle this for us?  
  
Looks like the attack went down at ~mission(Location|Address). Head over there and deal with the attackers before they get away. Then grab the goods from the ~mission(Ship) and take ‘em to ~mission(Destination|Address). Oh, and don’t be an idiot and get high on that supply, unless you want me to send someone after you next. 

- Stows

contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Med. Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Looking for a contractor with a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to run a delivery for us across Stanton.

This isn't a particularly long delivery route, but you will be moving between couple of different locations. To make sure things go smoothly, bring enough fuel and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to speed up moving the boxes.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: ENTRY LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON
unlocks: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Small Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for Volt weapons. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract."

contracts.title: First Haul in System
contracts.description:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we need a package picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
unlocks: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Special Order of RMC / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and components by stripping abandoned ships and removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: Ling Shipment Recovery
contracts.description:
Hello,

Looking for a quick job? Got a client who's waiting on a shipment but our hauler ran into some engine trouble. Can't seem to get them up and running so we need someone to take over.

Fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and you'll spot their ship. You can't miss it - it's the one that's sitting still in the middle of space. Make sure you bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> along with a decent ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Once you've picked up the goods take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

contracts.title: Anybody Seen [TargetName]?
contracts.description:
So, I sent one of our people, a new recruit by the name ~mission(TargetName), to do a hand-off over at ~mission(Location|Address), but now the bastard’s gone missing.

I’m thinking they either ran off with Headhunter credits and they’re good as dead, or they were robbed and now they’re lying there actually good as dead. Either way, I’d like for you to go have a look and see if you can find them.

If you settle the matter, I’ll give you what their cut would have been.

-Stows

contracts.title: Track Down [TargetName]
contracts.description:
A few days back I dispatched ~mission(TargetName|Last) to scope out a cave system for potential use as a storehouse. Haven't heard from them since. 

My gut tells me they ran into trouble. The local wildlife isn't known for being friendly, and ~mission(TargetName|Last) isn't exactly known for being cautious. If you're in need of some creds, I'm offering some up for anyone who can get in there and figure out what happened. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Anybody Seen [TargetName]?
contracts.description:
I know better than to send someone like ~mission(TargetName) out by themselves, but that didn’t stop me from being a fool and doing it. Now the dumb SOB hasn’t returned my comms and nobody has set eyes on them in a few days.

If you got the time, I could use someone to go over to ~mission(Location|Address) and see if they’re still there. You get paid even if they wind up being dead.

-Stows

contracts.title: Reduce Overpopulation
contracts.description:
We’ve been monitoring a situation at <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> regarding an uptick in the <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> population over the past few months. Our models indicate that if this continues many of the native plants and animals will be adversely affected. It’s imperative that the <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> population is reduced before that happens.     

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Reduce Overpopulation
contracts.description:
We’ve been monitoring a situation at <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> regarding an uptick in the <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> population over the past few months. Our models indicate that if this continues many of the native plants and animals will be adversely affected. It’s imperative that the <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> population is reduced before that happens.     

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Inter-Outpost Delivery at [Destination]
contracts.description:
Hey,

We’ve got an opportunity for any haulers interested in lending a hand or two to Citizens for Prosperity.

There’s a box that needs to be moved from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Shouldn’t take long, if you’re around the outpost and available. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Establishing Security
contracts.description:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we are looking for anyone with combat experience to help secure <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that has been taken over by a group of outlaws.

We've tried to work with them but have only been met with violence and threats.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Assistance needed at [Location]
contracts.description:
We received a distress call from ~mission(Location|Address) saying that they're being robbed by a small group of outlaws. ~mission(Location|CaveSize) Though remote, this outpost is a crucial piece of CFP's infrastructure in the area so we need to take it back.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: [Destination] Errand
contracts.description:
Got a box sitting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that needs to make its way over to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Any chance you can knock this out real quick?

Might be the easiest gig I’ve ever assigned out. Only real threat would be tripping over your own feet. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: [Location] needs some repairs
contracts.description:
Hey if you’re reading this, we need a hand. An outpost of ours down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> got hit by a nasty storm and suffered some damage. None of our usual techs are available (or alive) to swing by so we wanna hire someone to go fix some fuses (no idea how many but <EM4>no more than three</EM4> I think). If you can bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC canisters to sort out around three pipes</EM4>, we should be good.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Wipe Citizens for Prosperity Data Farm
contracts.description:
Turns out those Citizens for Prosperity bastards have been gathering intel on us. They're going to try to cut us off from several revenue streams and bleed us dry. Can't let that happen. 

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy their data storage. 

That should teach them not to stick their noses where they don't belong.

-Stows out

contracts.title: Med. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.description:

FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS**
Junior-level courier needed for deliveries across the Stanton System.

Couriers are responsible for the correct handling and safety of all packages charged to their care.

contracts.title: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: Deep space hit
contracts.description:
Got word of crew that's been pulling jobs and building a rep for themselves. Since they've said they don't want anything to do with Headhunters, we're looking to break 'em apart before they become a problem. Their leader is some punk named ~mission(TargetName) and we figure if they met the wrong end of a bullet, the rest of them would break apart.

We're told you can find ~mission(TargetName|Last) around ~mission(Location|Address). Head over and take care of it.

They shouldn't pose much of a problem to a pro like you.

Stows out.

contracts.title: New Opportunity - Ambush Strike
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’re looking for contractors with combat experience who are willing to get their hands dirty so to speak. A client of ours was double-crossed by a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and we’ve been waiting for an opportunity to deal with the issue. After tracking them for several weeks, we’ve identified <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> as the ideal spot to intercept them. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>.

Intel suggests that they may travel with an escort. If they do, you’ll have to deal with them too. Since this is your first contract, we will have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
unlocks: INFILITRATE ASD SITE AND DESTROY SERVERS
FIND SERVERS AT ASD SITE AND DESTROY

contracts.title: Settle a Score
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients has been the victim of consistent harassment so the time has come to send a clear cease-and-desist message by taking out their prized <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>.  The lowlife in question follows a fairly predictable routine making them susceptible to an ambush. We’ve identified <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> as the ideal spot. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting. 

By the way, the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> often flies alone but is sometimes joined by a friend in a single-seat ship. Neither should give you too much trouble, but we have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Setting a Trap
contracts.description:
Got an opportunity for someone eager to show off their flying skills. Headhunters have been running afoul of this numbrain flying a<EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and we’re gonna put a stop to it once and for all.

You’re gonna help us set a trap for them. See, there’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. 

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see ‘em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Surprise Party
contracts.description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System)
RISK ASSESSMENT: ~mission(Danger)
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: They have several known associates with criminal records so they may not be alone so arm up and exercise caution when engaging.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

By accepting this contract you agree to take full responsibility for the safety of the assigned packages.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)
unlocks: JR. LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Limiting Potential Threat
contracts.description:
A bunch of outlaws have been harassing our client and recently things have taken a turn for the worse. They've taken over their property and we've exhausted all other options.

We need a decent pilot to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you can cut off their supplies, you can pave the way for the client to take back their property.

This shouldn't be a tough one. You might run into a ship or two and maybe a few turrets, but you've been authorized to use lethal force. All we need for you to do is get in there, get the fuel tanks, and get out.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement

contracts.title: Ground The Upstarts
contracts.description:
Headhunters didn't get to be what it is today by playing nice. We've tracked down the hideout of a bunch of scraggy upstarts that have been making inroads into our territory. Need you to send a message.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and blow out of their fuel tanks. They'll think twice about muscling in on our operations when their ships are grounded.

-Stows out

contracts.title: [Location] needs some repairs
contracts.description:
Hey if you’re reading this, we need a hand. An outpost of ours down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> got hit by a nasty storm and suffered some damage. None of our usual techs are available (or alive) to swing by so we wanna hire someone to go fix some fuses (no idea how many but <EM4>no more than three</EM4> I think). If you can bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC canisters to sort out around three pipes</EM4>, we should be good.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
