contracts.title: Covalex_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Title
contracts.description:
Hi,

So I had a contractor who was supposed to deliver some stuff for us but has completely gone off the radar. I've pinged their ship and I've got no idea what's happened but they're floating around somewhere over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. If you could head over there recover the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> you'd be doing me a huge favor.

Don't forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move all the cargo. Oh and a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

contracts.title: XenoThreat Lieutenant needs some killing
contracts.description:
Headhunters just rallied up a crew to go hit ~mission(Location|Address) and wipe out the XenoThreat there, but I'm looking to add some extra insurance. 

See there's this heavy hitter there named ~mission(TargetName) who's up in the XenoThreat command structure and we want them taken out. Every other one you kill is gravy, but they're your prime target.

-Stows

contracts.title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #1
contracts.description:
Looking to gain critical hands-on experience battling a variety of targets and situations? Then my Combat Gauntlet might be the perfect fit for you.

Please understand that this course is intended for pilots who have already mastered flying basics and are ready to take their abilities to the next level. If you’re starting off and want to learn the ropes, I’d recommend logging some hours in an Arena Commander simpod. But for those ready to face a real challenge, I firmly believe that students learn best by doing. 

That’s why I’ve designed these eight scenarios to be as realistic as possible. I promise you this is the closest thing to Navy combat pilot training you can get without enlisting, so don’t expect a lot of hand holding. <EM4>The risk of injury to yourself or your ship should be taken very seriously.</EM4>

GAUNTLET SCENARIOS:
1. Single Targets
2. Multiple Targets
3. Target Priority
4. Target Stealth
5. Missiles and Countermeasures
6. Multi-Crew Targets
7. Corvette with Escorts
8. Capital Ship Encounter

So, if you’re ready to challenge yourself and prove you got what it takes to be a great pilot, the first scenario will focus on handling a single target. Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Situational Awareness – Don’t get so focused on taking a target that you aren’t watching your flight path. No good taking out the enemy if you fly headfirst into an asteroid.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly    


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL 
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

contracts.title: Low Risk Cargo Retrieval
contracts.description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of my clients was in the process of transporting some cargo when they came under fire from a group of outlaws. We haven't been able to contact the crew onboard, but trackers indicate the cargo remains intact.

We need a contractor to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, recover the cargo, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. A ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are essential for this. Presently, we're not detecting any hostiles, but that could change by the time you've arrived.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

contracts.title: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
contracts.description:
Care to help us ghost a bad guy? 

We’ve been hired to hunt down an outlaw flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Shouldn’t be too hard since they take the same flightpath each day. That makes them a prime target for an ambush if I ever saw one. I’ve analyzed the route and determined that <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the ideal spot to strike. There’s an emission cloud there that’ll be perfect to hide your ship’s signature while you wait.   

Job is simple if you’re interested. Head to the location, hide out, power down, and then wait for them to fly by. Sometimes they roll alone but they often have other single-seat ships with them. Shouldn’t be too hard to handle for a pro. Plus, we’ll still have reinforcements nearby and ready to deploy once it pops off.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,


Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
requiresCompletion: Exciting New Opportunities with Foxwell Enforcement
unlocks: Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad

contracts.title: Finishing The Job
contracts.description:
One of my haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and was forced to ditch their ship. I need someone to go there with <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to grab the cargo and finish the job.

They were carrying a decent supply of gear for me, and the last thing I need is for some do-gooder to come across it and trace it back to us.

If you do run into anybody, no need to be friendly. Just shoot the asshole and get my gear. Understood?

Take it to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a cut of the sale.

-Twitch

contracts.title: Grab ‘n’ go
contracts.description:
Just got word of an abandoned ship with a fat stack of cargo ripe for the pluckin’. If you’re interested, you’ll need to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Word might have gotten around, so there’s probably some skags hanging around, but just ghost them and get the stash.

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and I’ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Setting a Trap
contracts.description:
Got an opportunity for someone eager to show off their flying skills. Headhunters have been running afoul of this numbrain flying a<EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and we’re gonna put a stop to it once and for all.

You’re gonna help us set a trap for them. See, there’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. 

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see ‘em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Surprise Party
contracts.description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see ‘em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Surprise Party
contracts.description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

contracts.title: Minor Repairs Needed: [Location]
contracts.description:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Pack of Kopions Threatening CFP
contracts.description:
Highpoint Wilderness is seeking a contractor to cull a pack of kopions that are threatening to overrun one of Citizens for Prosperity's outposts. After an initial assessment, it has been decided that relocation is impossible and a culling of them is the only viable option. If you're interested, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>  and once we've received confirmation that the task is complete we will send payment.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Overpopulated Kopions Need Exterminating
contracts.description:
Highpoint Wilderness needs someone to exterminate an overpopulated pack of kopions that's threatening one of CFP's settlements. This pack can be found at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Remember to exhibit caution when approaching them and arm yourself accordingly.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: [RaceType] Open Track: [location]
contracts.description:
Looking to get some practice track time to improve your piloting skills? Then strap in and throttle up with Wildstar Racing Amateur League.

~mission(RaceDetails)

DISCLAIMER
Wildstar Racing requires the contracted racer to be the vehicle pilot, no substitutes or stand-ins are allowed. Please be mindful that Wildstar Racing utilizes publicly accessible tracks and that other individuals may be present. Wildstar Racing is not responsible for any damage your ship may suffer while racing.

contracts.title: XS Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for a heavy Antium armor set. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.


~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract."

contracts.title: Jorrit Dossier: Onyx Personnel Files
contracts.description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.
unlocks: Jorrit Dossier: Updated Energy Anomaly Data
Jorrit Dossier: Updated Power Usage Data

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Med. Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
contracts.description:
Hi,

Looking for a contractor with a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to run a delivery for us across Stanton.

This isn't a particularly long delivery route, but you will be moving between couple of different locations. To make sure things go smoothly, bring enough fuel and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to speed up moving the boxes.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
requiresCompletion: ENTRY LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON
unlocks: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton

contracts.title: Take Out Citizens for Prosperity Fuel Supply
contracts.description:
It seems like I can't go a day without waking up to one of my people bitchin' and moanin' about how hard Citizens for Prosperity is making their life. 

Eventually we're going wipe those do-gooders out of the system, but for now I'll settle for some peace and quiet. 

Go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy the fuel stores CFP have got there. That should at least keep them out of our business for a bit.

-Stows out

Sound like your kinda thing?

-Stows out

contracts.title: [Location] needs some repairs
contracts.description:
Hey if you’re reading this, we need a hand. An outpost of ours down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> got hit by a nasty storm and suffered some damage. None of our usual techs are available (or alive) to swing by so we wanna hire someone to go fix some fuses (no idea how many but <EM4>no more than three</EM4> I think). If you can bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC canisters to sort out around three pipes</EM4>, we should be good.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

contracts.title: [Location] needs a bunch of repairs
contracts.description:
Sending a call out to anyone nearby. Got a pretty heavy work order for one of our outposts at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Sounds like we need <EM4>six fuses</EM4> fixed. You'll also need a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC to patch up about five pipes</EM4> to stop the place from falling apart.

If you bring all the shit needed to patch them up, we'll pay you out.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

contracts.title: [Location] needs massive repairs
contracts.description:
Down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, the place got utterly smashed in a storm and needs some serious patchwork.

If anyone out there has a <EM4>bunch of fuses</EM4> (I hear <EM4>six</EM4> should be plenty), a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC cans to deal with eight or so messed up pipes</EM4>, we'll hook you up with some creds to do the fix.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

contracts.title: Finish Interrupted Ling Delivery
contracts.description:
Hey,

Here's the thing: one of our haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and had to ditch their ship. Could you head over there and help us finish the delivery?

Not a huge job by any means, but you'll still need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with enough space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.
 
Drop the cargo off at the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll send you the creds.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
requiresCompletion: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling

While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Shut Off Power at [Location]
contracts.description: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at ~mission(Location|Address) who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out

contracts.title: Pest Control
contracts.description:
There’s a growing <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> problem at <EM4>~mission(Location|address)</EM4>. Looking for a contractor to quickly and professionally take care of this infestation issue.  

For further details on the targeted creature, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Cut Citizens For Prosperity Power
contracts.description:
We got big plans about to go down but unfortunately Citizens for Prosperity have people nearby at  ~mission(Location|Address).

Since I can't afford to have those bastards cockin' things up for us, I want you to go there and take out their power generators.

Should keep them sidelined until we're done with our business. 

-Stows out

contracts.title: Verified Bounty: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
--------------------------------------------------------
-------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Nyx
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Shattered Blade
NOTES: The Shattered Blade are known for targeting Vanduul in order to acquire and sell black market tech, however they also have been reported to use violence against authority figures who interfere in their affairs.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

contracts.title: Scrap Salvage at [Location]
contracts.description:
Need a hand taking care of some scrap at ~mission(Location|Address). The team there put it all in one place but can’t be bothered to salvage it. Just clear it out for them to get some RMC and make some easy creds. 

- Stows

contracts.title: Clear [Location] of Salvage
contracts.description:
Hi,

A repair crew has been making some much needed changes and upgrades to our outposts. After finishing some work at ~mission(Location|Address), they've set aside some scrap they didn’t have time to deal with. 

Looking to hire someone to go there and salvage it so it’s out of the way. Should be a quick clean up if you’re interested. Any RMC is yours to keep.

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: Special Purchase Order: Mined Materials
contracts.description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: Armor with horn and string
contracts.description:
Hello, know many humans want saldynium for regen problem. Credits good, yes, but Wikelo can use that, kopion horn, and other things to make special armor. 

Once done, you be very tough. Very scary.

You see items needed. Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and I make for you.

Bye.

contracts.title: Fun Kopion Skull Gun
contracts.description:
Hello. Can make fun change to gun if you want. Use kopion skin for pattern and little skull dangle. Very effective. Shoot much better.

All you need is bring me parts to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make. 

Bye.

contracts.title: Fun Military Skull Gun
contracts.description: Hello. Can do version of gun if you kopion soldier. Make material like soldier camouflage but with dead skull on front. Gun shoot better too.\n\nIf want, bring part to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make.

contracts.title: Make glowy armor
contracts.description:
Wikelo had exciting idea during brief work rest. Was thinking about the little glow worms in Pyro and saw armor get changed to look like.

If you get me parts, bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make for you then you can glow too.

Bye.

contracts.title: Make VOLT shotgun angrier
contracts.description:
You feel like gun not angry enough? VOLT shotgun very powerful, very dangerous, but not scary? Bring to me. Can make very scary and angry.

They respect you then. Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and we make.

Bye.

contracts.title: Snow Snipe
contracts.description:
Want to shoot long away and stay hiding. But it snowing? Wikelo have gun for you.

Bring things. I give.

Bye.

contracts.title: Hide Snow Suit
contracts.description: You want be hidden. Wikelo understand. Not ask questions why. But what do when you in snow? Wikelo have suit for that.\n\nWelcome.

contracts.title: Do Lava Suit
contracts.description: If you have armor, Wikelo can make it look warm. Good look for useful armor. Bring me things and will do.

contracts.title: Shiny Builder Suit
contracts.description: You need utility suit. Good for work. If you like, Wikelo can make shinier. Look real good. See what Wikelo need and bring.

contracts.title: Yormandi Gun
contracts.description: This gun has picture of amazing creature on side. Use it and it make you big and strong like Yormandi. Spit lightning. Bring my items and then you get it. Bye.

contracts.title: Test Armor
contracts.description: Bring me armor and other things and I give you special test armor. First version. Very special. Bring and I give. Bye.

contracts.title: Armor with Vanduul
contracts.description:
Vanduul have strange ways. I never talk to them, old souli used to, but not Wikelo. Anyway, though not friendly, they make interesting thing. If you like, Wikelo can make you look more like.

Bring things. Will do.

Bye.

contracts.title: Curious Weapon
contracts.description: Wikelo find very strange but functional weapon while wandering through your systems. It very simple but very effective. If you bring me things, I show you what I do to it.\n\nVery fun.

contracts.title: Hot Shot
contracts.description: You need a good weapon, yes? Have one for you. Small but powerful. Like an extra spicy balalu pepper. Wikelo make this pistol look extra spicy too. You bring things I need and I do a trade.\n\nBye.

contracts.title: Red Fight Shotgun
contracts.description: Shooting can be messy. Red Human Blood everywhere. Not a problem with this shotgun. Splashes blends right in! I give it to you if you give me everything I want on list. Good trade.

contracts.title: Red Fight Armor
contracts.description: Wikelo hear that Humans think red is the color of passion and anger. This armor good for both. You give me items on list and this red armor is yours.

contracts.title: Wikelo Arrive to System
contracts.description:
Hello, I am Wikelo. Recent addition to your system and very excited to be here. Spent many time here in UEE and happy to spent more.

Have place where I make things from other things.

Need person to bring me useful things to finish project I work on. You have list. Get, please. I am at <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>.

Will give you item for your help.

Also, when done, if you want to do more. Have many things can make in my humble shop. Come, look at pretty poster and then decide what you want me to make.

Bye.

contracts.title: Very Hungry
contracts.description:
You humans keep Wikelo very busy. Work more than when I at old souli. But Wikelo very hungry now and can't get food.

Please help. Bring food and drink to Wikelo Emporium at <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>.

Very appreciate your help. Will give thing in return.

Bye.

contracts.title: Trade Worm Parts for Favors?
contracts.description:
Have new way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo. Hear much about worm things in radiation storms. Made up of many interesting parts that Wikelo find use for. 

If you bring parts to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Trade Merc Scrip for Favors?
contracts.description:
Wikelo has another way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> if you interested. 

Your Mercenary souli has <EM4>scrip</EM4> metal, used like favors, but made of very interesting metal that Wikelo need for new project.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Trade Council Scrip for Favors?
contracts.description:
If you want other way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo, have thing for you. Wikelo have need for <EM4>scrip</EM4> given out by Council group. Wikelo not part of thief souli, but has business from time to time.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Turn Things to Favor
contracts.description:
Maybe Wikelo not have something you want made (that strange, but okay). Old souli would give out <EM4>favors</EM4>, very good way to prove that you do work for me. Collect enough and trade when I have something you want.

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will trade for favor.

Bye.

contracts.title: Want Polaris? Need something special.
contracts.description:
Wikelo need large amounts of <EM4>quantainium</EM4> and is willing to give you nice Polaris in exchange but also know many humans not have much space, so you trade as you go. Wikelo will you <EM4>Polaris bits</EM4> if you want trade quantainium. Work like favors. Help Wikelo remember how much you give. 

Bring quantainium to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will trade for bits.

Bye.

contracts.title: Fortune ship for you
contracts.description: Hello, practicing on making ship fly better. Xi'an help human make ship. Fly good. Salvage good. But Wikelo can make better if you want. Bring things and will do. Bye.

contracts.title: Noxy Mod
contracts.description: Wikelo know many Xi'an. Talk slow but very interesting if you have patience. This is very fast little thing to get you across planet. Wikelo made a few tweaks to make it zippier. If you want, Wikelo will make for you. Bye.

contracts.title: Upgrade Intrepid
contracts.description: If you are looking for Intrepid ship that more intrepid. Wikelo can help. Bring things and you will get special touches on ship by Wikelo and pretty new coat to it. Bye.

contracts.title: Pulse Plus
contracts.description: Wikelo really like this little Human ship. Pulse feel very fast. Can have many configuration to make Pulse go faster. If you want, can give you configurated Pulse that I like. Have list of what I want for job. Bye.

contracts.title: Make a Ursa Mod
contracts.description: Wikelo branching into ships too. Took a look at Ursa and improved. Bring parts for me and I will make for you. Explore planet better. Go do.

contracts.title: Guardian take down ship
contracts.description: Insect ship again. This one help take down other ship but if you want it to take down better. Can make. See list and tell Wikelo. Bye.

contracts.title: Firebird Mod
contracts.description: Been digging into Aegis Sabre ship. Firebird is very bomb-y. Good build but could make some fun change to it. If you want, I can do. Have a look and tell me. Bye.

contracts.title: Build a Mod Scorpius
contracts.description: Don't know what the name mean, but ship is very fast, very good in fight. With tweak, can better. You see list of what Wikelo need, go get and I make. Bye.

contracts.title: Wikelo Navy F7
contracts.description: Know how much you Humans like Navy so Wikelo have one now. If you want Wikelo version of F7 mk2, bring me things and you are in. Very funny. Bye.

contracts.title: Zeus Special
contracts.description: Wikelo can make new version of Zeus ship. I know it important ship to Human. Not sure why, but yes, very useful ship. Anyway, can upgrade and make a little prettier. What I need listed, if you want, bring. Bye.

contracts.title: Zeus Cargo Special
contracts.description: Wikelo can make new version of cargo Zeus ship. If you want, bring what needed, then you can have ship. Fair. Bye.

contracts.title: Peregrine Wikelo Mod
contracts.description: Wikelo not want to race but can still make fast ship faster. If you want, bring me things, and go faster.

contracts.title: Spirit Cargo mod
contracts.description: Wikelo love useful cargo ship. Spirit is very useful. If you want one, can make for you. Just bring me things and I will do. Bye.

contracts.title: F8 War Mod
contracts.description: Can make you custom of F8 that take good fighting ship and make a better fighting ship. Bring things and I will make. Bye.

contracts.title: Sneaky Stabber
contracts.description: Have the pieces to build useful ship for people who like to sneak then fight. Take F8C ship and make even better. Have put what Wikelo will need to build for you. Now you decide. Bye.

contracts.title: More than a Max
contracts.description: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.

contracts.title: Want Taurus ship
contracts.description: Wikelo came across plans to build Constellation Taurus ship. Nice ship, but Wikelo make a little better. Prettier too. If you want, bring stuff.

contracts.title: Make ATLS shoot
contracts.description:
Hello. Know you human like strange metal suit. How about metal suit with ikti? Sorry, ikti is Banu word, you call it 'gun.' 

If want, bring things I say and I will make for you. Gun will shoot. Cause many damage.

Bye.

contracts.title: Make jumpy ATLS shoot
contracts.description:
Find very fun piece to add to big human suit that let you jump very high. Now you shoot and jump. Exciting.

If you want, bring me these to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>. Will make.

Wikelo

contracts.title: Now make Polaris. Short Time Deal.
contracts.description:
Wikelo recently get many blueprints in trade with human who not very smart. Now can make very big ship. 

Not cheap and need many pieces but will make. If you want, go quick, this cost much to Wikelo so won't be able to do for long but I like new Human system so I want to thank you all for welcome.

Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> if want.

Bye.

contracts.title: ATLS Cool Metal Color
contracts.description: Wikelo give deep red and green colors to make ATLS legs look like they cooling from heat. Very pretty.

contracts.title: ATLS Snowland Color
contracts.description: Wikelo travel to one Human planet and find very cold, but very pretty. This remind of that.

contracts.title: ATLS Orange Line
contracts.description: Many Human work place have orange color there. Must mean work to you. This suit does work. Make sense.

contracts.title: What is Terrapin?
contracts.description: Wikelo not know this Human word but ship is very useful when things go danger. If you want, can give new version of it. Maybe more useful?\n\nYou fly and tell. Bye.

contracts.title: Golem Rocks
contracts.description:
Universe need resources so Wikelo always respect people who dig. Good profession. If you starting and want boost to Golem ship. I can do. 

Bring. 

I make.

contracts.title: New Move Big Starlancer Ship
contracts.description: If you like big space to move things, Wikelo can do useful and wonder things to MISC ship for you. Bring me pieces and I will give you version even better than what Xi'an can do.

contracts.title: Starlifter A2 War Mod
contracts.description: Bring Wikelo the things and I make you A2 Starlifter that fights better. Does war so good make you call it A1! Bye.

contracts.title: Sneaky Starfighter Ion
contracts.description: Starfighter Ion good ship, but it could be more sneak, yes? Surprise your not friends when you shoot them. I help with this for you. I need the right items and then I can give to you. Bring to me. Bye.

contracts.title: Starfighter Inferno Special
contracts.description: Starfighter Inferno good ship, but what if you want it to be better ship at fighting? Wikelo knows just what to do. You bring me the items and I make it for you. Bye.

contracts.title: Prowler More Utility
contracts.description: Wikelo work hard. You work hard. Prowler Utility work hard. But you bring me right items, I make it work more hard, then you work less hard. Bye.

contracts.title: Guardian Fight Mod
contracts.description: This ship look like insect in the Protectorate. Fun look. Painful sting. Wikelo can make custom version for you if you want. Make enemies sting. Bye.

contracts.title: Guardian WiK-X
contracts.description: You Humans enjoy strange letter combinations. It very funny. Guardian ship very useful but if you want even more useful, bring me things. I give you better ship. Look better. Act better.\n\nThank you. Bye.

contracts.title: RSI Meteor Mod
contracts.description: Meteor big. It heavy. Have many guns. But Wikelo figure out way to make even better. You have things I will take to do.\n\nThat is all.

contracts.title: Prospects Look Good
contracts.description: Wikelo loves rocks. Wants to help you get more better rocks. Made this Prospector more better for that tough job. Trade items and you can have.

contracts.title: Ready for RAFT?
contracts.description: RAFT is very useful. Wikelo take it and make it very very useful. Do work and make you happy. You want? Bring items to Wikelo for trade.

contracts.title: Asgard Fight Mod
contracts.description: Wikelo mod Asgard and so that it fights more. You in a fight, this mod is what you want. Plus, good deal on the trade. Just bring items here and I give you the ship.

contracts.title: Where Wolf? Here Wolf
contracts.description: If you want to be quiet and surprise people, this is the Wolf you want. Wikelo mod it to be extra stealth. Trade you for it when you bring me the items I want.

contracts.title: Most Special Wolf
contracts.description: You have been good trade partner for Wikelo. Offer you this very special Wolf mod. Make trade even better - Bring me what I want and I give you the special Wolf AND Antium Armor AND a VOLT LMG. Very good deal for my very good customer.

contracts.title: Special Idris For Killing
contracts.description: Since Wikelo has done good business with you, make you this very special trade. Idris is a powerful ship perfect for big important person like you. Wikelo has even done mod to make it more dangerous! Bring me a few items and the ship is yours.

contracts.title: Red Fight Apollo
contracts.description: Apollo very good ship. Would be much better if ship was red. Wikelo make all things possible. You trade for what I want and we have a deal.

contracts.title: Wrecked Ships for Sale
contracts.description:
Had a few wrecked ships towed to ~mission(Location|Address). They’re fully out of commission and in dire need of scrapping. If you’re interested in salvaging what’s left, it can be all yours, for a fair price, too.

Plus, you don’t have to worry much about any distractions while you’re workin’ since you’ll be near one of our stations and we make sure folks behave themselves.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Salvage Wrecked Ships on the Drift
contracts.description:
Got word there’s a few ships near ~mission(Location|Address) just floating all by their lonesome. It’s good salvage, but none of our crews have the time right now. We figured to give you first snap at it.

If you want the coords, we’ll sell them to you for a price. Then you’re free to pick the wreck as clean as you like and sell it all for a tidy profit. Now, you might run into some trouble out there from rival scavs, but I’m sure it won’t be anything you can’t handle.

- Smokey

contracts.title: Easy Pickings
contracts.description:
Get this, we were sifting through some comms and picked up some excitement about a big score. It was easy work to figure out where they're hiding a ship loaded with cargo and we figured, hey, why keep this profitable knowledge to ourselves? 

Send us a few creds in finder fees and we'll send you the coordinates of the asteroid base where the ship is stashed. It’s locked inside a hangar, so you’ll need to get to it via the station’s elevators. But once inside, you’ll be able to override the lockdown at a console. Do that and it should be easy pickings.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.title: Goods for the Getting
contracts.description:
You'd figure that if people were planning a big heist they wouldn't leave all the details laying around spectrum where just about anybody could hack them? 

But hey, their loss is your gain. Currently, a cargo-heavy ship is locked down in the hangar of an asteroid base. Only way to access it is via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. We’ll happily sell you the coordinates, but the rest is up to you. 

Guess their loss will be our gain too.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.title: XenoThreat = GoodLoot
contracts.description:
You know who probably deserves taking down a peg or two? XenoThreat. 

We pulled some intel off a server that had details of all their upcoming operations, and for the right price, we could send you the exact coordinates of where an XT ship fully loaded with primo cargo is waiting. 

Here’s a little taste of what info we have so you know we’re not messing around. XenoThreat stashed the ship in a locked asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the station’s elevators. We can’t get the hangar doors open for you but have adjusted the security protocols so you’ll be able to use a console in the hangar to override the lockdown.  

Interested?

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.description:
Get this, we were sifting through some comms and picked up some excitement about a big score. It was easy work to figure out where they're hiding a ship loaded with cargo and we figured, hey, why keep this profitable knowledge to ourselves? 

Send us a few creds in finder fees and we'll send you the coordinates of the asteroid base where the ship is stashed. It’s locked inside a hangar, so you’ll need to get to it via the station’s elevators. But once inside, you’ll be able to override the lockdown at a console. Do that and it should be easy pickings.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.title: Goods for the Getting
contracts.description:
You'd figure that if people were planning a big heist they wouldn't leave all the details laying around spectrum where just about anybody could hack them? 

But hey, their loss is your gain. Currently, a cargo-heavy ship is locked down in the hangar of an asteroid base. Only way to access it is via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. We’ll happily sell you the coordinates, but the rest is up to you. 

Guess their loss will be our gain too.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.title: XenoThreat = GoodLoot
contracts.description:
You know who probably deserves taking down a peg or two? XenoThreat. 

We pulled some intel off a server that had details of all their upcoming operations, and for the right price, we could send you the exact coordinates of where an XT ship fully loaded with primo cargo is waiting. 

Here’s a little taste of what info we have so you know we’re not messing around. XenoThreat stashed the ship in a locked asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the station’s elevators. We can’t get the hangar doors open for you but have adjusted the security protocols so you’ll be able to use a console in the hangar to override the lockdown.  

Interested?

57 65 65 76 69 6c

contracts.title: In the Wake of Disaster
contracts.description:
Fortune has shined upon us once again. I’ve just learned of a battle near ~mission(Location) that’s just transpired far from the prying eyes of any meddlesome comm arrays, and reinforcements from either of the forces involved have yet to be dispatched. This means that there is a window of opportunity for an enterprising soul to pick the graveyard clean.
 
I’d like to extend this opportunity to all my trusted contacts. Any and all interested parties can have the location… for the right price. Coordinates will be provided once you accept the contract and will remain available until you choose to terminate it.

Of course, speed will be of the essence as you will not only face potential competition from other salvagers, but also the looming possibility of reinforcements arriving to survey the battlefield. 

If you’re still hesitating, just remember, fortune favors the bold.

-cd

contracts.title: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About us <
As the leading procurer and distributor of salvage rights, Adagio Holdings are now looking to expand into the acquisition and distribution of salvageable materials to both small and large-scale businesses.

> About the job <
As a part of this initiative, we need keen-eyed contractors capable of identifying salvageable materials, efficiently stripping them, and delivering the Recycle Material Composite (RMC) and salvaged components to us.

This introductory contract will require you to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and strip an abandoned ship approved for salvage.

Once you've gathered the RMC, you'll deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
unlocks: Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / UCM)
Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / Components)
Salvager Needed (Small Special Order of RMC / Components)

contracts.title: Salvager Needed (Small Supply of RMC / Components)
contracts.description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and components by stripping abandoned ships and removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
requiresCompletion: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

contracts.title: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Exclusive)
contracts.description:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

contracts.title: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Shared)
contracts.description:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS: 
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>shared mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to you and your crew. (Remember, any other interested parties who purchase the mining rights will get access to the station as well.) Your crew will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that since this is a shared contract we are able to offer these mining rights at a reduced prices, but the resources in the asteroid will be available on a <EM4>first come, first serve</EM4> basis with any other mining crews at the site. Also, there is also a chance that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

ENTRY LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON
contracts.description:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 
A reliable and hardworking entry-level courier is needed to ferry a delivery in Stanton.
You will be responsible for providing your own transportation.
Interested contractors need the <EM4>ability to lift up to .25 SCU boxes</EM4>.
Contractors are employed on an independent basis and therefore not covered by FTL's company insurance.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

contracts.title: Kopion Culling for CFP
contracts.description:
We’re putting out a contract for anyone who is capable of hunting animals responsibly. Citizens for Prosperity needs a group of aggressive kopions who have been harassing their people culled from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. After some initial monitoring, it looked as if they may on, but unfortunately we’ve been forced to take action. This is a relatively straightforward job, but when dealing with dangerous animals, cautious is always advised.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

contracts.title: Breach and Steal
contracts.description:
Hey there. 

Nine Tails got themselves a little problem. As it turns out, they got a little side biz in the underground organ trade. Now that an area I generally like to steer well clear of, but a gig’s a gig, right? It seems that one of their mobile butcher shops aboard the 'October Rising' got pinched by private security while out chopping. Now the Nine Tails are willing to cut ties with the ship and its crew (who are probably all dead anyway), but they need a particular crate extracted. Guess it was a special order or something.

Anyway, get aboard the October Rising, get the package, and get out.

Security’s still hanging around so watch yourself and maybe bring some friends, but remember, your priority is the package. If you're looking to save yourself some extra hassle, you could also black out the area by shutting down the nearest comm array if you want to avoid the crimestats for, you know, killing a bunch of a security. But hey, you do you.

Once you’re out, drop the package off at the clinic on Grim HEX and I’ll sort your payment.

Easy peasy,

Ruto

contracts.title: grab and go
contracts.description:
This one should be a ringer for somebody like you. There’s a package being held at [Location] and I need you to bring it to [Destination]. 

There's one super tiny issue that you should know about. There’s gonna be a crap ton of security down there. But I'm sure it should be fine.

:)

contracts.title: Package Delivery for Ling
contracts.description:
Hey,

We need you to grab a delivery for us over at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> and then take it to <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>.

I was originally going to send my brother Ricki to handle this, but he said the area’s too dangerous. Guess there’s been a bunch of security warnings around there, but as long as you’re careful and bring some guns or whatever, I’m sure you’ll be fine. You probably won’t even run into anything. 

Thanks, 
Conni Ling
Shipment Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

contracts.title: RED WIND DELIVERY PILOT NEEDED
contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a shipment waiting to be hauled from <EM4>[Location]</EM4> to <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. 

I’ll be up front with you though, this spot doesn’t have the cleanest of reputations. That being said, they still need packages delivered and they got credits, so that’s all square. But if you go in there, there’s a good chance you might run into some trouble.

Don’t take the job if you can’t handle that.



TO ALL VETS - Red Wind appreciates your service to our Empire! Your struggles mean our freedom!

contracts.title: UDM Package Pick Up
contracts.description:
Greetings Qualified Shipping Partner!

If you’re looking for work as a delivery pilot, we have the perfect opportunity for you! 

A pick up is waiting at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> to be delivered to <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. Sounds fun, right?

Warning, there have been multiple security alerts flagged in the area. Be sure to bring along some defensive measures so you can stay safe.

If this sounds like something you're interested in, accept this offer right away! 

Looking forward to working with you,

Unified Distribution Management
 -Delivering the Total Package-

contracts.title: Delivery Pilot for Covalex
contracts.description:
Hello there,

I have a delivery I need taken care of. The order is waiting at <EM4>[Location]</EM4> to be taken to <EM4>[Destination]</EM4>. 

I’m sure you’ll be fine, but for full disclosure, I’m seeing a bunch of security warnings pop up for this area. Seems there have been a handful of attacks in that area in the last few days. Now, I’m not saying you’ll run into anything, but it would probably be best if you brought along a bit of protection.

Good luck,

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

contracts.title: A Batch from Scratch
contracts.description:
Normally, I like to cook everything from scratch myself. Pride in product and all. But every once in a while, whether it's too much demand or too much heat or whatever, I need to rely on other labs for an order. 

My hands are tied up here though, so I could use someone to help oversee the whole production line for me. Couldn't think of anyone better and more available than you.

[Itinerary]

Just don't get distracted in the middle and wander off. It happens more often than you'd think. Manage to finish the full list, and I'll see to it you get nice cut of the profits.

-Wallace

contracts.description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

I know you've done some solid work for us in the past, so I figured I'd see if you were interested in handling a bit of a special run for us that's a bit farther out in the system than what you've been doing so far.

In a nutshell, we need a pilot who's willing to keep their head down, focus on getting the packages delivered, and most importantly, not ask a lot of questions.

See, for a smaller company like us, staying ahead of competition means that we need to offer our clients something they can't get elsewhere - discretion. At Red Wind, as long as you got the credits we'll take whatever to wherever. Understand?

If that sounds good to you, let's see how you do on this run -

contracts.title: Retrieval Op
contracts.description:
Here's the deal – a client of ours (who should have spent the extra credits for a Northrock escort) had one of their ships attacked and now they need us to run point on a retrieval op for some important packages that were stolen.

Thankfully, we caught a break and were able to track down the people responsible to different derelict outposts. We need you to head there and recover the packages. You'll be able to ID them by their serial numbers: <EM4>#[Item1]</EM4>, <EM4>#[Item2]</EM4> and <EM4>#[Item3]</EM4>.

I expect that the outlaws are going to put up a fight, but just remember that they aren't the priority.

Once you got the packages, fly them back to the client at <EM4>[Dropoff1]</EM4>. 

One last thing, make sure you bring a ship that has enough room for the  cargo. Don't want you getting all the way there in your Gladius or whatever only to have to turn back.

Do us proud,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

*RETRIEVAL OPERATION SUMMARY*
* Recover Packages <EM4>#[Item1]</EM4>, <EM4>#[Item2]</EM4> and <EM4>#[Item3]</EM4> from <EM4>[Pickup1]</EM4>
* Deliver to <EM4>[Dropoff1]</EM4>

contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented security professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of illegal occupants who have temporarily gained control of [Location].

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Remove all illegal occupants found within the site; using force as necessary.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and/or security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.

Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

contracts.title: Retrieval Op
contracts.description:
Here's the deal – a client of ours (who should have spent the extra credits for a Northrock escort) had one of their ships attacked and now they need us to run point on a retrieval op for an important package that was stolen.

Thankfully, we caught a break and were able to track down the people responsible to <EM4>[Pickup1]</EM4>. We need you to head there and recover the package. You'll be able to ID it by its serial number: <EM4>#[Item1]</EM4>.

I expect that the outlaws are going to put up a fight, but just remember that they aren't the priority.

Once you got the package, fly it back to the client at <EM4>[Dropoff1]</EM4>. 

One last thing, make sure you bring a ship that has enough room for some cargo. Don't want you getting all the way there in your Gladius or whatever only to have to turn back.

Do us proud,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

*RETRIEVAL OPERATION SUMMARY*
* Recover Package <EM4>#[Item1]</EM4> from <EM4>[Pickup1]</EM4>
* Deliver to <EM4>[Dropoff1]</EM4>

contracts.title: CDF ALERT: Xenothreat Ambush - Support Needed
contracts.description:
*FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE*

Attention, XenoThreat forces started to ambush Naval convoy ships transporting vital supplies while en route to Jericho station at the Pyro Gateway in the Stanton System. The Navy has requested CDF forces to help recover these supplies from the wreckage and safely deliver them to Jericho. 

The Navy has organized a community stipend to handle the distribution of payment. This will be distributed among all CDF volunteers at assigned intervals. An indicator will appear on your HUD to measure these payouts.

Please note that some of these supplies are highly volatile if not handled correctly. Use caution while transporting these materials:
* Zeta-Prolanide degrades over time until breaking down completely.
* AcryliPlex Composite becomes explosively unstable if damaged.
* Diluthermex releases a destructive energy pulse if exposed to quantum travel.
 
Additionally, while not as volatile, the supplies of DynaFlex lost during the attack are still urgently needed by the Navy to complete their repairs of the Javelin and should be a priority for recovery.    

Also, XenoThreat hostiles might still be in the area so be careful. CDF volunteers with combat experience are also urged to contribute by securing these areas from lingering XenoThreat forces.

SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

contracts.title: Overdrive Initative: Attack on XenoThreat
contracts.description:
Attention, Naval forces have regrouped for the final assault that XenoThreat have been planning. The Navy has officially requested any CDF volunteers to help provide combat support in this final push to secure our system. This will include volunteers outside of those who have participated in the Overdrive Initiative.

SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

If successful, this will complete this Overdrive Initiative series and you will receive temporary access to the F7A Hornets or a free upgrade if you currently own an F7C.

contracts.title: Overdrive Initative: Xenothreat Ambush - Support Needed
contracts.description:
Attention CDF volunteers, XenoThreat finally launched their attack against Jericho Station at the Pyro Gateway in Stanton.

The Navy has requested CDF forces to help combat XenoThreat forces in the area and/or recover supplies from the wreckage and safely deliver them to Jericho station. 

The Navy has organized a community stipend to handle the distribution of payment. This will be distributed among all CDF volunteers at assigned intervals. An indicator will appear on your HUD to measure these payouts.

Please note that the supplies are highly volatile if not handled correctly. Use caution while transporting these materials:
* Zeta-Prolanide degrades over time until breaking down completely.
* AcryliPlex Composite becomes explosively unstable if damaged.
* Diluthermex releases a destructive energy pulse if exposed to quantum travel.

SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

contracts.title: CDF ALERT: Attack on XenoThreat
contracts.description:
*FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE*

Attention, Naval forces have regrouped for a final assault on the XenoThreat outlaw pack that have been plaguing Stanton System. The Navy has officially requested for any CDF volunteers to help provide combat support in this final push to secure our system.

SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

contracts.title: [TargetName] Whereabouts Unknown
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is seeking a qualified contractor to assist in the search for [TargetName] who was last seen near the [Location] at [Location] but who's current whereabouts are unknown. 

Our preliminary investigation has led us to suspect foul play may be behind their disappearance. As such, heightened caution is advised as there may be hostile actors involved.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Confirm the location of [TargetName] and if they are still alive.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years security experience.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with conducting missing person investigations.
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.

contracts.title: Missing: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
Unfortunately, one of our community partners, [TargetName], has been missing for a few days. Their family contacted Citizens for Prosperity for help and I told them we would do what we could. That said, with so much time passed, I’m not too hopeful.

Whatever their current state is, we're looking for someone to be our eyes on the ground for this one. There’s a strong chance that they were headed to [Location], an area known to be very dangerous.

If you can track them down and confirm their status, one way or another, I’ll see that you’re properly compensated.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: [TargetName] Gone Missing
contracts.description:
After hearing rumors that we might’ve gotten a bad case of squatters over at [Location], I had sent one of my more trusted people to investigate. 

Bad news is that I haven’t heard from them since. 

I’d like for you to head over and see if you can find [TargetName]’s current whereabouts.  I’ll leave it up to you how you want to deal with any scum you come across. 

Confirm where [TargetName] is, and there’ll be a reward in it for you.

- Smokey

contracts.title: [TargetName] Vanished
contracts.description:
I’ve got people left and right askin’ me if I know what happened to [TargetName]. Now personally, I’d be more than happy to see ‘em gone for good, but for whatever reason they got friends in high places demanding answers.

I can’t spare any of my people to go on a wild goose chase, so I'm looking for the perfect candidate to go over to [Location] and find out what happened to [TargetName]. You’ll get paid if you find where they are.

10 credits says they got way too high and passed out in a dark corner somewhere.

-Smokey

contracts.title: Missing: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
One of our people, [TargetName], was supposed to be doing some preliminary scouting work over at [Location], but they never reported in. We’re hoping that they just ran into some bad luck, but too often out here even the smallest misstep can prove fatal.

I’d appreciate someone heading that way and seeing if they can be located. It’d be great if you find them alive, but if not, some closure is the least we can do for their family.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

contracts.title: [Contractor]
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: [TargetName] Reported Missing
contracts.description:
ABOUT THE JOB
After receiving a report that [TargetName] has been missing, microTech Protection Services is seeking a qualified contractor to begin an onsite search of [Location] to learn their current whereabouts. The missing individual was last seen entering the [Location] so it's recommended to begin the search there.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to [Location].
• Confirm the location of [TargetName] and if they are still alive.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years security experience.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with conducting missing person investigations.

contracts.title: Missing Person Report: [TargetName]
contracts.description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Locate Missing Individual
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: I. Takao
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low

The staff at [Location] has recently filed a missing persons report for one [TargetName]. They have been missing for several days and were last seen heading to the [Location].

You are being contracted to conduct an onsite search for [TargetName] and see if you can determine their whereabouts. 

Payment is dependent on returning a record of their current location, alive or dead.




** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

contracts.title: Tecia Pacheco
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: Tecia Pacheco
contracts.description: [Contractor]

contracts.title: get the goods
contracts.description:
Oh hello, I recently overheard a little bit of intel that [location] received some confidential materials that are of great interest to an acquaintance of mine. So interesting that they’re willing to pay for someone to storm the facility, grab the goods, and deliver them to [DropOff1]. Now I expect there to be plenty of security, who will most likely put up a fight, so I’d bring a gun or two. 

Word is the confidential materials were delivered in a consignment alongside other stuff and are now being stored in the facility’s automated vault. Senior security officers on-site carry datapads containing retrieval codes used to access the vault. You’ll have to get your hands on a datapad before using the package conveyor to retrieve the boxes. 

If you need a little sweetener, I’ve seen the manifest and can confirm that the other crates being stored at the facility are pretty choice. My client could care less about what happens to them, so they’re yours to do as you please. Run this right and those extra crates could be a nice bonus on top of the delivery fee for you.
